papers.title: PPEDCRF: Dynamic-CRF-Guided Selective Perturbation for Background-Based Location Privacy in Video Sequences
papers.abstract: We propose PPEDCRF, a calibrated selective perturbation framework that protects \emph{background-based location privacy} in released video frames against gallery-based retrieval attackers. Even after GPS metadata are stripped, an adversary can geolocate a frame by matching its background visual cues to geo-tagged reference imagery; PPEDCRF mitigates this threat by estimating location-sensitive background regions with a dynamic conditional random field (DCRF), rescaling perturbation strength with a normalized control penalty (NCP), and injecting Gaussian noise only inside the inferred regions via a DP-style calibration rule. On a controlled paired-scene retrieval benchmark with eight attacker backbones and three noise seeds, PPEDCRF reduces ResNet18 Top-1 retrieval accuracy from 0.667 to $0.361\pm0.127$ at $σ_0=8$ while preserving $36.14\,$dB PSNR -- an ${\approx}6\,$dB quality advantage over global Gaussian noise. Transfer across the eight-backbone seed-averaged benchmark is broadly supportive (23 of 24 backbone-gallery cells show negative $Δ$), while appendix-scale confirmation identifies MixVPR as a remaining adverse-transfer exception. Matched-operating-point analysis shows that PPEDCRF and global Gaussian noise converge in Top-1 privacy at equal utility, so the practical benefit is spatially concentrated perturbation that preserves higher visual quality at any given noise scale rather than stronger matched-utility privacy. Code: https://github.com/mabo1215/PPEDCRF

analysis.tldr: 提出PPEDCRF框架，通过动态CRF定位视频帧中敏感背景区域并注入校准噪声，在保持高视觉质量的同时有效防御基于背景的地理位置隐私攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 即使去除GPS元数据，攻击者仍可通过匹配视频帧背景视觉线索与地理标记参考图像来定位位置，现有全局噪声方法会严重降低视觉质量，亟需一种能保护背景位置隐私同时保持高视觉质量的扰动方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著降低视频帧视觉质量的前提下，有效防御基于背景视觉线索的地理位置检索攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局高斯噪声在达到相同隐私保护水平时视觉质量较低（PSNR约30dB），而PPEDCRF通过空间集中扰动在相同噪声尺度下获得约6dB的PSNR优势；跨骨干网络迁移分析显示23/24个骨干-画廊组合的检索准确率下降，但MixVPR存在反向迁移异常。
analysis.method: 使用动态条件随机场（DCRF）估计位置敏感背景区域，通过归一化控制惩罚（NCP）重新缩放扰动强度，仅在推断区域内按差分隐私校准规则注入高斯噪声。
contributions: 提出PPEDCRF框架，首次将动态CRF用于视频帧背景位置隐私保护的区域选择
设计NCP机制自适应调整扰动强度，结合DP校准规则实现空间集中扰动
在8种攻击骨干和3种噪声种子的基准上验证，相比全局噪声在相同隐私水平下PSNR提升约6dB
analysis.experiments: 在受控配对场景检索基准上，使用8种攻击骨干和3种噪声种子，评估ResNet18 Top-1检索准确率从0.667降至0.361±0.127（σ₀=8），PSNR保持36.14dB；跨骨干迁移分析显示23/24个组合准确率下降，MixVPR为异常。
limitations: 仅针对背景位置隐私，未考虑其他隐私维度（如人脸、车牌等）
MixVPR骨干存在反向迁移异常，表明方法对某些特征提取器可能不鲁棒
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PPEDCRF框架，通过动态CRF定位视频帧中敏感背景区域并注入校准噪声，在保持高视觉质量的同时有效防御基于背景的地理位置隐私攻击。

papers.title: GraphDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Multi-Agent System for Scalable Graph Algorithm Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential for many mathematical problems. However, their performance on graph algorithmic tasks is still unsatisfying, since graphs are naturally more complex in topology and often require systematic multi-step reasoning, especially on larger graphs. Motivated by this gap, we propose GraphDC, a Divide-and-Conquer multi-agent framework for scalable graph algorithm reasoning. Specifically, inspired by Divide-and-Conquer design, GraphDC decomposes an input graph into smaller subgraphs, assigns each subgraph to a specialized agent for local reasoning, and uses a master agent to integrate the local outputs with inter-subgraph information to produce the final solution. This hierarchical design reduces the reasoning burden on individual agents, alleviates computational bottlenecks, and improves robustness on large graph instances. Extensive experiments show that GraphDC consistently outperforms existing methods on graph algorithm reasoning across diverse tasks and scales, especially on larger instances where direct end-to-end reasoning is less reliable.

analysis.tldr: 提出分治多智能体框架GraphDC，通过图分解与局部推理提升LLM在图算法任务上的可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在图算法推理中表现不佳，因为图拓扑复杂且需要多步推理，尤其在较大图上计算负担重。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在大型图上进行可扩展且鲁棒的图算法推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接端到端推理在大图实例上不可靠，存在计算瓶颈和鲁棒性问题。
analysis.method: 分治多智能体框架：将输入图分解为子图，每个子图由专门智能体进行局部推理，主智能体整合局部输出与子图间信息得到最终解。
contributions: 提出GraphDC，首个将分治策略用于多智能体图算法推理的框架。
实验表明GraphDC在多种图任务和大规模实例上优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖子图划分质量。
主智能体整合信息时可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分治多智能体框架GraphDC，通过图分解与局部推理提升LLM在图算法任务上的可扩展性。

papers.title: Systematic Capability Benchmarking of Frontier Large Language Models for Offensive Cyber Tasks
papers.abstract: We present, to our knowledge, the most comprehensive cross-model evaluation of LLM agents on offensive cybersecurity tasks, benchmarking 10 frontier models from 7 providers on all 200 challenges of the NYU CTF Bench. Building on the D-CIPHER multi-agent framework, we extend it with multi-provider backend support, a custom Kali Linux environment with over 100 pre-installed penetration testing tools, and runtime tool-discovery agents. Through a controlled factorial study, we find that the Kali Linux environment yields a +9.5 percentage-point improvement over Ubuntu, while auto-prompting and category-specific tips often degrade performance in well-equipped environments. Among models, Claude 4.5 Opus achieves the highest solve rate (59%), followed by Gemini 3 Pro (52%), with Gemini 3 Flash offering the best cost-efficiency at $0.05 per solve. Asymmetric planner/executor model assignments provide no meaningful benefit while coherent same-model configurations consistently outperform mixed-tier pairings. Our results indicate that environment tooling and model selection emerge as the strongest drivers of performance, whereas prompt engineering interventions show diminishing or negative returns in well-equipped environments. Reported performance reflects both model reasoning ability and compatibility with agent tooling and API integration.

analysis.tldr: 对10个前沿LLM在200个CTF挑战上的系统评测，发现环境工具和模型选择是性能关键，提示工程效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在网络安全任务中的应用潜力巨大，但缺乏系统性的跨模型评测，现有研究未充分探索环境工具、提示策略和模型组合的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估前沿LLM在进攻性网络安全任务中的能力，并分析环境、提示和模型配置对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Kali Linux环境比Ubuntu提升9.5个百分点；自动提示和类别提示在装备良好的环境中反而降低性能；相同模型配置优于混合层级配对。
analysis.method: 基于D-CIPHER多智能体框架，扩展多提供商后端支持、自定义Kali Linux环境（含100+渗透测试工具）和运行时工具发现智能体，对10个模型在NYU CTF Bench的200个挑战上进行控制因子研究。
contributions: 最全面的跨模型LLM智能体进攻性网络安全任务评测，覆盖10个前沿模型和200个CTF挑战。
发现环境工具和模型选择是性能最强驱动因素，提示工程在良好装备环境中效果递减或负向。
analysis.experiments: 在NYU CTF Bench的200个挑战上评测10个模型，进行控制因子研究比较环境、提示和模型配置。
limitations: 仅针对CTF任务，可能不泛化到其他网络安全场景。
未深入分析模型推理能力与工具兼容性的具体机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对10个前沿LLM在200个CTF挑战上的系统评测，发现环境工具和模型选择是性能关键，提示工程效果有限。

papers.title: Instant Colorization of Gaussian Splats
papers.abstract: Gaussian Splatting has recently become one of the most popular frameworks for photorealistic 3D scene reconstruction and rendering. While current rasterizers allow for efficient mappings of 3D Gaussian splats onto 2D camera views, this work focuses on mapping 2D image information (e.g. color, neural features or segmentation masks) efficiently back onto an existing scene of Gaussian splats. This 'opposite' direction enables applications ranging from scene relighting and stylization to 3D semantic segmentation, but also introduces challenges, such as view-dependent colorization and occlusion handling. Our approach tackles these challenges using the normal equation to solve a visibility-weighted least squares problem for every Gaussian and can be implemented efficiently with existing differentiable rasterizers. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on scene relighting, feature enrichment and 3D semantic segmentation tasks, achieving up to an order of magnitude speedup compared to gradient descent-based baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高效将2D图像信息映射回3D高斯溅射场景的方法，实现即时着色。
analysis.research_motivation: 高斯溅射在3D场景重建中广泛应用，但将2D图像信息（如颜色、特征）高效映射回3D场景仍具挑战，现有方法依赖梯度下降，速度慢。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将2D图像信息（颜色、特征、分割掩码）映射回已有的3D高斯溅射场景，并处理视角依赖和遮挡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用法方程求解每个高斯的可见性加权最小二乘问题，通过可微分光栅化器高效实现。
contributions: 提出一种基于法方程的即时着色方法，将2D信息映射回3D高斯溅射场景。
在场景重光照、特征增强和3D语义分割任务上实现比梯度下降基线快一个数量级的速度提升。
analysis.experiments: 在场景重光照、特征增强和3D语义分割任务上验证，实现高达一个数量级的加速。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始场景重建。
未讨论对动态场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高效将2D图像信息映射回3D高斯溅射场景的方法，实现即时着色。

papers.title: From Legal Text to Executable Decision Models: Evaluating Structured Representations for Legal Decision Model Generation
papers.abstract: Transforming legal text into executable decision logic is a longstanding challenge in legal informatics. With the rise of LLMs, this task has gained renewed interest, but remains challenging due to requiring extensive manual coding and evaluation. We use a unique real-world dataset that pairs production-grade decision models with legal text from the Dutch Environment and Planning Act. These models power the Omgevingsloket government platform, where citizens check permit requirements for environmental activities. We study whether intermediate structured representations can improve LLM-based generation of executable decision models from legal text. We compare four input conditions: raw legal text, text enriched with semantic role labels, text enriched with input and output constraints, and text enriched with both. We evaluate along two dimensions: structural evaluation, through similarity to gold decision models with graph kernels and graphs' descriptive statistics, and outcome evaluation, through functional equivalence by executing models on pre-configured test scenarios. Our findings show that I/O constraints provide the dominant improvement (+37-54% similarity over baseline), while semantic role labels show modest improvements. Outcome evaluation shows that generated models match the gold standard on 51-53% of test scenarios, even though generated models are typically smaller and simpler. We find LLMs eliminate redundant pass-through logic that comprises up to 45-55% of nodes. Importantly, structural similarity and outcome equivalence are complementary: structural similarity does not guarantee outcome equivalence, and vice versa. To facilitate reproducibility, we publicly release our dataset of 95 production decision models with associated legal text and all experimental code.

analysis.tldr: 通过结构化表示（I/O约束）显著提升LLM从法律文本生成可执行决策模型的性能，但结构相似性与功能等价性互补。
analysis.research_motivation: 将法律文本转化为可执行决策逻辑是法律信息学的长期挑战，传统方法需要大量人工编码，LLM虽带来新机遇但仍需改进。
analysis.problem: 如何利用中间结构化表示提升LLM从法律文本生成可执行决策模型的准确性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: I/O约束带来主导性改进（相似性提升37-54%），语义角色标签改进有限；生成模型通常更小更简单，LLM消除了45-55%的冗余传递逻辑；结构相似性与功能等价性互补。
analysis.method: 比较四种输入条件（原始文本、语义角色标签、I/O约束、两者结合），使用图核和描述性统计进行结构评估，通过执行测试场景进行功能等价性评估。
contributions: 公开了包含95个生产级决策模型及其法律文本的数据集和实验代码。
系统比较了不同结构化表示对LLM生成决策模型的影响，发现I/O约束是关键改进因素。
揭示了结构相似性与功能等价性之间的互补关系。
analysis.experiments: 使用真实世界数据集（荷兰环境与规划法），在结构评估和功能评估两个维度上比较四种输入条件，功能等价性测试显示生成模型在51-53%的测试场景中匹配黄金标准。
limitations: 仅针对单一法律领域（荷兰环境法），泛化性未知。
生成模型规模较小且简单，可能无法处理复杂逻辑。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过结构化表示（I/O约束）显著提升LLM从法律文本生成可执行决策模型的性能，但结构相似性与功能等价性互补。

papers.title: Graph-of-Agents: A Graph-based Framework for Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration
papers.abstract: With an ever-growing zoo of LLMs and benchmarks, the need to orchestrate multiple models for improved task performance has never been more pressing. While frameworks like Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) attempt to coordinate LLMs, they often fall short in terms of (1) selecting relevant agents, (2) facilitating effective intra-agent communication, and (3) integrating responses efficiently. In this work, we propose Graph-of-Agents (GoA), a new graph-based framework for modeling multi-agent LLM communication. Our approach begins with node sampling, selecting only the most relevant agents by leveraging model cards that summarize each model's domain, task specialization, and other characteristics. Next, we construct edges between the selected agents by evaluating their responses against one another to determine relevance ordering. Directed message passing is then performed from highly relevant agents to less relevant ones to enhance their responses, followed by reverse message passing to refine the original responses of the more relevant agents. Finally, the updated responses are aggregated via graph-based pooling (e.g., max or mean pooling) to produce a single, unified answer. We evaluate GoA on diverse multi-domain benchmarks (MMLU, MMLU-Pro, GPQA) and domain-specific benchmarks (MATH, HumanEval, MedMCQA), with an agent pool of 6 LLMs spanning multiple domains. Surprisingly, GoA achieves superior performance using only 3 selected agents, outperforming recent multi-agent LLM baselines that utilize all 6 agents simultaneously. By adopting a graph structure, GoA offers both scalability and effectiveness through structured message passing-positioning it as a strong candidate for navigating the challenges of the ever-growing LLM zoo. Code is available at: https://github.com/UNITES-Lab/GoA.

analysis.tldr: 提出图结构的多智能体LLM协作框架GoA，通过节点采样、边构建、有向消息传递和图池化聚合，仅用3个智能体即超越使用6个智能体的基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM数量激增，需要有效协调多个模型提升任务性能，但现有框架如MoA在智能体选择、通信效率和响应集成方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可扩展且有效的多智能体LLM协作框架，以解决智能体选择、通信和响应集成三大挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Graph-of-Agents (GoA)框架，包括：1) 节点采样：基于模型卡片选择最相关的智能体；2) 边构建：通过评估响应相关性确定有向边；3) 有向消息传递：从高相关到低相关传递消息增强响应，再反向传递优化原始响应；4) 图池化聚合：通过最大或平均池化生成统一答案。
contributions: 提出基于图结构的多智能体LLM协作框架GoA，实现结构化消息传递。
通过节点采样和边构建机制，仅用3个智能体即可超越使用全部6个智能体的基线方法，提升可扩展性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU、MMLU-Pro、GPQA等多领域基准以及MATH、HumanEval、MedMCQA等特定领域基准上评估，智能体池包含6个LLM。GoA使用3个选定智能体即取得优于使用全部6个智能体的多智能体基线方法的性能。
limitations: 可能依赖模型卡片的准确性和完整性。
图结构在智能体数量极大时的扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图结构的多智能体LLM协作框架GoA，通过节点采样、边构建、有向消息传递和图池化聚合，仅用3个智能体即超越使用6个智能体的基线方法。

papers.title: ScenarioControl: Vision-Language Controllable Vectorized Latent Scenario Generation
papers.abstract: We introduce ScenarioControl, the first vision-language control mechanism for learned driving scenario generation. Given a text prompt or an input image, Scenario-Control synthesizes diverse, realistic 3D scenario rollouts - including map, 3D boxes of reactive actors over time, pedestrians, driving infrastructure, and ego camera observations. The method generates scenes in a vectorized latent space that represents road structure and dynamic agents jointly. To connect multimodal control with sparse vectorized scene elements, we propose a cross-global control mechanism that integrates crossattention with a lightweight global-context branch, enabling fine-grained control over road layout and traffic conditions while preserving realism. The method produces temporally consistent scenario rollouts from the perspectives different actors in the scene, supporting long-horizon continuation of driving scenarios. To facilitate training and evaluation, we release a dataset with text annotations aligned to vectorized map structures. Extensive experiments validate that the control adherence and fidelity of ScenarioControl compare favorable to all tested methods across all experiments. Project webpage: https://light.princeton.edu/ScenarioControl

analysis.tldr: 首个面向驾驶场景生成的视觉-语言可控向量化潜空间生成方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 驾驶场景生成对于自动驾驶仿真至关重要，但现有方法缺乏灵活的多模态控制能力，难以同时满足文本/图像条件与高保真度、时序一致性的要求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现基于文本或图像条件、在向量化潜空间中生成包含地图、动态智能体、行人等元素的多样化、真实且时序一致的3D驾驶场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出跨全局控制机制，将交叉注意力与轻量级全局上下文分支结合，在向量化潜空间中联合表示道路结构和动态智能体，实现多模态细粒度控制。
contributions: 首次提出视觉-语言可控的驾驶场景生成方法ScenarioControl。
设计跨全局控制机制，实现文本/图像条件对向量化场景元素的有效控制。
发布带文本标注的向量化地图数据集，促进训练与评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明在所有测试方法中控制遵循度和保真度表现优越。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需验证。
长时序生成的计算效率可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向驾驶场景生成的视觉-语言可控向量化潜空间生成方法。

papers.title: Local Inconsistency Resolution: The Interplay between Attention and Control in Probabilistic Models
papers.abstract: We present a generic algorithm for learning and approximate inference with an intuitive epistemic interpretation: iteratively focus on a subset of the model and resolve inconsistencies using the parameters under control. This framework, which we call Local Inconsistency Resolution (LIR) is built upon Probabilistic Dependency Graphs (PDGs), which provide a flexible representational foundation capable of capturing inconsistent beliefs. We show how LIR unifies and generalizes a wide variety of important algorithms in the literature, including the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm, belief propagation, adversarial training, GANs, and GFlowNets. In the last case, LIR actually suggests a more natural loss, which we demonstrate improves GFlowNet convergence. Each method can be recovered as a specific instance of LIR by choosing a procedure to direct focus (attention and control). We implement this algorithm for discrete PDGs and study its properties on synthetically generated PDGs, comparing its behavior to the global optimization semantics of the full PDG.

analysis.tldr: 提出局部不一致性消解（LIR）框架，统一并泛化EM、置信传播、对抗训练、GAN和GFlowNet等算法，并改进GFlowNet收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有概率模型中的学习和近似推理算法种类繁多，缺乏统一的视角来理解它们之间的内在联系和差异，限制了新算法的设计和理论分析。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用框架，能够统一并泛化多种重要的学习和推理算法，同时提供直观的认知解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出局部不一致性消解（LIR）框架，基于概率依赖图（PDG），通过迭代选择模型子集并使用受控参数消解不一致性，通过选择注意力和控制过程来实例化不同算法。
contributions: 提出LIR框架，统一并泛化EM、置信传播、对抗训练、GAN和GFlowNet等多种算法。
为GFlowNet提出更自然的损失函数，改善其收敛性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成生成的PDG上研究LIR的性质，并与全局优化语义进行比较。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验仅在离散PDG和合成数据上进行，缺乏真实世界应用验证。
框架的扩展性和计算效率可能受限于PDG的规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出局部不一致性消解（LIR）框架，统一并泛化EM、置信传播、对抗训练、GAN和GFlowNet等算法，并改进GFlowNet收敛。

papers.title: The Consensus Trap: Rescuing Multi-Agent LLMs from Adversarial Majorities via Token-Level Collaboration
papers.abstract: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) architectures increasingly rely on response-level aggregation, such as Majority Voting (MAJ), to raise reasoning ceilings. However, in open environments, agents are highly susceptible to stealthy contextual corruption, such as targeted prompt injections. We reveal a critical structural vulnerability in current multi-agent systems: response-level aggregation collapses when corrupted agents form a local majority. Because voting aggregates fully-formed conclusions, it is blind to flawed intermediate logic. To overcome this systematic limitation, we propose the Token-Level Round-Robin (RR) Collaboration, where agents sequentially interleave generation within a shared auto-regressive context. We formalize this process as a discrete-time dynamical system, proving that token-level interleaving transitions aggregation from a brittle counting of final votes (a linear sum) to a dynamic, interwoven chain of logic (a non-linear operator product). Through this theoretical lens, we prove that the honest model's restorative pull can overpower adversarial corruptions, even when corrupted agents form a majority. We conduct an exhaustive empirical evaluation across diverse reasoning benchmarks and demonstrate that while MAJ collapses when corrupted agents reach a majority, RR maintains robust accuracy well beyond this critical threshold.

analysis.tldr: 提出Token-Level Round-Robin协作机制，通过令牌级交错生成打破多数投票的共识陷阱，使多智能体LLM在多数智能体被攻击时仍能保持鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM系统在开放环境中易受隐蔽上下文攻击（如提示注入），现有基于响应级聚合（如多数投票）的方法在恶意智能体形成局部多数时完全失效，存在结构性脆弱性。
analysis.problem: 解决多智能体LLM系统中，当被攻击的智能体形成多数时，响应级聚合（如多数投票）因忽略中间逻辑而崩溃的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示：多数投票在恶意智能体占多数时准确率骤降，而令牌级协作能维持鲁棒性；理论分析表明响应级聚合是脆弱的线性求和，令牌级交错生成是非线性算子乘积，具有更强的纠错能力。
analysis.method: Token-Level Round-Robin (RR) Collaboration：智能体在共享自回归上下文中顺序交错生成令牌，将聚合从最终投票的线性求和转变为动态交织的逻辑链（非线性算子乘积）。
contributions: 揭示多智能体LLM系统中响应级聚合（如多数投票）在对抗性多数下的结构性脆弱性。
提出令牌级轮询协作机制，形式化为离散时间动力系统，并证明其能有效抵抗对抗性多数攻击。
在多个推理基准上实验证明，多数投票在恶意智能体占多数时崩溃，而RR在超过临界阈值后仍保持鲁棒准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上进行了详尽的实证评估，比较了多数投票（MAJ）和令牌级轮询（RR）在不同比例恶意智能体下的准确率。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 令牌级交错生成可能增加推理延迟和通信开销。
理论分析假设智能体行为满足特定动力学模型，实际场景中可能偏离。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Token-Level Round-Robin协作机制，通过令牌级交错生成打破多数投票的共识陷阱，使多智能体LLM在多数智能体被攻击时仍能保持鲁棒性。

papers.title: OptiMVMap: Offline Vectorized Map Construction via Optimal Multi-vehicle Perspectives
papers.abstract: Offline vectorized maps constitute critical infrastructure for high-precision autonomous driving and mapping services. Existing approaches rely predominantly on single ego-vehicle trajectories, which fundamentally suffer from viewpoint insufficiency: while memory-based methods extend observation time by aggregating ego-trajectory frames, they lack the spatial diversity needed to reveal occluded regions. Incorporating views from surrounding vehicles offers complementary perspectives, yet naive fusion introduces three key challenges: computational cost from large candidate pools, redundancy from near-collinear viewpoints, and noise from pose errors and occlusion artifacts. We present OptiMVMap, which reformulates multi-vehicle mapping as a select-then-fuse problem to address these challenges systematically. An Optimal Vehicle Selection (OVS) module strategically identifies a compact subset of helpers that maximally reduce ego-centric uncertainty in occluded regions, addressing computation and redundancy challenges. Cross-Vehicle Attention (CVA) and Semantic-aware Noise Filter (SNF) then perform pose-tolerant alignment and artifact suppression before BEV-level fusion, addressing the noise challenge. This targeted pipeline yields more complete and topologically faithful maps with substantially fewer views than indiscriminate aggregation. On nuScenes and Argoverse2, OptiMVMap improves MapTRv2 by +10.5 mAP and +9.3 mAP, respectively, and surpasses memory-augmented baselines MVMap and HRMapNet by +6.2 mAP and +3.8 mAP on nuScenes. These results demonstrate that uncertainty-guided selection of helper vehicles is essential for efficient and accurate multi-vehicle vectorized mapping. The code is released at https://github.com/DanZeDong/OptiMVMap.

analysis.tldr: 提出OptiMVMap，通过最优多车视角选择与融合，提升离线矢量化地图构建的完整性和拓扑准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线矢量化地图是高精度自动驾驶的关键基础设施，但现有方法依赖单车轨迹，存在视角不足问题；融合多车视角虽能补充，却面临计算开销大、冗余和噪声等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何高效选择并融合多车视角，以低成本获得更完整、拓扑更准确的离线矢量化地图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OptiMVMap，将多车地图构建重构为“先选后融合”问题：最优车辆选择模块挑选最小子集最大化降低遮挡区域不确定性；跨车辆注意力与语义感知噪声滤波器实现位姿容忍对齐和伪影抑制，最后在BEV层面融合。
contributions: 提出OptiMVMap，将多车矢量化地图构建形式化为select-then-fuse问题。
设计最优车辆选择模块，通过不确定性引导挑选紧凑的辅助车辆子集。
提出跨车辆注意力和语义感知噪声滤波器，实现鲁棒融合。
在nuScenes和Argoverse2上显著提升MapTRv2及内存增强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和Argoverse2数据集上，OptiMVMap相比MapTRv2分别提升+10.5 mAP和+9.3 mAP，并超越MVMap和HRMapNet。
limitations: 可能依赖多车通信与同步，实际部署存在延迟和带宽限制。
未讨论极端遮挡或车辆稀疏场景下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OptiMVMap，通过最优多车视角选择与融合，提升离线矢量化地图构建的完整性和拓扑准确性。

papers.title: If Only My CGM Could Speak: A Privacy-Preserving Agent for Question Answering over Continuous Glucose Data
papers.abstract: Continuous glucose monitors (CGMs) used in diabetes care collect rich personal health data that could improve day-to-day self-management. However, current patient platforms only offer static summaries which do not support inquisitive user queries. Large language models (LLMs) could enable free-form inquiries about continuous glucose data, but deploying them over sensitive health records raises privacy and accuracy concerns. In this paper, we present CGM-Agent, a privacy-preserving framework for question answering over personal glucose data. In our design, the LLM serves purely as a reasoning engine that selects analytical functions. All computation occurs locally, and personal health data never leaves the user's device. For evaluation, we construct a benchmark of 4,180 questions combining parameterized question templates with real user queries and ground truth derived from deterministic program execution. Evaluating 6 leading LLMs, we find that top models achieve 94\% value accuracy on synthetic queries and 88\% on ambiguous real-world queries. Errors stem primarily from intent and temporal ambiguity rather than computational failures. Additionally, lightweight models achieve competitive performance in our agent design, suggesting opportunities for low-cost deployment. We release our code and benchmark to support future work on trustworthy health agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出CGM-Agent，一种隐私保护的连续血糖数据问答框架，LLM仅作为推理引擎，数据本地处理，在4180个问题的基准上达到94%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续血糖监测仪（CGM）产生丰富的个人健康数据，但现有平台仅提供静态摘要，不支持用户自由查询；LLM可用于自由形式查询，但部署在敏感健康数据上存在隐私和准确性风险。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用LLM对连续血糖数据进行准确、自由的问答。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 错误主要源于意图和时间歧义，而非计算失败；轻量级模型在代理设计中表现有竞争力。
analysis.method: CGM-Agent：LLM仅作为推理引擎选择分析函数，所有计算在本地执行，个人健康数据不离开用户设备。
contributions: 提出CGM-Agent，一种隐私保护的连续血糖数据问答框架。
构建包含4180个问题的基准，结合参数化模板和真实用户查询。
评估6个领先LLM，显示顶级模型在合成查询上达到94%准确率，在真实查询上达到88%。
analysis.experiments: 在4180个问题的基准上评估6个LLM，合成查询准确率94%，真实查询准确率88%。
limitations: 仅针对连续血糖数据，泛化到其他健康数据需验证。
轻量级模型性能虽好，但可能无法处理更复杂查询。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CGM-Agent，一种隐私保护的连续血糖数据问答框架，LLM仅作为推理引擎，数据本地处理，在4180个问题的基准上达到94%准确率。

papers.title: Prompt Sensitivity in Vision-Language Grounding: How Small Changes in Wording Affect Object Detection
papers.abstract: Vision-language models enable open-vocabulary object grounding through natural language queries, under the implicit assumption that semantically equivalent descriptions yield consistent outputs. We examine this assumption using a controlled pipeline combining DETR for object proposals with CLIP for language-conditioned selection on 263 COCO val2017 images. We find that overlapping prompts such as "a person," "a human," and "a pedestrian" frequently select different instances, with mean instability of 2.11 distinct selections across six prompts. PCA analysis shows this variability is structured and directional, not random. Prompt ensembling does not improve quality and often shifts selections toward generic regions. We further show that text embedding proximity explains only 34% of grounding disagreement (r = -0.58), confirming that instability arises from the argmax selection mechanism rather than text-level distances alone.

analysis.tldr: 视觉-语言模型对提示词敏感，语义等价描述常导致不同检测结果，且集成无法改善。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型假设语义等价的自然语言查询会产生一致的输出，但实际中提示词微小变化可能导致检测结果不稳定，影响实际应用可靠性。
analysis.problem: 量化并分析视觉-语言模型在目标定位任务中对提示词变化的敏感性及其根源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义重叠的提示词（如“a person”“a human”“a pedestrian”）频繁选择不同实例，平均不稳定性为2.11个不同选择；PCA分析显示变异性有结构性和方向性；提示集成无法改善质量，反而使选择偏向通用区域；文本嵌入距离仅能解释34%的定位分歧。
analysis.method: 使用DETR生成目标提议，结合CLIP进行语言条件选择，在263张COCO val2017图像上测试6个语义重叠提示词，通过PCA和相关性分析研究不稳定性。
contributions: 揭示了视觉-语言模型在目标定位中对提示词变化的显著敏感性。
通过实验证明提示集成无法缓解不稳定性，并指出argmax选择机制是主要根源。
analysis.experiments: 在263张COCO val2017图像上使用6个语义重叠提示词进行实验，报告了平均不稳定性、PCA分析和文本嵌入距离与定位分歧的相关性。
limitations: 仅使用COCO子集，可能不具广泛代表性。
仅测试了有限数量的提示词和模型组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉-语言模型对提示词敏感，语义等价描述常导致不同检测结果，且集成无法改善。

papers.title: CASCADE: A Cascaded Hybrid Defense Architecture for Prompt Injection Detection in MCP-Based Systems
papers.abstract: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is a rapidly adopted standard for defining and invoking external tools in LLM applications. The multi-layered architecture of MCP introduces new attack surfaces such as tool poisoning, in addition to traditional prompt injection. Existing defense systems suffer from limitations including high false positive rates, API dependency, or white-box access requirements. In this study, we propose CASCADE, a three-tiered cascaded defense architecture for MCP-based systems: (i) Layer 1 performs fast pre-filtering using regex, phrase weighting, and entropy analysis; (ii) Layer 2 conducts semantic analysis via BGE embedding with an Ollama Llama3 fallback mechanism; (iii) Layer 3 applies pattern-based output filtering. Evaluation on a dataset of 5,000 samples yielded 95.85% precision, 6.06% false positive rate, 61.05% recall, and 74.59% F1-score. Analysis across 31 attack types categorized into 6 tiers revealed high detection rates for data exfiltration (91.5%) and prompt injection (84.2%), while semantic attack (52.5%) and tool poisoning (59.9%) categories showed potential for improvement. A key advantage of CASCADE over existing solutions is its fully local operation, requiring no external API calls

analysis.tldr: 提出CASCADE三层级联防御架构，用于MCP系统中提示注入检测，实现全本地运行并降低误报率。
analysis.research_motivation: MCP标准在LLM应用中快速普及，但其多层架构引入了工具投毒等新攻击面，现有防御系统存在高误报率、依赖API或需要白盒访问等局限。
analysis.problem: 如何在MCP系统中高效、准确地检测提示注入攻击，同时保持低误报率和全本地化运行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CASCADE三层级联架构：第一层使用正则、短语权重和熵分析快速预过滤；第二层通过BGE嵌入进行语义分析，并配备Ollama Llama3回退机制；第三层应用基于模式的输出过滤。
contributions: 提出首个针对MCP系统的全本地化级联防御架构CASCADE。
在5000样本数据集上达到95.85%精确率和6.06%假阳性率，并分析了31种攻击类型的检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在5000样本数据集上评估，整体精确率95.85%，假阳性率6.06%，召回率61.05%，F1分数74.59%；数据泄露检测率91.5%，提示注入84.2%，语义攻击52.5%，工具投毒59.9%。
limitations: 召回率较低（61.05%），可能漏检部分攻击。
对语义攻击和工具投毒检测效果有待提升。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CASCADE三层级联防御架构，用于MCP系统中提示注入检测，实现全本地运行并降低误报率。

papers.title: Multimodal Fusion of Histopathology Images and Electronic Health Records for Early Breast Cancer Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Breast cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related mortality worldwide, and timely accurate diagnosis is critical to improving survival outcomes. While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have demonstrated strong performance on histopathology image classification, and machine learning models on structured electronic health records (EHR) have shown utility for clinical risk stratification, most existing work treats these modalities in isolation. This paper presents a systematic multimodal framework that integrates patch-level histopathology features from the BreCaHAD dataset with structured clinical data from MIMIC-IV. We train and evaluate unimodal image models (a simple CNN baseline and ResNet-18 with transfer learning), unimodal tabular models (XGBoost and a multilayer perceptron), and an intermediate-fusion model that concatenates latent representations from both modalities. ResNet-18 achieves near-perfect accuracy (1.000) and AUC (1.000) on three-class patch-level classification, while XGBoost achieves 98% accuracy on the EHR prediction task. The intermediate fusion model yields a macro-average AUC of 0.997, outperforming all unimodal baselines and delivering the largest improvements on the diagnostically critical but class-imbalanced mitosis category (AUC 0.994). Grad-CAM and SHAP interpretability analyses validate that model decisions align with established pathological and clinical criteria. Our results demonstrate that multimodal integration delivers meaningful improvements in both predictive performance and clinical transparency.

analysis.tldr: 融合组织病理图像与电子健康记录的多模态框架在早期乳腺癌诊断中优于单模态模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺癌是癌症死亡主因，早期诊断至关重要；现有方法多单独处理组织病理图像或结构化临床数据，缺乏系统性多模态融合研究。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合组织病理图像与电子健康记录两种异质模态，提升早期乳腺癌诊断的准确性和临床可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出中间融合框架：分别用ResNet-18（图像）和XGBoost/MLP（表格）提取特征，在潜在空间拼接后分类。
contributions: 系统比较了单模态与多模态融合模型在乳腺癌诊断上的性能
中间融合模型在类别不平衡的有丝分裂分类上取得最大提升（AUC 0.994）
analysis.experiments: 在BreCaHAD（图像）和MIMIC-IV（EHR）数据集上评估，ResNet-18达到100%准确率和AUC，XGBoost达98%准确率，融合模型宏平均AUC 0.997。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（BreCaHAD），可能限制泛化性
融合策略简单（拼接），未探索更复杂的注意力或跨模态交互
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 融合组织病理图像与电子健康记录的多模态框架在早期乳腺癌诊断中优于单模态模型。

papers.title: The Topological Trouble With Transformers
papers.abstract: Transformers encode structure in sequences via an expanding contextual history. However, their purely feedforward architecture fundamentally limits dynamic state tracking. State tracking -- the iterative updating of latent variables reflecting an evolving environment -- involves inherently sequential dependencies that feedforward networks struggle to maintain. Consequently, feedforward models push evolving state representations deeper into their layer stack with each new input step, rendering information inaccessible in shallow layers and ultimately exhausting the model's depth. While this depth limit can be bypassed by dynamic depth models and by explicit or latent thinking that externalizes state representations, these solutions are computationally and memory inefficient. In this article, we argue that temporally extended cognition requires refocusing from explicit thought traces to implicit activation dynamics via recurrent architectures. We introduce a taxonomy of recurrent and continuous-thought transformer architectures, categorizing them by their recurrence axis (depth versus step) and their ratio of input tokens to recurrence steps. Finally, we outline promising research directions, including enhanced state-space models and coarse-grained recurrence, to better integrate state tracking into modern foundation models.

analysis.tldr: Transformer的纯前馈架构在状态跟踪上存在根本性局限，递归架构是更优选择。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在序列处理中依赖扩展的上下文历史，但其纯前馈架构无法有效进行动态状态跟踪，导致深度耗尽问题，而现有解决方案（如动态深度模型、显式思维）计算和内存效率低下。
analysis.problem: Transformer架构在状态跟踪任务中因缺乏递归机制而面临深度限制，需要更高效的方法来整合隐式激活动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，前馈模型将状态表示推入深层，导致浅层信息不可用，最终耗尽模型深度；动态深度和显式思维虽能绕过限制但效率低。
analysis.method: 提出递归和连续思维Transformer架构的分类法，按递归轴（深度vs步长）和输入令牌与递归步长比率分类，并展望增强状态空间模型和粗粒度递归等方向。
contributions: 论证了Transformer在状态跟踪上的拓扑缺陷，指出递归架构的必要性
提出了递归和连续思维Transformer架构的分类法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 未提供实证验证，仅基于理论分析
分类法可能不覆盖所有变体
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Transformer的纯前馈架构在状态跟踪上存在根本性局限，递归架构是更优选择。

papers.title: A Two-Stage Deep Learning Framework for Segmentation of Ten Gastrointestinal Organs from Coronal MR Enterography
papers.abstract: Accurate segmentation of gastrointestinal (GI) organs in magnetic resonance enterography (MRE) is critical for diagnosing inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). However, anatomical variability, class imbalance, and low tissue contrast hinder reliable automation. This study proposes a dual-stage deep learning framework for organ-specific segmentation of GI structures from coronal MRE images to address these challenges. A publicly available MRE dataset of 3,195 coronal T2-weighted HASTE slices from 114 IBD patients was used. Initially, a DenseNet201-UNet++ model generated coarse masks for ROI extraction. A DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet model was then trained on organ-specific patches. Extensive data augmentation, normalization, five-fold cross-validation, and class-specific weighting were applied to mitigate severe class imbalance, particularly for the appendix. The initial stage achieved strong organ localization but underperformed for the appendix; class weighting improved its DSC from 6.76% to 85.76%. The second-stage DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet significantly enhanced segmentation across all GI structures, with notable DSC gains (cecum +23.62%, sigmoid +18.57%, rectum +17.99%, small intestine +16.06%). Overall, the framework achieved mDSC of 88.99%, mIoU of 84.76%, and mHD95 of 6.94 mm, outperforming all baselines. This framework demonstrates the effectiveness of a coarse-to-fine, organ-aware segmentation strategy for intestinal MRE. Despite higher computational cost, it shows strong potential for clinical translation and enables anatomically informed diagnostic tools in gastroenterology.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段粗到细分割框架，在MR小肠造影上实现十个胃肠道器官的高精度分割，mDSC达88.99%。
analysis.research_motivation: MR小肠造影中胃肠道器官的精确分割对诊断炎症性肠病至关重要，但解剖变异、类别不平衡和低组织对比度阻碍了自动化方法的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决MR小肠造影图像中十个胃肠道器官的自动分割问题，克服类别不平衡（尤其是阑尾）和低对比度挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 第一阶段模型在阑尾上表现差（DSC仅6.76%），通过类别加权提升至85.76%；第二阶段模型显著改善了所有器官的分割，尤其是盲肠、乙状结肠、直肠和小肠。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用DenseNet201-UNet++生成粗分割掩码并提取ROI；第二阶段在器官特定补丁上训练DenseNet121-SelfONN-UNet模型，结合数据增强、归一化、五折交叉验证和类别加权。
contributions: 提出一种两阶段粗到细的器官感知分割框架，用于MR小肠造影中十个胃肠道器官的精确分割。
通过类别加权有效缓解了严重类别不平衡问题，将阑尾DSC从6.76%提升至85.76%。
在公开数据集上达到88.99%的平均DSC，优于所有基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 使用包含3195张冠状T2加权HASTE切片（来自114名IBD患者）的公开MRE数据集，进行五折交叉验证，与多个基线比较，报告了DSC、IoU和HD95指标。
limitations: 计算成本较高，可能影响临床实时应用。
仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段粗到细分割框架，在MR小肠造影上实现十个胃肠道器官的高精度分割，mDSC达88.99%。

papers.title: Inference-Time Temporal Probability Smoothing for Stable Video Segmentation with SAM2 under Weak Prompts
papers.abstract: Interactive video segmentation models such as SAM2 have demonstrated strong generalization across diverse visual domains. However, under weak user supervision, for example, when sparse point prompts are provided on a single frame, their predictions often suffer from temporal instability, including flickering boundaries, object dropout, and inconsistent object extents across frames. These issues limit their reliability in downstream video understanding and control applications. In this paper, we propose an inference-time temporal probability smoothing method that improves the temporal stability of SAM2-based video segmentation without retraining or architectural modification. Our approach operates directly on per-frame segmentation probability maps and leverages optical-flow-based motion warping together with pixel-wise uncertainty estimates derived from segmentation entropy, and forward-backwards flow consistency. These signals are used to adaptively blend current-frame predictions with motion-aligned historical estimates, yielding temporally coherent segmentation outputs under weak prompts. We evaluate the proposed method on four diverse video sequences using a comprehensive set of frame-wise and temporal stability metrics, including motion-compensated IoU, boundary consistency, object persistence, and area volatility. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements in temporal stability over vanilla SAM2 inference while preserving spatial accuracy. The proposed framework is lightweight, model-agnostic, and well-suited for real-time, interactive video segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出推理时时间概率平滑方法，在不重训或改架构下提升SAM2弱提示视频分割的时间稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱用户监督下（如单帧稀疏点提示）SAM2预测存在时间不稳定（闪烁边界、对象丢失、范围不一致），限制下游视频应用可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决SAM2在弱提示下视频分割的时间不稳定性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弱提示导致逐帧预测出现闪烁边界、对象丢失和范围不一致等时间不稳定现象。
analysis.method: 推理时对逐帧分割概率图进行时间平滑：利用光流运动扭曲、分割熵的像素级不确定性估计和前向-后向流一致性，自适应融合当前帧预测与运动对齐的历史估计。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、模型无关的推理时时间概率平滑方法，无需重训或改架构。
在四个多样视频序列上使用全面指标（运动补偿IoU、边界一致性、对象持久性、面积波动性）验证，显著提升时间稳定性同时保持空间精度。
analysis.experiments: 在四个多样视频序列上评估，使用帧级和时间稳定性指标（运动补偿IoU、边界一致性、对象持久性、面积波动性），结果表明相比原始SAM2推理在时间稳定性上持续改进，同时保持空间精度。
limitations: 依赖光流估计质量，在快速运动或遮挡场景可能受限。
未在更多样化或长视频数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出推理时时间概率平滑方法，在不重训或改架构下提升SAM2弱提示视频分割的时间稳定性。

papers.title: Complementing Self-Consistency with Cross-Model Disagreement for Uncertainty Quantification
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often produce confident yet incorrect responses, and uncertainty quantification is one potential solution to more robust usage. Recent works routinely rely on self-consistency to estimate aleatoric uncertainty (AU), yet this proxy collapses when models are overconfident and produce the same incorrect answer across samples. We analyze this regime and show that cross-model semantic disagreement is higher on incorrect answers precisely when AU is low. Motivated by this, we introduce an epistemic uncertainty (EU) term that operates in the black-box access setting: EU uses only generated text from a small, scale-matched ensemble and is computed as the gap between inter-model and intra-model sequence-semantic similarity. We then define total uncertainty (TU) as the sum of AU and EU. In a comprehensive study across five 7-9B instruction-tuned models and ten long-form tasks, TU improves ranking calibration and selective abstention relative to AU, and EU reliably flags confident failures where AU is low. We further characterize when EU is most useful via agreement and complementarity diagnostics.

analysis.tldr: 通过引入跨模型不一致性作为认知不确定性项，弥补自一致性在估计总不确定性时的不足，提升LLM的校准与选择性弃权能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常自信地给出错误回答，不确定性量化是提升鲁棒性的关键，但现有自一致性方法在模型过度自信时失效。
analysis.problem: 自一致性无法准确估计模型过度自信且输出相同错误答案时的总不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当自一致性（aleatoric uncertainty）较低时，跨模型语义不一致性在错误答案上反而更高，表明认知不确定性可补充自一致性的盲区。
analysis.method: 提出认知不确定性项EU，基于黑盒访问下小规模同规模集成，计算模型间与模型内序列语义相似度的差距；总不确定性TU = AU + EU。
contributions: 发现跨模型语义不一致性在自一致性低时对错误答案更高，为互补性提供理论依据。
提出仅需黑盒访问的认知不确定性量化方法EU，并定义总不确定性TU。
在5个7-9B指令微调模型和10个长文本任务上验证TU提升校准和选择性弃权，EU有效标记自信失败。
analysis.experiments: 在5个7-9B指令微调模型和10个长文本任务上评估，TU相比AU改善排名校准和选择性弃权，EU可靠标记自信失败。
limitations: 依赖小规模同规模集成，可能不适用于单一模型或异构集成。
仅针对长文本任务，短文本或分类任务效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过引入跨模型不一致性作为认知不确定性项，弥补自一致性在估计总不确定性时的不足，提升LLM的校准与选择性弃权能力。

papers.title: HiveMind: OS-Inspired Scheduling for Concurrent LLM Agent Workloads
papers.abstract: When multiple LLM coding agents share a rate-limited API endpoint, they exhibit resource contention patterns analogous to unscheduled OS processes competing for CPU, memory, and I/O. In a motivating incident, 3 of 11 parallel agents died from connection resets and HTTP 502 errors - a 27% failure rate - despite the API having sufficient aggregate capacity to serve all 11 sequentially. We present HIVEMIND, a transparent HTTP proxy that applies five OS-inspired scheduling primitives - admission control, rate-limit tracking, AIMD backpressure with circuit breaking, token budget management, and priority queuing - to eliminate the failure modes caused by uncoordinated parallel execution. The proxy requires zero modifications to existing agent code and supports Anthropic, OpenAI, and local model APIs via auto-detected provider profiles. Our evaluation across seven scenarios (5-50 concurrent agents) shows that uncoordinated agents fail at 72-100% rates under contention, while HIVEMIND reduces failures to 0-18% and eliminates 48-100% of wasted compute. An ablation study reveals that transparent retry - not admission control - is the single most critical primitive, but the primitives are most effective in combination. Real-world validation against Ollama confirms that HIVEMIND adds under 3ms of proxy overhead per request. The system is open-source under the MIT license.

analysis.tldr: 受操作系统启发，HiveMind 通过透明 HTTP 代理调度并发 LLM Agent 请求，将失败率从 72-100% 降至 0-18%。
analysis.research_motivation: 多个 LLM Agent 共享限速 API 时会产生资源争用，导致高失败率和计算浪费，而现有方法需要修改 Agent 代码或无法有效协调。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改现有 Agent 代码的前提下，消除并发 LLM Agent 因 API 限速和资源争用导致的请求失败和计算浪费。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 并发 Agent 在共享限速 API 时表现出类似未调度 OS 进程的资源争用模式，导致连接重置、HTTP 502 错误等高失败率，即使 API 总容量足以顺序处理所有请求。
analysis.method: 提出 HiveMind，一个透明 HTTP 代理，集成五种受 OS 启发的调度原语：准入控制、速率限制跟踪、AIMD 背压与熔断、令牌预算管理和优先级队列。
contributions: 首次将 OS 调度原语系统性地应用于并发 LLM Agent 的 API 请求协调。
实现零代码修改的透明代理，支持多种 API 提供商，并开源。
通过消融实验揭示透明重试是最关键的原语，但组合使用效果最佳。
analysis.experiments: 在 5-50 个并发 Agent 的七个场景中评估，未协调 Agent 失败率 72-100%，HiveMind 降至 0-18%，消除 48-100% 的浪费计算；真实环境验证代理开销低于 3ms。
limitations: 仅针对 HTTP API 场景，不适用于其他通信协议。
原语组合的调优可能依赖具体 API 特性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受操作系统启发，HiveMind 通过透明 HTTP 代理调度并发 LLM Agent 请求，将失败率从 72-100% 降至 0-18%。

papers.title: From Clinical Intent to Clinical Model: An Autonomous Coding-Agent Framework for Clinician-driven AI Development
papers.abstract: Clinical AI development has traditionally followed a collaborative paradigm that depends on close interaction between clinicians and specialized AI teams. This paradigm imposes a practical challenge: clinicians must repeatedly communicate and refine their requirements with AI developers before those requirements can be translated into executable model development. This iterative process is time-consuming, and even after repeated discussion, misalignment may still exist because the two sides do not fully share each other's expertise. However, autonomous coding agents may change this paradigm, raising the possibility that clinicians could develop clinical AI models independently through natural-language interaction alone. In this study, we present such an autonomous prototype for clinician-driven clinical AI development. We evaluated the system on five clinical tasks spanning dermoscopic lesion classification, melanoma-versus-nevus triage, wrist-fracture detection (including a weakly supervised variant with only 5% bounding-box annotations), and debiased pneumothorax classification on chest radiographs. Across these settings, the system consistently developed models from clinician requests and achieved promising performance. Notably, in a debiased pneumothorax classification task on chest radiographs, where chest drains can act as a major confounder, the system successfully mitigated shortcut learning and nearly halved the model's reliance on chest drains. These findings provide proof of concept that autonomous coding agents may help shift clinical AI development toward a more clinician-driven paradigm, reducing the communication overhead and dependence on specialized AI developers. Although further validation and robustness assessment are needed, this study suggests a promising path toward making clinical AI development more accessible.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个自主编码智能体框架，让临床医生通过自然语言独立开发临床AI模型，并在多个任务上验证了可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统临床AI开发依赖临床医生与AI团队的紧密协作，沟通耗时且易出现需求对齐偏差，限制了临床AI的普及。
analysis.problem: 如何让临床医生无需AI专业知识，仅通过自然语言交互就能自主开发临床AI模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建一个自主编码智能体框架，临床医生以自然语言描述临床意图，系统自动生成并执行模型开发代码，包括数据预处理、模型训练、评估等步骤。
contributions: 提出首个面向临床医生的自主编码智能体框架，实现从临床意图到临床模型的端到端自动化。
在五个临床任务上验证了系统有效性，包括皮肤镜病变分类、黑色素瘤鉴别、腕部骨折检测、弱监督骨折检测以及去偏气胸分类。
在去偏气胸分类任务中，系统成功减轻了捷径学习，将模型对胸引管的依赖降低近一半。
analysis.experiments: 在五个临床任务上评估系统，包括皮肤镜病变分类、黑色素瘤鉴别、腕部骨折检测（含仅5%边界框标注的弱监督变体）以及去偏气胸分类。系统均从临床医生请求出发开发模型，并取得有前景的性能。
limitations: 需要进一步验证和鲁棒性评估。
可能仅适用于特定类型的临床任务，泛化性有待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个自主编码智能体框架，让临床医生通过自然语言独立开发临床AI模型，并在多个任务上验证了可行性。

papers.title: Beyond Word Boundaries: A Hebrew Coreference Benchmark and an Evaluation Protocol for Morphologically Complex Text
papers.abstract: Coreference Resolution (CR) is a fundamental NLP task critical for long-form tasks as information extraction, summarization, and many business applications. However, CR methods originally designed for English struggle with Morphologically Rich Languages (MRLs), where mention boundaries do not necessarily align with word boundaries, and a single token may consist of multiple anaphors. CR modeling and evaluation protocols standardly assume that, as in English, words and mentions mostly align. However, this assumption breaks down in MRLs, particularly in the context of LLMs' raw-text processing and end-to-end tasks. To assess and address this challenge, we introduce {\em KibutzR}, the first comprehensive CR dataset for Modern Hebrew, an MRL rich with complex words and pronominal clitics. We deliver an annotated dataset that identifies mentions at word, sub-word and multi-word levels, and propose an evaluation protocol that directly addresses word/morpheme boundary discrepancies. Our experiments show that contemporary LLMs perform significantly worse on Hebrew than on English, and that performance degrades on raw unsegmented text. Crucially, we show an inverse performance-trend in Hebrew relative to English, where smaller encoders perform far better than contemporary decoder models, leaving ample space for investigation and improvement. We deliver a new benchmark for Hebrew coreference resolution and a segmentation-aware evaluation protocol to inform future work on other MRLs.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个现代希伯来语指代消解基准KibutzR及考虑词/语素边界差异的评估协议，揭示LLM在形态丰富语言上的性能退化与逆趋势。
analysis.research_motivation: 指代消解（CR）是信息抽取、摘要等长文本任务的基础，但现有CR方法主要针对英语设计，在形态丰富语言（MRL）中失效，因为MRL中提及边界与词边界不对齐，单个词可能包含多个照应语。
analysis.problem: 解决形态丰富语言（如希伯来语）中指代消解的建模与评估问题，特别是词/语素边界不一致导致的性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现：当代LLM在希伯来语上表现显著差于英语，且在原始未分词文本上性能进一步下降；更重要的是，在希伯来语上出现与英语相反的性能趋势——较小的编码器模型远优于当代解码器模型。
analysis.method: 构建KibutzR数据集，标注词级、子词级和多词级的提及，并提出一个直接处理词/语素边界差异的评估协议。
contributions: 首个全面的现代希伯来语指代消解数据集KibutzR，包含词、子词和多词级别的提及标注。
提出一个考虑词/语素边界差异的评估协议，适用于形态丰富语言。
实验揭示LLM在希伯来语上的性能退化及编码器-解码器模型的逆趋势，为未来研究提供基准。
analysis.experiments: 在KibutzR数据集上测试了当代LLM，比较了英语和希伯来语性能，以及原始文本与分词文本的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对现代希伯来语，其他MRL的泛化性待验证。
评估协议可能未覆盖所有边界不一致情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个现代希伯来语指代消解基准KibutzR及考虑词/语素边界差异的评估协议，揭示LLM在形态丰富语言上的性能退化与逆趋势。

papers.title: Hybrid Multi-Dimensional MRI Prostate Cancer Detection via Hadamard Network-Based Bias Correction and Residual Networks
papers.abstract: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is vital for prostate cancer (PCa) diagnosis. While advanced techniques such as Hybrid Multi-dimensional MRI (HM-MRI) have enhanced diagnostic capabilities, the significant need remains for robust, automated Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based detection methods. In this study, we combine quantitative HM-MRI of tissue composition with an AI-based neural network. We propose the Hadamard-Bias Network plus ResNet18 (HBR-Net-18), a two-stage AI framework for PCa detection. In the first stage, a Hadamard U-Net-based algorithm suppresses intensity inhomogeneities (bias fields) across six parametric HM-MRI maps generated via a Physics-Informed Autoencoder (PIA). In the second stage, a Residual Network (ResNet-18) performs patch-level classification. The framework utilizes overlapping 11-by-11 patches, incorporating both 2D intra-slice and 3D inter-slice (adjacent-slice) information to improve spatial consistency. Our experimental results demonstrate that HB-Net achieves balanced sensitivity and specificity, significantly outperforming conventional radiomics-based approaches and baseline CNN models, highlighting its potential for clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出HBR-Net-18两阶段AI框架，结合Hadamard U-Net偏置校正和ResNet-18分类，提升混合多维度MRI前列腺癌检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: MRI对前列腺癌诊断至关重要，但现有AI检测方法在鲁棒性和自动化方面仍有不足，需要更有效的自动检测技术。
analysis.problem: 如何利用混合多维度MRI（HM-MRI）数据，通过AI方法实现高精度、鲁棒的前列腺癌自动检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用基于Hadamard U-Net的算法抑制六张参数化HM-MRI图的强度不均匀性（偏置场），这些图由物理信息自编码器生成；第二阶段使用ResNet-18进行补丁级分类，采用重叠11×11补丁并融合2D层内和3D层间信息。
contributions: 提出HBR-Net-18两阶段AI框架，结合Hadamard U-Net偏置校正和ResNet-18分类。
在HM-MRI前列腺癌检测中，该方法在敏感性和特异性上显著优于传统放射组学方法和基线CNN模型。
analysis.experiments: 实验结果表明HB-Net实现了平衡的敏感性和特异性，显著优于传统放射组学方法和基线CNN模型。
limitations: 可能仅在特定HM-MRI数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
补丁级分类可能忽略全局上下文信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HBR-Net-18两阶段AI框架，结合Hadamard U-Net偏置校正和ResNet-18分类，提升混合多维度MRI前列腺癌检测性能。

papers.title: TensorHub: Rethinking AI Model Hub with Tensor-Centric Compression
papers.abstract: Modern AI models are growing rapidly in size and redundancy, leading to significant storage and distribution challenges in model hubs. We present TensorHub, a tensor-centric system for reducing storage overhead through fine-grained deduplication and compression. TensorHub leverages tensor-level fingerprinting and clustering to identify redundancy across models without requiring annotations. Our design enables efficient storage reduction while preserving model usability and performance. Experiments on real-world model repositories demonstrate substantial storage savings with minimal overhead.

analysis.tldr: TensorHub 通过张量级去重和压缩，在不影响模型性能的前提下大幅降低模型仓库的存储开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代 AI 模型体积和冗余度快速增长，导致模型仓库面临严重的存储和分发挑战，现有方法缺乏细粒度、跨模型的去重能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖标注的情况下，通过细粒度去重和压缩减少模型仓库的存储开销，同时保持模型的可用性和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出张量级指纹识别和聚类方法，识别跨模型的冗余张量，实现细粒度去重与压缩。
contributions: 提出张量中心的模型仓库压缩系统 TensorHub，无需标注即可识别跨模型冗余。
在真实模型仓库上验证了显著的存储节省和低开销。
analysis.experiments: 在真实模型仓库上进行实验，展示了显著的存储节省和最小开销。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的模型或张量结构。
去重和压缩对模型性能的长期影响未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TensorHub 通过张量级去重和压缩，在不影响模型性能的前提下大幅降低模型仓库的存储开销。

papers.title: Configuration Over Selection: Hyperparameter Sensitivity Exceeds Model Differences in Open-Source LLMs for RTL Generation
papers.abstract: Benchmarking of open-source LLMs for hardware design focuses on which LLMs to use, while treating inference-time decoding configuration as a secondary concern. This work shows that it matters more how an LLM is configured than which model is selected. Benchmarking 26 open-source LLMs on VerilogEval and RTLLM with synthesis-in-the-loop evaluation, the study first maps the current capability landscape and then conducts an extensive 108-configuration hyperparameter sweep on three prominent models. The sweep reveals absolute pass-rate gaps of up to 25.5% between the best and worst settings for the same LLM, which is 5x larger than the average spread observed across various model families under their respective default configurations. Ranking all configurations by Spearman's $ρ$ across the two benchmark suites yields near-zero correlation, demonstrating that optimal configurations do not transfer. These results show that benchmarking conducted under default hyperparameters confounds model capabilities with configuration effects. Realizing the full potential of open-source LLMs for RTL generation requires architecture and benchmark aware hyperparameter selection, as enabled by the proposed methodology.

analysis.tldr: LLM配置超参数对RTL生成性能的影响远超模型选择，默认配置下的基准测试会混淆模型能力与配置效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 开源LLM在硬件设计（RTL生成）中的基准测试主要关注模型选择，而忽略了推理时解码配置的影响，导致评估结果可能不准确。
analysis.problem: 现有基准测试在默认超参数下进行，无法区分模型能力与配置效应，且最优配置在不同基准间不迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一LLM的最佳与最差配置间通过率差距高达25.5%，是不同模型家族默认配置下平均差距的5倍；最优配置在两个基准套件间几乎零相关。
analysis.method: 对26个开源LLM在VerilogEval和RTLLM上进行合成验证评估，并对三个代表性模型进行108种超参数配置的全面扫描。
contributions: 首次系统揭示超参数配置对RTL生成性能的影响远超模型选择。
提出架构和基准感知的超参数选择方法论，以充分发挥开源LLM的潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在VerilogEval和RTLLM上对26个开源LLM进行合成验证评估，并对三个模型进行108种配置的扫描。
limitations: 仅针对RTL生成任务，可能不适用于其他硬件设计或自然语言任务。
超参数扫描范围有限，未涵盖所有可能的配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM配置超参数对RTL生成性能的影响远超模型选择，默认配置下的基准测试会混淆模型能力与配置效应。

papers.title: Marrying Text-to-Motion Generation with Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Human action recognition and motion generation are two active research problems in human-centric computer vision, both aiming to align motion with textual semantics. However, most existing works study these two problems separately, without uncovering the links between them, namely that motion generation requires semantic comprehension. This work investigates unified action recognition and motion generation by leveraging skeleton coordinates for both motion understanding and generation. We propose Coordinates-based Autoregressive Motion Diffusion (CoAMD), which synthesizes motion in a coarse-to-fine manner. As a core component of CoAMD, we design a Multi-modal Action Recognizer (MAR) that provides gradient-based semantic guidance for motion generation. Furthermore, we establish a rigorous benchmark by evaluating baselines on absolute coordinates. Our model can be applied to four important tasks, including skeleton-based action recognition, text-to-motion generation, text-motion retrieval, and motion editing. Extensive experiments on 13 benchmarks across these tasks demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, highlighting its effectiveness and versatility for human motion modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/jidongkuang/CoAMD.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoAMD统一框架，利用骨架坐标同时进行动作识别与文本到动作生成，实现多任务SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将动作识别与运动生成分开处理，忽略了二者在语义理解上的内在联系，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何利用骨架坐标统一动作识别与运动生成，实现跨任务的高效语义对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于坐标的自回归运动扩散模型（CoAMD），包含多模态动作识别器（MAR）提供梯度语义引导，采用粗到细的生成策略。
contributions: 提出CoAMD统一框架，同时处理动作识别、运动生成、检索和编辑四项任务。
设计多模态动作识别器（MAR）为运动生成提供梯度语义引导。
在13个基准上取得SOTA性能，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
analysis.experiments: 在13个基准上评估了动作识别、文本到运动生成、文本-运动检索和运动编辑四项任务，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量骨架数据，对噪声或缺失数据鲁棒性未知。
粗到细生成策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoAMD统一框架，利用骨架坐标同时进行动作识别与文本到动作生成，实现多任务SOTA。

papers.title: EvoComp: Learning Visual Token Compression for Multimodal Large Language Models via Semantic-Guided Evolutionary Labeling
papers.abstract: Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on vision-language understanding tasks, yet their inference efficiency is often hampered by the large number of visual tokens, particularly in high-resolution or multi-image scenarios. To address this issue, we propose EvoComp, a visual token compression framework that significantly reduces token count while preserving task accuracy. EvoComp introduces a lightweight encoder-only transformer-based compressor that selects the most informative and non-redundant visual tokens by jointly considering visual and textual contexts. A core challenge lies in providing effective supervision for training the compressor. To this end, we design an evolutionary labeling strategy that searches for token subsets minimizing the MLLM's output loss, while enforcing semantic diversity through vocabulary-based token grouping. We further train the compressor using a tailored loss function combining the GHM loss to mitigate class and difficulty imbalance, and a cosine similarity regularization to encourage semantic separation between retained and discarded tokens. Extensive experiments across multiple vision-language benchmarks show that EvoComp outperforms existing methods based on attention or similarity heuristics. Notably, it retains 99.3% of the original accuracy under 3x token compression and delivers up to 1.6x speedup on mobile devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于进化标签的视觉token压缩框架EvoComp，在3倍压缩下保持99.3%准确率并实现1.6倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在高分辨率或多图像场景下视觉token数量过多，导致推理效率低下，现有基于注意力或相似度启发式的方法压缩效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效压缩视觉token数量，同时保持MLLM在下游任务中的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EvoComp框架，包含轻量级仅编码器Transformer压缩器，通过进化标签策略搜索最小化输出损失的token子集，并利用基于词汇的token分组强制语义多样性；训练时结合GHM损失和余弦相似度正则化。
contributions: 提出EvoComp视觉token压缩框架，联合视觉和文本上下文选择信息丰富且非冗余的token。
设计进化标签策略，通过搜索最小化MLLM输出损失的token子集并强制语义多样性。
在多个视觉语言基准上超越现有方法，3倍压缩下保持99.3%准确率，移动设备上实现1.6倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视觉语言基准上进行实验，与基于注意力和相似度启发式的方法比较，报告了压缩率和准确率保持情况以及移动设备加速比。
limitations: 进化标签策略可能计算开销较大，尤其在大规模数据集上。
压缩器设计为轻量级，可能无法处理极端高分辨率场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于进化标签的视觉token压缩框架EvoComp，在3倍压缩下保持99.3%准确率并实现1.6倍加速。

papers.title: Comparing Human and Large Language Model Interpretation of Implicit Information
papers.abstract: The interpretation of implicit meanings is an integral aspect of human communication. However, this framework may not transfer to interactions with Large Language Models (LLMs). To investigate this, we introduce the task of Implicit Information Extraction (IIE) and propose an LLM-based IIE pipeline that builds a structured knowledge graph from a context sentence by extracting relational triplets, validating implicit inferences, and analyzing temporal relations. We evaluate two LLMs against crowdsourced human judgments on two datasets. We find that humans agree with most model triplets yet consistently propose many additions, indicating limited coverage in current LLM-based IIE. Moreover, in our experiments, models appear to be more conservative about implicit inferences than humans in socially rich contexts, whereas humans become more conservative in shorter, fact-oriented contexts. Our code is available at https://github.com/Antonio-Dee/IIE_from_LLM.

analysis.tldr: 提出隐式信息提取任务，比较LLM与人类在理解隐含意义时的差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐含意义理解是人类交流的核心，但LLM在此方面的能力尚不明确，需要系统评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建LLM的隐式信息提取框架，并比较其与人类在隐含意义理解上的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类同意大多数模型三元组但提出更多补充；模型在社交丰富语境中比人类更保守，而人类在短事实语境中更保守。
analysis.method: 提出基于LLM的隐式信息提取流水线，包括关系三元组提取、隐式推理验证和时间关系分析，构建结构化知识图谱。
contributions: 引入隐式信息提取任务并设计LLM流水线
通过人类评估揭示LLM与人类在隐含意义理解上的差异
analysis.experiments: 在两个数据集上评估两个LLM，并与众包人类判断进行比较。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估两个LLM，泛化性有限
未深入分析模型保守性的原因
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出隐式信息提取任务，比较LLM与人类在理解隐含意义时的差异。

papers.title: D-Prism: Differentiable Primitives for Structured Dynamic Modeling
papers.abstract: Capturing both geometry and rigid motion for structured dynamic objects, like multi-part assemblies or jointed mechanisms, remains a key challenge. Existing dynamic methods, such as deformable meshes or 3DGS, rely on unstructured representations and fail to jointly model suitable geometry and articulated motion. Primitive-based methods excel at structured static scenes, but their dynamic potential is still unexplored. We propose D-Prism, the first framework to achieve high-fidelity structured dynamic modeling by extending differentiable primitives to the dynamic domain. Specifically, we bind 3DGS to primitive surfaces, leveraging their respective strengths in appearance and geometry. We introduce a deformation network to control primitive motion, ensuring it accurately matches the object's movement. Furthermore, we design a novel adaptive control strategy to dynamically adjust primitive counts, better matching objects' true spatial footprint. Experiments confirm that our method excels at structured dynamic modeling, providing both structured geometry and precise motion tracking.

analysis.tldr: D-Prism通过将可微分基元扩展到动态领域，实现了结构化动态对象的高保真建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动态建模方法（如可变形网格或3DGS）使用非结构化表示，无法同时建模合适的几何和关节运动；而基于基元的方法擅长结构化静态场景，但动态潜力未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何对结构化动态对象（如多部件装配体或关节机构）同时捕获几何和刚性运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将3DGS绑定到基元表面，利用各自在外观和几何上的优势；引入变形网络控制基元运动；设计自适应控制策略动态调整基元数量。
contributions: 首个将可微分基元扩展到动态域以实现结构化动态建模的框架
提出变形网络和自适应控制策略以精确匹配物体运动
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖基元类型的先验选择
复杂关节运动可能仍需进一步优化
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: D-Prism通过将可微分基元扩展到动态领域，实现了结构化动态对象的高保真建模。

papers.title: Understanding and Enforcing Weight Disentanglement in Task Arithmetic
papers.abstract: Task arithmetic provides an efficient, training-free way to edit pre-trained models, yet lacks a fundamental theoretical explanation for its success. The existing concept of ``weight disentanglement" describes the ideal outcome of non-interfering task composition but does not reveal its underlying cause. Crucially, what intrinsic properties of the pre-trained model ($θ_0$) or the task vectors ($τ_t$) enable this disentanglement remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce Task-Feature Specialization (TFS), a model's ability to allocate distinct internal features to different tasks, as the fundamental principle. We first prove that TFS is a sufficient condition for weight disentanglement. More importantly, we find that TFS also gives rise to an observable geometric consequence: weight vector orthogonality. This positions TFS as the common cause for both the desired functional outcome (disentanglement) and a measurable geometric property (orthogonality). This relationship provides the key insight for our method: since the abstract TFS property is intractable to enforce directly, we can instead promote weight disentanglement by shaping its concrete geometric consequence, orthogonality. Therefore, we propose OrthoReg, a simple and effective regularization method that actively enforces an internal orthogonal structure on weight updates ($ΔW$) that constitute $τ_t$ during fine-tuning. And we theoretically prove that OrthoReg promotes disentanglement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OrthoReg consistently and significantly enhances the performance of various task arithmetic methods. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/RL-MIND/OrthoReg}{https://github.com/RL-MIND/OrthoReg}.

analysis.tldr: 提出任务特征专门化（TFS）作为权重解缠的充分条件，并通过正交正则化（OrthoReg）提升任务算术性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 任务算术虽有效但缺乏理论解释，现有权重解缠概念未揭示其内在原因，需要理解预训练模型和任务向量的哪些属性决定解缠。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上解释并主动增强任务算术中的权重解缠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现TFS同时导致权重向量正交性和功能解缠，正交性是可观测的几何性质。
analysis.method: 提出OrthoReg正则化方法，在微调过程中对构成任务向量的权重更新施加正交结构，从而促进解缠。
contributions: 引入任务特征专门化（TFS）作为权重解缠的充分条件，并证明其导致正交性。
提出OrthoReg正则化方法，通过强制正交性提升任务算术性能，并提供理论证明。
analysis.experiments: 在多种任务算术方法上实验，OrthoReg一致且显著提升性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的预训练模型或任务。
正交正则化可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出任务特征专门化（TFS）作为权重解缠的充分条件，并通过正交正则化（OrthoReg）提升任务算术性能。

papers.title: StomaD2: An All-in-One System for Intelligent Stomatal Phenotype Analysis via Diffusion-Based Restoration Detection Network
papers.abstract: Stomata play a crucial role in regulating plant physiological processes and reflecting environmental responses. However, accurate and high-throughput stomatal phenotyping remains challenging, as conventional approaches rely on destructive sampling and manual annotation, restricting large-scale and field deployment. To overcome these limitations, a noninvasive restoration-detection integrated framework, termed StomaD2, is developed to achieve accurate and fast stomatal phenotyping under complex imaging conditions. The framework incorporates a diffusion-based restoration module to recover degraded images and a specialized rotated object detection network tailored to the small, dense, and cluttered characteristics of stomata. The proposed network enhances feature representation through three key innovations: a column-wise structure for global feature interaction, context-aware resampling and reweighting mechanism to improve multi-scale consistency, and a feature reassembly module to boost discrimination against complex backgrounds. In extensive comparisons, StomaD2 demonstrated state-of-the-art performance. On public Maize and Wheat datasets, it achieved accuracies of 0.994 and 0.992, respectively, significantly outperforming existing benchmarks. When benchmarked against ten other advanced models, including Oriented Former and YOLOv12, StomaD2 achieved a top-tier F1-score/mAP of 0.989. The framework is integrated into a user-friendly, field-operable system that supports the fast extraction of eight stomatal phenotypes, such as density and conductance. Validated on more than 130 plant species, StomaD2's results highlight its strong generalizability and potential for large-scale phenotyping, plant physiology analysis, and precision agriculture applications.

analysis.tldr: StomaD2 是一个基于扩散恢复和旋转目标检测的全集成气孔表型分析系统，在多个数据集上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统气孔表型分析依赖破坏性采样和人工标注，难以大规模和田间部署，亟需非侵入式、高精度的自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 在复杂成像条件下实现准确、快速、高通量的气孔表型分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 气孔具有小、密集、杂乱的特点，且成像条件复杂导致图像退化，现有方法难以兼顾恢复与检测。
analysis.method: 提出 StomaD2 框架，包含扩散基恢复模块和专用旋转目标检测网络，后者通过列式全局特征交互、上下文感知重采样与重加权、特征重组模块增强表示。
contributions: 首个集成扩散恢复与旋转检测的非侵入式气孔表型分析系统
提出三项创新模块提升小目标检测性能
在多个公开数据集和130+物种上验证了强泛化性，并集成到用户友好系统中
analysis.experiments: 在 Maize 和 Wheat 数据集上准确率分别达0.994和0.992，与10个先进模型（包括 Oriented Former 和 YOLOv12）对比取得最佳 F1-score/mAP 0.989。
limitations: 可能依赖特定成像条件，极端退化场景下恢复效果未知
系统虽支持八种表型，但未提及对更多表型的扩展性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: StomaD2 是一个基于扩散恢复和旋转目标检测的全集成气孔表型分析系统，在多个数据集上达到 SOTA。

papers.title: Comparison Drives Preference: Reference-Aware Modeling for AI-Generated Video Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of generative models has led to a growing volume of AI-generated videos, making the automatic quality assessment of such videos increasingly important. Existing AI-generated content video quality assessment (AIGC-VQA) methods typically estimate visual quality by analyzing each video independently, ignoring potential relationships among videos. In this work, we revisit AIGC-VQA from an inter-video perspective and formulate it as a reference-aware evaluation problem. Through this formulation, quality assessment is guided not only by intrinsic video characteristics but also by comparisons with related videos, which is more consistent with human perception. To validate its effectiveness, we propose Reference-aware Video Quality Assessment (RefVQA), which utilizes a query-centered reference graph to organize semantically related samples and performs graph-guided difference aggregation from the reference nodes to the query node. Experiments on existing datasets demonstrate that our proposed RefVQA outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple quality dimensions, with strong generalization ability validated by cross-dataset evaluation. These results highlight the effectiveness of the proposed reference-based formulation and suggest its potential to advance AIGC-VQA.

analysis.tldr: 提出参考感知视频质量评估方法，通过引入视频间比较关系提升AI生成视频质量评估性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AIGC-VQA方法独立评估每个视频，忽略了视频间的潜在关系，与人类感知不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视频间参考关系进行更符合人类感知的AI生成视频质量评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RefVQA，构建以查询为中心的参考图，组织语义相关样本，并通过图引导的差异聚合从参考节点到查询节点进行质量评估。
contributions: 从视频间视角重新审视AIGC-VQA，将其形式化为参考感知评估问题。
提出RefVQA方法，利用参考图进行图引导的差异聚合，提升评估性能。
analysis.experiments: 在现有数据集上，RefVQA在多个质量维度上优于现有方法，跨数据集评估验证了强泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖语义相关样本的获取，可能受限于参考图构建质量。
计算复杂度可能较高，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参考感知视频质量评估方法，通过引入视频间比较关系提升AI生成视频质量评估性能。

papers.title: Abstain-R1: Calibrated Abstention and Post-Refusal Clarification via Verifiable RL
papers.abstract: Reinforcement fine-tuning improves the reasoning ability of large language models, but it can also encourage them to answer unanswerable queries by guessing or hallucinating missing information. Existing abstention methods either train models to produce generic refusals or encourage follow-up clarifications without verifying whether those clarifications identify the key missing information. We study queries that are clear in meaning but cannot be reliably resolved from the given information, and argue that a reliable model should not only abstain, but also explain what is missing. We propose a clarification-aware RLVR reward that, while rewarding correct answers on answerable queries, jointly optimizes explicit abstention and semantically aligned post-refusal clarification on unanswerable queries. Using this reward, we train Abstain-R1, a 3B model that improves abstention and clarification on unanswerable queries while preserving strong performance on answerable ones. Experiments on Abstain-Test, Abstain-QA, and SelfAware show that Abstain-R1 substantially improves over its base model and achieves unanswerable-query behavior competitive with larger systems including DeepSeek-R1, suggesting that calibrated abstention and clarification can be learned through verifiable rewards rather than emerging from scale alone.

analysis.tldr: 通过可验证强化学习训练模型在不可回答查询上主动弃权并生成缺失信息澄清。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化微调提升了LLM推理能力，但也导致模型在不可回答查询上猜测或幻觉，现有弃权方法要么只生成通用拒绝，要么鼓励澄清但未验证澄清是否识别关键缺失信息。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在不可回答查询上既可靠弃权，又能解释缺失的关键信息，同时保持可回答查询的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强化微调可能鼓励模型对不可回答查询进行猜测或幻觉；现有弃权方法缺乏对澄清内容语义对齐的验证。
analysis.method: 提出澄清感知的RLVR奖励，在可回答查询上奖励正确答案，在不可回答查询上联合优化显式弃权和语义对齐的后拒绝澄清。
contributions: 提出一种可验证的强化学习奖励函数，同时优化弃权和澄清。
训练出Abstain-R1模型，在不可回答查询上达到与DeepSeek-R1等大型系统竞争的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Abstain-Test、Abstain-QA和SelfAware数据集上评估，Abstain-R1显著优于基座模型，并在不可回答查询行为上与更大系统竞争。
limitations: 仅针对含义清晰但信息不足的查询，未覆盖模糊或恶意查询。
3B模型规模，在更复杂场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可验证强化学习训练模型在不可回答查询上主动弃权并生成缺失信息澄清。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) Challenge Report
papers.abstract: This report presents the NTIRE 2026 Rip Current Detection and Segmentation (RipDetSeg) Challenge, which targets automatic rip current understanding in images. Rip currents are hazardous nearshore flows that cause many beach-related fatalities worldwide, yet remain difficult to identify because their visual appearance varies substantially across beaches, viewpoints, and sea states. To advance research on this safety-critical problem, the challenge builds on the RipVIS benchmark, evaluating both detection and segmentation. The dataset is diverse, sourced from more than $10$ countries, with $4$ camera orientations and diverse beach and sea conditions. This report describes the dataset, challenge protocol, evaluation methodology, final results, and summarizes the main insights from the submitted methods. The challenge attracted $159$ registered participants and produced $9$ valid test submissions across the two tasks. Final rankings are based on a composite score that combines $F_1[50]$, $F_2[50]$, $F_1[40\!:\!95]$, and $F_2[40\!:\!95]$. Most participant solutions relied on pretrained models, combined with strong augmentation and post-processing design. These results suggest that rip current understanding benefits strongly from the robust general-purpose vision models' progress, while leaving ample room for future methods tailored to their unique visual structure.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛报告：基于公开基准和多样化数据集，评估离岸流检测与分割方法，发现通用视觉模型结合强数据增强效果显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 离岸流是导致海滩死亡的主要危险因素，但其视觉外观随海滩、视角和海况变化极大，人工识别困难，亟需自动化方法提升安全预警能力。
analysis.problem: 在多样化真实场景下实现离岸流的准确检测与分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 参赛方案普遍依赖预训练通用视觉模型，结合强数据增强和后处理，表明通用模型的特征迁移能力对离岸流任务有效，但针对其独特视觉结构的定制方法仍有提升空间。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，基于RipVIS基准构建多国、多视角、多海况数据集，采用复合评分（F1[50]、F2[50]、F1[40:95]、F2[40:95]）评估检测与分割性能。
contributions: 发布了NTIRE 2026离岸流检测与分割挑战赛的完整报告，包括数据集、协议、评估方法和结果。
总结了参赛方案的共性技术（预训练模型+强增强+后处理），并指出未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 挑战赛吸引了159名注册参与者，提交了9个有效测试结果，基于复合评分进行排名。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及方法在极端海况或低光照条件下的表现。
数据集虽多样，但可能未覆盖所有地理区域和罕见离岸流类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026挑战赛报告：基于公开基准和多样化数据集，评估离岸流检测与分割方法，发现通用视觉模型结合强数据增强效果显著。

papers.title: BasketHAR: A Multimodal Dataset for Human Activity Recognition and Sport Analysis in Basketball Training Scenarios
papers.abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) involves the automatic identification of user activities and has gained significant research interest due to its broad applicability. Most HAR systems rely on supervised learning, which necessitates large, diverse, and well-annotated datasets. However, existing datasets predominantly focus on basic activities such as walking, standing, and stair navigation, limiting their utility in specialized contexts like sports performance analysis. To address this gap, we present BasketHAR, a novel multimodal HAR dataset tailored for basketball training, encompassing a diverse set of professional-level actions. BasketHAR includes comprehensive motion data from inertial measurement units (accelerometers and gyroscopes), angular velocity, magnetic field, heart rate, skin temperature, and synchronized video recordings. We also provide a baseline multimodal alignment method to benchmark performance. Experimental results underscore the dataset's complexity and suitability for advanced HAR tasks. Furthermore, we highlight its potential applications in the analysis of basketball training sessions and in the generation of specialized performance reports, representing a valuable resource for future research in HAR and sports analytics. The dataset are publicly accessible at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xian-Gao/BasketHAR licensed under Apache License 2.0.

analysis.tldr: BasketHAR 是一个面向篮球训练场景的多模态人体活动识别数据集，包含 IMU、视频等多模态数据，并提供了基线对齐方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 HAR 数据集多集中于日常活动（如行走、站立），缺乏针对专业运动场景（如篮球训练）的高质量、多模态数据集，限制了 HAR 在体育分析中的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含专业级篮球动作、多模态传感器数据且公开可用的 HAR 数据集，以支持复杂运动场景下的活动识别与性能分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析或失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建了包含 IMU（加速度计、陀螺仪）、角速度、磁场、心率、皮肤温度及同步视频的多模态数据集，并提供了一个多模态对齐基线方法用于性能基准测试。
contributions: 提出了 BasketHAR，首个面向篮球训练场景的多模态 HAR 数据集，包含专业级动作和多种传感器数据。
提供了基线多模态对齐方法，并公开数据集以促进 HAR 和体育分析研究。
analysis.experiments: 实验验证了数据集的复杂性和对高级 HAR 任务的适用性，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 数据集仅针对篮球训练场景，泛化到其他运动或日常活动的能力未知。
基线方法可能未充分挖掘多模态数据的潜力，需要更先进的对齐或融合策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BasketHAR 是一个面向篮球训练场景的多模态人体活动识别数据集，包含 IMU、视频等多模态数据，并提供了基线对齐方法。

papers.title: Motion-Guided Semantic Alignment with Negative Prompts for Zero-Shot Video Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Zero-shot action recognition is challenging due to the semantic gap between seen and unseen classes. We present a novel framework that enhances CLIP with disentangled embeddings and semantic-guided interaction. A Motion Separation Module (MSM) separates motion-sensitive and global-static features, while a Motion Aggregation Block (MAB) employs gated cross-attention to refine motion representation without re-coupling redundant information. To facilitate generalization to unseen categories, we enforce semantic alignment between video features and textual representations by aligning projected embeddings with positive textual prompts, while leveraging negative prompts to explicitly model "non-class" semantics. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms prior CLIP-based approaches, achieving robust zero-shot action recognition across both coarse and fine-grained datasets.

analysis.tldr: 通过解耦运动特征和负提示语义对齐，提升CLIP在零样本视频动作识别中的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本动作识别面临可见与不可见类别之间的语义鸿沟，现有CLIP方法未能有效分离运动与静态信息，且缺乏对非目标语义的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 如何增强CLIP对视频中运动信息的表征能力，并利用正负提示实现更精确的语义对齐，以提升零样本动作识别性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Motion Separation Module (MSM)分离运动敏感与全局静态特征，Motion Aggregation Block (MAB)通过门控交叉注意力精炼运动表示，并利用正负文本提示进行语义对齐。
contributions: 提出运动分离与聚合模块，解耦运动与静态特征并避免冗余信息。
引入负提示显式建模非目标语义，增强零样本泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个粗粒度和细粒度数据集上，方法一致优于先前基于CLIP的方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练CLIP的质量，对极端运动模糊场景鲁棒性未知。
负提示的设计可能需人工先验，自动生成策略未探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过解耦运动特征和负提示语义对齐，提升CLIP在零样本视频动作识别中的泛化能力。
