papers.title: RLM-on-KG: Heuristics First, LLMs When Needed: Adaptive Retrieval Control over Mention Graphs for Scattered Evidence
papers.abstract: When does an LLM controller outperform rule-based traversal for knowledge graph exploration? We study this question through RLM-on-KG, a retrieval system that treats an LLM as an autonomous navigator over an RDF-encoded mention graph for grounded question answering. Unlike GraphRAG pipelines that rely on offline LLM indexing, RLM-on-KG performs entity-first, multi-hop exploration at query time using deterministic graph construction and a fixed tool set. Our central finding is a conditional advantage: the value of LLM control depends on evidence scatter and tool-calling sophistication. The paper's core claim is LLM control versus heuristic traversal, not a generic win over GraphRAG. On GraphRAG-Bench Novel (519 questions), Gemini 2.0 Flash achieves +2.47 pp F1 over a rule-based heuristic baseline (p < 0.0001), but only +0.16 pp over a GraphRAG-local variant (not significant). With a stronger controller, Claude Haiku 4.5, the gain over heuristic grows to +4.37 pp (p < 0.001) and extends to a +2.42 pp significant improvement over GraphRAG-local (p < 0.001). The gain is largest when gold evidence is scattered across 6-10 chunks (+3.21 pp) and smallest for concentrated evidence (+1.85 pp). Cross-scale validation on MuSiQue confirms that the LLM-over-heuristic advantage transfers, with expected attenuation on smaller per-question graphs. The core architectural insight is the separation of candidate discovery from ranking: the LLM adds value through exploration breadth, while final evidence selection is best handled by pure vector re-ranking. Beyond retrieval, exploration traces provide a proposed stress-test harness for structured data quality, yielding diagnostics for coverage, connectivity, provenance, and queryability.

analysis.tldr: 提出RLM-on-KG，一种在知识图谱检索中自适应切换启发式遍历与LLM控制的方法，发现LLM的优势取决于证据分散程度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GraphRAG依赖离线LLM索引，成本高且灵活性不足；而纯规则遍历在复杂查询中可能遗漏分散证据。需要一种能根据证据分散程度自适应选择检索策略的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个检索系统，在知识图谱问答中根据证据分散程度动态决定使用启发式遍历还是LLM控制，以平衡效率与准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM控制相对于启发式遍历的优势并非普遍存在，而是有条件依赖：当证据分散（如6-10个块）时增益最大（+3.21 pp），证据集中时增益较小（+1.85 pp）；且LLM的控制能力（如Claude Haiku 4.5 vs Gemini 2.0 Flash）影响增益大小。
analysis.method: RLM-on-KG：在查询时进行实体优先的多跳探索，使用确定性图构建和固定工具集；将候选发现与排序分离，LLM负责探索广度，最终证据选择由纯向量重排序完成。
contributions: 揭示了LLM控制与启发式遍历的条件性优势，即LLM的价值取决于证据分散度和工具调用复杂度。
提出了候选发现与排序分离的架构，LLM仅用于探索广度，排序由向量重排序完成。
在GraphRAG-Bench Novel和MuSiQue上验证了方法，并提供了结构化数据质量的压力测试框架。
analysis.experiments: 在GraphRAG-Bench Novel（519个问题）上，Gemini 2.0 Flash比规则基线F1高2.47个百分点（p<0.0001），但比GraphRAG-local仅高0.16（不显著）；Claude Haiku 4.5比基线高4.37（p<0.001），比GraphRAG-local高2.42（p<0.001）。在MuSiQue上跨规模验证了优势转移。
limitations: 仅对比了启发式基线和GraphRAG-local，未与更多先进方法比较。
LLM控制增益在证据集中时较小，可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RLM-on-KG，一种在知识图谱检索中自适应切换启发式遍历与LLM控制的方法，发现LLM的优势取决于证据分散程度。

papers.title: mEOL: Training-Free Instruction-Guided Multimodal Embedder for Vector Graphics and Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVGs) function both as visual images and as structured code that encode rich geometric and layout information, yet most methods rasterize them and discard this symbolic organization. At the same time, recent sentence embedding methods produce strong text representations but do not naturally extend to visual or structured modalities. We propose a training-free, instruction-guided multimodal embedding framework that uses a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to map text, raster images, and SVG code into an aligned embedding space. We control the direction of embeddings through modality-specific instructions and structural SVG cues, eliminating the need for learned projection heads or contrastive training. Our method has two key components: (1) Multimodal Explicit One-word Limitation (mEOL), which instructs the MLLM to summarize any multimodal input into a single token whose hidden state serves as a compact semantic embedding. (2) A semantic SVG rewriting module that assigns meaningful identifiers and simplifies nested SVG elements through visual reasoning over the rendered image, exposing geometric and relational cues hidden in raw code. Using a repurposed VGBench, we build the first text-to-SVG retrieval benchmark and show that our training-free embeddings outperform encoder-based and training-based multimodal baselines. These results highlight prompt-level control as an effective alternative to parameter-level training for structure-aware multimodal retrieval. Project page: https://scene-the-ella.github.io/meol/

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练、指令引导的多模态嵌入框架mEOL，利用MLLM将文本、光栅图像和SVG代码对齐到统一嵌入空间，在首个文本-SVG检索基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: SVG兼具视觉图像和结构化代码特性，但现有方法通常将其光栅化而丢弃符号信息；同时句子嵌入方法难以扩展到视觉或结构化模态，亟需一种无需训练的对齐方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，将文本、光栅图像和SVG代码映射到统一的语义嵌入空间，并实现结构感知的多模态检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出mEOL框架，包含两个关键组件：(1) Multimodal Explicit One-word Limitation (mEOL)，通过指令让MLLM将多模态输入总结为单个token，其隐藏状态作为紧凑语义嵌入；(2) 语义SVG重写模块，通过视觉推理为SVG元素分配有意义的标识符并简化嵌套结构，暴露隐藏的几何和关系线索。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练、指令引导的多模态嵌入框架mEOL，实现文本、光栅图像和SVG的对齐嵌入。
构建首个文本-SVG检索基准，并证明mEOL在无需训练的情况下优于基于编码器和基于训练的多模态基线。
analysis.experiments: 在基于VGBench改造的文本-SVG检索基准上评估，mEOL在无需训练的情况下优于基于编码器和基于训练的多模态基线。
limitations: 依赖MLLM的生成质量，可能受限于模型能力。
仅针对SVG模态，泛化到其他结构化模态需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练、指令引导的多模态嵌入框架mEOL，利用MLLM将文本、光栅图像和SVG代码对齐到统一嵌入空间，在首个文本-SVG检索基准上超越现有方法。

papers.title: OASIS: On-Demand Hierarchical Event Memory for Streaming Video Reasoning
papers.abstract: Streaming video reasoning requires models to operate in a setting where history grows without bound while meaningful evidence remains scarce. In such a landscape, relevant signal is like an oasis-small, critical, and easily lost in a desert of redundancy. Enlarging memory only widens the desert; aggressive compression dries up the oasis. The real difficulty lies in discovering where to look, not how much to remember. We therefore introduce OASIS, a novel framework for streaming video reasoning that tackles this challenge through structured, on-demand retrieval. It organizes streaming history into hierarchical events and performs reasoning as controlled refinement-short-context inference first, followed by semantically grounded retrieval only when uncertainty arises. As the retrieval is driven by high-level intent rather than embedding similarity, the retrieved memory is substantially more accurate and less noisy. Additionally, the mechanism is plug-and-play, training-free, and readily attaches to different streaming MLLM backbones. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and backbones show that OASIS achieves strong gains in long-horizon accuracy and compositional reasoning with bounded token cost and low request delay. Code is available at https://github.com/Solus-sano/OASIS.

analysis.tldr: 提出OASIS框架，通过按需分层事件检索实现流式视频推理，在长时准确性和组合推理上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式视频推理中历史数据无限增长，但有效证据稀疏，现有方法要么扩大内存导致冗余，要么激进压缩丢失关键信息，亟需一种能精准定位相关记忆的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在流式视频推理中高效、准确地从无限增长的历史中检索稀疏但关键的事件信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，扩大内存会引入更多冗余，而激进压缩会丢失关键信号；基于嵌入相似度的检索噪声大、不准确。
analysis.method: OASIS框架：将流式历史组织为分层事件，先进行短上下文推理，仅在不确定性出现时基于高层意图进行语义检索，无需训练即可即插即用。
contributions: 提出分层事件记忆结构和按需检索机制，实现高效准确的流式视频推理
方法无需训练、即插即用，可适配多种流式MLLM骨干网络
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和骨干网络上进行实验，OASIS在长时准确性和组合推理上取得显著提升，同时保持有界的token成本和低请求延迟。
limitations: 可能依赖事件分层的质量，复杂场景下事件边界定义困难
仅针对流式视频推理，未验证在其他模态或离线场景的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OASIS框架，通过按需分层事件检索实现流式视频推理，在长时准确性和组合推理上取得显著提升。

papers.title: Efficient Task Adaptation in Large Language Models via Selective Parameter Optimization
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated excellent performance in general language understanding, generation and other tasks. However, when fine-tuning for specific domain tasks, the general knowledge accumulated in the pre-training phase is often partially overwritten or forgotten due to parameter updates, which severely limits the generalization ability and transferability of LLMs. Traditional fine-tuning strategies mostly train on the entire parameter space, ignoring the heterogeneity of model parameters, that is, some parameters are extremely important for general tasks, while other parameters are more sensitive to specific tasks. To alleviate the above problems, this paper innovatively proposes a parameter element importance evaluation method, which divides parameters into "core parameters" and "non-core parameters" by distinguishing the importance of parameters for general language ability tasks and specific domain tasks, and fixes the core parameters during fine-tuning, and only fine-tunes the non-core parameters. Extensive experiments on scientific, medical and physical tasks using GPT-J and LLaMA-3 show that our method can mitigate catastrophic forgetting while enhancing the adaptability of the model.

analysis.tldr: 提出通过区分核心与非核心参数并仅微调非核心参数的方法，缓解LLM微调中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在领域微调时，全参数更新会覆盖预训练的通用知识，导致灾难性遗忘，限制了模型的泛化与迁移能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持LLM通用能力的同时，高效适应特定领域任务，避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统全参数微调忽略了参数异质性：部分参数对通用任务至关重要，而其他参数对特定任务更敏感。
analysis.method: 提出参数元素重要性评估方法，将参数分为核心参数（对通用任务重要）和非核心参数（对特定任务敏感），微调时固定核心参数，仅更新非核心参数。
contributions: 提出一种参数重要性评估方法，区分核心与非核心参数。
通过固定核心参数、微调非核心参数，在缓解灾难性遗忘的同时提升领域适应性。
analysis.experiments: 在科学、医学和物理任务上使用GPT-J和LLaMA-3进行实验，表明方法能缓解灾难性遗忘并增强模型适应性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 参数重要性评估的计算开销可能较大。
核心参数的定义可能依赖特定任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通过区分核心与非核心参数并仅微调非核心参数的方法，缓解LLM微调中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: A Real-Time Bike-Pedestrian Safety System with Wide-Angle Perception and Evaluation Testbed for Urban Intersections
papers.abstract: Collisions between cyclists and pedestrians at urban intersections remain a persistent source of injuries, yet few systems attempt real-time warnings to unequipped road users using commodity hardware. We present a prototype collision warning system that runs on a single edge device with a wide-angle fisheye camera, producing audible and visual alerts at 30\,fps. The system makes four contributions. First, we develop a calibration pipeline for ultra-wide fisheye lenses that overcomes corner-detection failure and optimizer divergence through perspective remapping and direct bundle adjustment. Second, we combine fisheye-aware object detection with a closed-form ground-plane projection via a precomputed lookup table. Third, we introduce a design-time conformance simulation with 24 scripted hazard scenarios, stochastic size-aware detection failures, and a latency sweep showing that a first-order kinematic predictor maintains the mean warning budget above the distracted-pedestrian reaction time across realistic camera latencies. Fourth, we formalize the decision layer as a separable, auditable testbench with explicit deployment gates, contestability mechanisms, and a residual risk register. Under conformance testing with fisheye localization error, the selected pipeline configuration achieves 93.3\% sensitivity and 92.3\% specificity, with a mean warning budget of 3.3\,s. The system design was informed by community-aided design workshops. Code and replication scripts are available at https://github.com/mkturkcan/bikeped.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于单边缘设备和鱼眼摄像头的实时自行车-行人碰撞预警系统，在30fps下实现93.3%灵敏度和92.3%特异性。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市交叉口自行车与行人碰撞事故频发，但现有系统很少使用商用硬件为未装备道路使用者提供实时预警。
analysis.problem: 如何在低成本边缘设备上利用广角鱼眼摄像头实现实时、准确的碰撞预警，并保证系统可审计和可测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发了超广角鱼眼镜头标定流程，结合鱼眼感知目标检测与预计算查找表的闭式地平面投影，引入设计时一致性仿真（含24种脚本化危险场景和随机尺寸感知检测失败），并将决策层形式化为可分离、可审计的测试平台。
contributions: 提出针对超广角鱼眼镜头的标定流程，通过透视重映射和直接光束法平差解决角点检测失败和优化器发散问题。
结合鱼眼感知目标检测与预计算查找表的闭式地平面投影，实现实时预警。
引入设计时一致性仿真，包含24种脚本化危险场景和随机尺寸感知检测失败，并验证一阶运动学预测器在典型相机延迟下维持平均预警预算高于分心行人反应时间。
形式化决策层为可分离、可审计的测试平台，包含显式部署门控、可争议机制和残余风险登记册。
analysis.experiments: 在一致性测试中，使用鱼眼定位误差，所选管道配置达到93.3%灵敏度和92.3%特异性，平均预警预算为3.3秒。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境中进行一致性测试，缺乏真实世界部署验证。
系统依赖单一鱼眼摄像头，可能受遮挡和光照条件影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于单边缘设备和鱼眼摄像头的实时自行车-行人碰撞预警系统，在30fps下实现93.3%灵敏度和92.3%特异性。

papers.title: SIF: Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints for Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: The public accessibility of large vision-language models (LVLMs) raises serious concerns about unauthorized model reuse and intellectual property infringement. Existing ownership verification methods often rely on semantically abnormal queries or out-of-distribution responses as fingerprints, which can be easily detected and removed by adversaries. We expose this vulnerability through a Semantic Divergence Attack (SDA), which identifies and filters fingerprint queries by measuring semantic divergence between a suspect model and a reference model, showing that existing fingerprints are not semantic-preserving and are therefore easy to detect and bypass. To address these limitations, we propose SIF (Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints), a non-intrusive ownership verification framework that requires no parameter modification. SIF introduces Semantic-Aligned Fingerprint Distillation (SAFD), which transfers text watermarking signals into the visual modality to produce semantically coherent yet fingerprinted responses. In addition, Robust-Fingerprint Optimization (RFO) enhances robustness by simulating worst-case representation perturbations, making the fingerprints resilient to model modifications such as fine-tuning and quantization. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen2.5-VL demonstrate that SIF achieves strong stealthiness and robustness, providing a practical solution for LVLM copyright protection. Code is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SIF-VLM-Fingerprint

analysis.tldr: 提出语义分布内指纹SIF，通过视觉模态传递水印信号，实现大视觉语言模型的隐蔽版权验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的公开访问引发未经授权复用和知识产权侵权问题，现有指纹方法依赖语义异常查询或分布外响应，易被攻击者检测并移除。
analysis.problem: 现有LVLM所有权验证指纹不具语义保持性，易被语义发散攻击（SDA）识别和绕过。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有指纹方法产生的响应与正常响应存在语义发散，攻击者可通过测量语义差异检测并过滤指纹查询。
analysis.method: 提出SIF框架，包含语义对齐指纹蒸馏（SAFD）将文本水印信号转移到视觉模态以生成语义连贯的指纹响应，以及鲁棒指纹优化（RFO）通过模拟最坏情况表示扰动增强对微调、量化等模型修改的鲁棒性。
contributions: 揭示现有LVLM指纹的语义发散漏洞并提出语义发散攻击（SDA）。
提出SIF框架，实现非侵入式、语义保持且鲁棒的版权验证。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-1.5和Qwen2.5-VL上实验，SIF在隐蔽性和鲁棒性上表现优异。
limitations: 可能依赖参考模型的选择，影响攻击检测效果。
未讨论对大规模模型或不同架构的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义分布内指纹SIF，通过视觉模态传递水印信号，实现大视觉语言模型的隐蔽版权验证。

papers.title: Where is the Mind? Persona Vectors and LLM Individuation
papers.abstract: The individuation problem for large language models asks which entities associated with them, if any, should be identified as minds. We approach this problem through mechanistic interpretability, engaging in particular with recent empirical work on persona vectors, persona space, and emergent misalignment. We argue that three views are the strongest candidates: the virtual instance view and two new views we introduce, the (virtual) instance-persona view and the model-persona view. First, we argue for the virtual instance view on the grounds that attention streams sustain quasi-psychological connections across token-time. Then we present the persona literature, organised around three hypotheses about the internal structure underlying personas in LLMs, and show that the two persona-based views are promising alternatives.

analysis.tldr: 通过机制可解释性分析LLM中的角色向量，探讨哪些实体应被视为心智。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的个性化问题（individuation）是理解其心智归属的关键，但现有研究缺乏对角色向量内部结构的深入分析。
analysis.problem: 确定与LLM相关的哪些实体（如角色向量）应被视为心智。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但讨论了角色向量、角色空间和新兴错位等概念。
analysis.method: 通过机制可解释性分析角色向量，提出虚拟实例视图、实例-角色视图和模型-角色视图三种候选方案。
contributions: 引入两种新的心智归属视图：实例-角色视图和模型-角色视图。
基于注意力流在token时间上维持准心理连接，论证虚拟实例视图的合理性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证验证，仅基于理论分析。
角色向量的内部结构假设可能不完整。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过机制可解释性分析LLM中的角色向量，探讨哪些实体应被视为心智。

papers.title: Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition for Interpretable Multimodal Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Neurobiological and neurodegenerative diseases are inherently multifactorial, arising from coupled influences spanning genetic susceptibility, brain alterations, and environmental and behavioral factors. Multimodal modeling has therefore been increasingly adopted for disease diagnosis by integrating complementary evidence across data sources. However, in both large-scale cohorts and real-world clinical workflows, modality coverage is often incomplete, making many multimodal models brittle when one or more modalities are unavailable. Existing approaches to incomplete multimodal diagnosis typically rely on group-wise or static priors, which may fail to capture subject-specific cross-modal dependencies; moreover, many models provide limited interpretability into which evidence sources drive the final decision. To address these limitations, we propose Conditional Evidence Reconstruction and Decomposition (CERD), a framework for interpretable multimodal diagnosis with incomplete modalities. CERD first reconstructs missing modality representations conditioned on each subject's observed inputs, then decomposes diagnostic evidence into shared cross-modal corroboration and modality-specific cues via logit-level attribution. Experiments on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) demonstrate that CERD outperforms competitive baselines under incomplete-modality settings while producing structured and clinically aligned evidence attributions for trustworthy decision support.

analysis.tldr: 提出条件证据重建与分解框架，在不完整多模态数据下实现可解释诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经退行性疾病病因复杂，多模态建模可整合互补证据，但实际中模态覆盖常不完整，现有方法依赖群体先验且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 不完整多模态诊断中，如何重建缺失模态并分解诊断证据以提升准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 条件证据重建与分解（CERD）：先基于观测输入条件重建缺失模态表示，再通过logit级归因将诊断证据分解为共享跨模态证实和模态特定线索。
contributions: 提出CERD框架，在不完整模态下实现多模态诊断。
通过条件重建和证据分解提升可解释性，产生临床对齐的证据归因。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI数据集上，CERD在不完整模态设置下优于竞争基线，并产生结构化、临床对齐的证据归因。
limitations: 可能依赖特定疾病领域（阿尔茨海默病），泛化性待验证。
重建质量可能影响下游诊断性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出条件证据重建与分解框架，在不完整多模态数据下实现可解释诊断。

papers.title: IMA-MoE: An Interpretable Modality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts Framework for Characterizing the Neurobiological Signatures of Binge Eating Disorder
papers.abstract: Binge eating disorder (BED) is the most prevalent eating disorder. However, current diagnostic frameworks remain largely grounded in symptom-based criteria rather than underlying biological mechanisms, thereby limiting early detection and the development of biologically-informed interventions. Emerging studies have begun to investigate the neurobiological signatures of BED, yet their findings are often difficult to generalize due to the reliance on hypothesis-driven parametric models, single-modality analyses, and limited data diversity. Therefore, there is a critical need for advanced data-driven frameworks capable of modeling multimodal data to uncover generalizable and biologically meaningful signatures of BED. In this study, we propose the Interpretable Modality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (IMA-MoE), a novel architecture designed to integrate heterogeneous neuroimaging, behavioral, hormonal, and demographic measures within a unified predictive framework. By encoding each measure as a distinct token, IMA-MoE enables flexible modeling of cross-modal dependencies while preserving modality-specific characteristics. We further introduce a token-importance mechanism to enhance interpretability by quantifying the contribution of each measure to model predictions. Evaluated on the large-scale Adolescent Brain Cognitive Development (ABCD) dataset, IMA-MoE demonstrates superior performance in differentiating BED from healthy controls compared with baseline methods, while revealing sex-specific predictive patterns, with hormonal measures contributing more prominently to prediction in females. Collectively, these findings highlight the promise of interpretable, data-driven multimodal modeling in advancing biologically-informed characterization of BED and facilitating more precise and personalized interventions in neuropsychiatric disorders.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释的多模态专家混合模型（IMA-MoE），在ABCD数据集上识别暴食症的神经生物学标志，并发现性别特异性预测模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 暴食症（BED）诊断依赖症状而非生物机制，现有研究因假设驱动、单模态分析等局限难以泛化，亟需数据驱动的多模态框架。
analysis.problem: 如何整合异质多模态数据（神经影像、行为、激素、人口学）以发现可泛化的BED神经生物学标志，并保持模型可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IMA-MoE架构，将每个测量指标编码为独立token，通过混合专家模型建模跨模态依赖，并引入token重要性机制量化各指标对预测的贡献。
contributions: 提出IMA-MoE，一种可解释的多模态专家混合框架，用于整合异质数据并保持模态特异性。
在ABCD大规模数据集上验证了优于基线方法的BED分类性能，并揭示了性别特异性预测模式（激素指标对女性预测贡献更大）。
analysis.experiments: 在ABCD数据集上评估，与基线方法比较，展示了BED分类的优越性能及性别特异性模式。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定数据集（ABCD），泛化性需进一步验证。
token重要性机制的解释力可能受限于专家数量或模态交互复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释的多模态专家混合模型（IMA-MoE），在ABCD数据集上识别暴食症的神经生物学标志，并发现性别特异性预测模式。

papers.title: Harness as an Asset: Enforcing Determinism via the Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF)
papers.abstract: Large Language Models produce a controllability gap in safety-critical engineering: even low rates of undetected constraint violations render a system undeployable. Current orchestration paradigms suffer from sycophantic compliance, context attention decay, and stochastic oscillation during self-correction. We introduce the Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF), which transitions agentic workflows from open-loop generation to closed-loop fail-safe determinism via three pillars: (1) Recursive Atomic Decomposition with physical context firewalls; (2) Harness as an Asset, formalizing domain invariants into machine-readable registries enforced by a deterministic Unified Assertion Interface; and (3) Structured Semantic Gradients with State Locking for monotonic non-regression. This paper makes two core claims. First, an industrialization thesis: once domain invariants are formalized as an executable Harness, the Harness itself becomes a first-class enterprise asset that compounds in value as foundation models commoditize, and CAAF's ability to deliver its reliability on commodity-tier models makes fully self-hosted, on-premises deployment architecturally feasible for regulated sectors where cloud APIs are not an option. Second, an architectural claim supported by ablation: CAAF's three pillars address complementary failure surfaces and none alone closes the controllability gap at commodity cost. The paper contributes entirely at the orchestration and industrialization layer. Evidence across two complementary benchmarks, three-tier UAI ablations, multi-agent baselines, and a closed-source commodity family replicated by two independent open-weight families, is reported in the body.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAAF框架，通过确定性断言接口和递归分解实现LLM在安全关键工程中的可控性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在安全关键工程中存在可控性差距，即使低概率的约束违反也会导致系统不可部署，现有编排范式存在谄媚遵从、上下文注意力衰减和自校正随机振荡等问题。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在安全关键工程中的可控性差距，确保系统行为满足领域约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前编排范式的三个失败模式：谄媚遵从、上下文注意力衰减和自校正随机振荡。
analysis.method: 提出CAAF框架，包含三个支柱：递归原子分解（带物理上下文防火墙）、断言即资产（将领域不变量形式化为机器可读注册表并通过确定性统一断言接口执行）、结构化语义梯度与状态锁定（实现单调非回归）。
contributions: 提出工业化论点：领域不变量形式化为可执行断言后，断言本身成为一级企业资产，随基础模型商品化而增值。
通过消融实验证明三个支柱互补，单独无法以商品成本闭合可控性差距。
analysis.experiments: 在两个互补基准、三层次UAI消融、多智能体基线以及两个独立开源权重家族复现的闭源商品模型家族上进行评估。
limitations: 可能依赖领域不变量的人工形式化，自动化程度有限。
在极端复杂或动态变化的领域约束下，断言维护成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAAF框架，通过确定性断言接口和递归分解实现LLM在安全关键工程中的可控性。

papers.title: CAM3DNet: Comprehensively mining the multi-scale features for 3D Object Detection with Multi-View Cameras
papers.abstract: Query-based 3D object detection methods using multi-view images often struggle to efficiently leverage dynamic multi-scale information, e.g., the relationship between the object features and the geometric of the queries are not sufficiently learned, directly exploring the multi-scale spatiotemporal features will pay too many costs. To address these challenges, we propose CAM3DNet, a novel sparse query-based framework which combines three new modules, composite query (CQ), adaptive self-attention (ASA), and multi-scale hybrid sampling (MSHS). First, the core idea in the CQ module is a multi-scale projection strategy to transform 2D queries into 3D space. Second, the ASA module learns the interactions between the spatiotemporal multi-scale queries. Third, the MSHS module uses the deformable attention mechanism to sample multi-scale object information by considering multi-scales queries, pyramid feature maps, and 2D-camera prior knowledge. The entire model employs a backbone network and a feature pyramid network (FPN) as the encoder, then introduces a YOLOX and a DepthNet as a ROI\_Head to produce CQ, and repeatedly utilizes ASA and MSHS as the decoder to gain detection features. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes, Waymo, and Argoverse benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our CAM3DNet, and most existing camera-based 3D object detection methods are outperformed. Besides, we make comprehensive ablation studies to check the individual effect of CQ, ASA, and MSHS, as well as their cost of space and computation complexity.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAM3DNet，通过复合查询、自适应自注意力和多尺度混合采样模块，高效利用多尺度特征提升多视图相机3D目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于查询的多视图3D目标检测方法难以高效利用动态多尺度信息，例如对象特征与查询几何关系学习不充分，直接探索多尺度时空特征成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地融合多尺度时空特征并降低计算成本，以提升多视图相机3D目标检测的精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CAM3DNet框架，包含三个新模块：复合查询（CQ）模块通过多尺度投影策略将2D查询变换到3D空间；自适应自注意力（ASA）模块学习时空多尺度查询间的交互；多尺度混合采样（MSHS）模块利用可变形注意力机制，结合多尺度查询、金字塔特征图和2D相机先验知识采样多尺度对象信息。整体采用骨干网络和FPN作为编码器，YOLOX和DepthNet作为ROI_Head生成CQ，重复使用ASA和MSHS作为解码器。
contributions: 提出复合查询（CQ）模块，实现2D到3D的多尺度投影。
设计自适应自注意力（ASA）模块，建模时空多尺度查询交互。
提出多尺度混合采样（MSHS）模块，高效采样多尺度对象信息。
在nuScenes、Waymo和Argoverse基准上超越多数现有方法，并进行了全面的消融研究。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes、Waymo和Argoverse数据集上进行实验，结果表明CAM3DNet优于大多数现有基于相机的3D目标检测方法，并进行了消融研究分析各模块效果及空间计算复杂度。
limitations: 可能对计算资源要求较高，尽管有复杂度分析但未与轻量方法对比。
依赖多视图相机设置，不适用于单目或激光雷达场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAM3DNet，通过复合查询、自适应自注意力和多尺度混合采样模块，高效利用多尺度特征提升多视图相机3D目标检测性能。

papers.title: The Instrumental Dissolution of Typing: Why AI Challenges the Keyboard Era in Knowledge Work
papers.abstract: For four decades, the QWERTY keyboard organized white-collar knowledge work. Typing's dominance was instrumental, not cognitively necessary. As multimodal AI achieves human-parity understanding of speech and gesture, this necessity dissolves. We introduce instrumental dissolution -- loss of institutional-default status while persisting in specialist niches. The keyboard era ends not through hardware replacement but through migration of its function into AI systems. The central contribution identifies the verification bottleneck: as AI collapses production friction, the primary constraint shifts from generation to evaluation. Knowledge workers become adversarial auditors rather than keystroke-producers. This restructures professional expertise, organizational communication, and how productive labor is recognized. Converging evidence from history, philosophy, neuroscience, technology, organizational studies, and cultural analysis supports this thesis. We map synthetic literacy -- oral input generating literate output -- as the defining feature of this transition. Under three scenarios (optimistic: 2028-2035; base: 2035-2045; pessimistic: 2045-2060), we specify disconfirmation criteria that would weaken the thesis if observed. We propose seven interface primitives operationalizing verification-centered HCI.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出AI将导致键盘在知识工作中的主导地位被“工具性消解”，核心瓶颈从生产转向验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 键盘作为知识工作的核心工具已主导四十年，但多模态AI在语音和手势理解上达到人类水平，使得键盘的统治地位不再必要，需要重新审视人机交互的未来。
analysis.problem: 探讨AI如何通过工具性消解（instrumental dissolution）终结键盘时代，以及知识工作从生成转向验证的范式转变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但提出键盘的统治是工具性而非认知必需的，AI的进步使其必要性消失。
analysis.method: 通过跨学科分析（历史、哲学、神经科学、技术、组织研究、文化分析）提出工具性消解概念，并定义合成素养（synthetic literacy）和验证瓶颈（verification bottleneck），给出三种未来场景及否定标准。
contributions: 提出工具性消解概念，解释键盘如何失去制度默认地位而仅存于专业领域。
识别验证瓶颈：AI降低生产摩擦后，主要约束从生成转向评估，知识工作者成为对抗性审计者。
定义合成素养（语音输入生成文字输出）作为过渡特征，并给出七种以验证为中心的界面原语。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论文为理论性论述，缺乏实证数据支持。
场景预测（2028-2060）跨度大，不确定性高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出AI将导致键盘在知识工作中的主导地位被“工具性消解”，核心瓶颈从生产转向验证。

papers.title: Beyond Black-Box Labels: Interpretable Criteria for Diagnosing Subjective NLP Tasks
papers.abstract: Subjective NLP datasets typically aggregate annotator judgments into a single gold label, making it difficult to diagnose whether disagreement reflects unclear criteria, collapsed distinctions, or legitimate plurality. We propose a \emph{schema-level diagnostic} for auditing expert-designed annotation schemas \emph{prior to} gold-label commitment, using only multi-annotator criterion judgments. The diagnostic separates two failure modes: unstable criteria with hard-to-operationalize boundaries, and systematic overlap that blurs the boundaries between mutually exclusive categories. Applied to persuasive value extraction in commercial documents, we find that disagreement is not diffuse: instability concentrates in a few criteria, while nearly half of covered sentences activate multiple categories. These signals align with where domain experts disagree, yielding an evidence-based audit for tightening guidelines, revising category structure, or reconsidering the annotation paradigm.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在聚合金标签前诊断主观NLP任务标注模式缺陷的方法，分离不稳定标准和系统重叠两种失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 主观NLP任务中，聚合标注者判断为单一金标签会掩盖分歧来源（如标准不清晰、类别重叠或合理多元性），导致难以诊断标注模式的质量。
analysis.problem: 如何在提交金标签之前，利用多标注者标准判断来审计专家设计的标注模式，识别并区分不稳定标准和系统重叠两类问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出分歧并非分散：不稳定性集中在少数标准，近一半覆盖句子激活多个类别。
analysis.method: 提出一种模式级诊断方法，利用多标注者的标准判断，在聚合金标签前审计标注模式，分离不稳定标准和系统重叠两种失败模式。
contributions: 提出一种在聚合金标签前诊断主观NLP任务标注模式缺陷的方法
在商业文档说服价值提取任务中验证了方法，发现分歧集中在少数标准且存在大量类别重叠
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及应用于商业文档说服价值提取任务，并观察到分歧集中和类别重叠现象。
limitations: 方法依赖多标注者标准判断，可能不适用于单标注者场景
仅针对说服价值提取任务验证，泛化性待检验
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在聚合金标签前诊断主观NLP任务标注模式缺陷的方法，分离不稳定标准和系统重叠两种失败模式。

papers.title: LIVE: Leveraging Image Manipulation Priors for Instruction-based Video Editing
papers.abstract: Video editing aims to modify input videos according to user intent. Recently, end-to-end training methods have garnered widespread attention, constructing paired video editing data through video generation or editing models. However, compared to image editing, the high annotation costs of video data severely constrain the scale, quality, and task diversity of video editing datasets when relying on video generative models or manual annotation. To bridge this gap, we propose LIVE, a joint training framework that leverages large-scale, high-quality image editing data alongside video datasets to bolster editing capabilities. To mitigate the domain discrepancy between static images and dynamic videos, we introduce a frame-wise token noise strategy, which treats the latents of specific frames as reasoning tokens, leveraging large pretrained video generative models to create plausible temporal transformations. Moreover, through cleaning public datasets and constructing an automated data pipeline, we adopt a two-stage training strategy to anneal video editing capabilities. Furthermore, we curate a comprehensive evaluation benchmark encompassing over 60 challenging tasks that are prevalent in image editing but scarce in existing video datasets. Extensive comparative and ablation experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The source code will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出LIVE框架，利用图像编辑先验增强指令视频编辑，通过帧级token噪声策略弥合图像与视频域差异，在60+任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频编辑数据标注成本高，导致数据集规模、质量和任务多样性受限，而图像编辑数据丰富且廉价，如何利用图像先验提升视频编辑能力是核心痛点。
analysis.problem: 现有视频编辑方法依赖昂贵的视频数据标注，数据集规模小、任务覆盖有限，且图像与视频之间存在域差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LIVE联合训练框架，引入帧级token噪声策略（将特定帧的隐变量视为推理token，利用预训练视频生成模型生成合理时间变换），并通过清洗公开数据集和自动化数据流水线，采用两阶段训练策略。
contributions: 提出LIVE框架，首次将大规模高质量图像编辑数据与视频数据联合训练用于指令视频编辑。
设计帧级token噪声策略，有效弥合静态图像与动态视频之间的域差异。
构建包含60+挑战性任务的评估基准，实验证明方法达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在包含60+任务的基准上进行广泛对比和消融实验，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视频生成模型的质量。
两阶段训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LIVE框架，利用图像编辑先验增强指令视频编辑，通过帧级token噪声策略弥合图像与视频域差异，在60+任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Beyond Static Benchmarks: Synthesizing Harmful Content via Persona-based Simulation for Robust Evaluation
papers.abstract: Static benchmarks for harmful content detection face limitations in scalability and diversity, and may also be affected by contamination from web-scale pre-training corpora. To address these issues, we propose a framework for synthesizing harmful content, leveraging persona-guided large language model (LLM) agents. Our approach constructs two-dimensional user personas by integrating demographic identities and topical interests with situational harmful strategies, enabling the simulation of diverse and contextually grounded harmful interactions. We evaluate the framework along three dimensions: harmfulness, challenge level, and diversity. Both human and LLM-based evaluations confirm that our framework achieves a high harmful generation success rate. Experiments across multiple detection systems reveal that our synthetic scenarios are more challenging to detect than those in existing benchmarks. Furthermore, a multi-faceted analysis confirms that our approach achieves linguistic and topical diversity comparable to human-curated datasets, establishing our framework as an effective tool for robust stress-testing of harmful content detection systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于角色引导的LLM有害内容合成框架，生成多样且更具挑战性的测试场景，用于鲁棒评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有有害内容检测的静态基准在可扩展性和多样性上受限，且可能受预训练语料污染影响，需要更动态、多样化的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成多样化、高挑战性且上下文真实的有害内容，以鲁棒地评估检测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建二维用户角色（人口统计身份+话题兴趣与情境有害策略），引导LLM智能体模拟多样且情境化的有害交互，合成有害内容。
contributions: 提出基于角色引导的LLM有害内容合成框架，实现可扩展、多样化的测试场景生成。
通过人类和LLM评估验证框架的高有害生成成功率，并证明合成场景比现有基准更具挑战性。
多维度分析表明合成内容在语言和话题多样性上媲美人工数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在多个检测系统上评估，合成场景比现有基准更难检测；人类和LLM评估确认高有害生成成功率；多样性分析显示与人工数据集相当。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，存在偏见或不当内容风险。
角色设计可能无法覆盖所有有害交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于角色引导的LLM有害内容合成框架，生成多样且更具挑战性的测试场景，用于鲁棒评估。

papers.title: Mini-BEHAVIOR-Gran: Revealing U-Shaped Effects of Instruction Granularity on Language-Guided Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Instruction granularity is an important yet poorly controlled variable in language-guided embodied AI. Existing benchmarks typically pair each task with a single static instruction, making it difficult to study how agent behavior changes when the same task is described at different levels of detail. We introduce Mini-BEHAVIOR-Gran, a new benchmark for controlled studies of instruction granularity that extends Mini-BEHAVIOR with multiple instruction variants per task, ranging from high-level goal descriptions to step-by-step guidance. Using this benchmark, we compare four candidate metrics for cross-task granularity quantification: token count, entity count, action-verb count, and planning-width, and find that width correlates most consistently with agent performance. Using width to organize training and evaluation further reveals a non-monotonic U-shaped relationship between instruction granularity and performance, with peaks at both fine and coarse extremes. Further analysis suggests that the coarse-granularity performance rebound is associated with shallow grounding, where agents learn vision-dominant policies.

analysis.tldr: 指令粒度对语言引导具身智能体性能呈U型影响，中等粒度表现最差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有具身AI基准通常为每个任务提供单一静态指令，难以系统研究指令粒度对智能体行为的影响，而粒度是语言引导具身AI中重要但未受控的变量。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可控的指令粒度基准，并揭示指令粒度与智能体性能之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现指令粒度与性能呈非单调U型关系，在粗细极端达到峰值，中等粒度表现最差；粗粒度性能回升与浅层接地（视觉主导策略）相关。
analysis.method: 扩展Mini-BEHAVIOR为每个任务提供多种粒度指令（从高层目标到逐步指导），提出规划宽度（planning-width）作为跨任务粒度量化指标，并基于宽度组织训练与评估。
contributions: 构建Mini-BEHAVIOR-Gran基准，支持指令粒度的受控研究
发现指令粒度与性能的U型关系，并揭示粗粒度性能回升的机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准基于单一模拟环境（Mini-BEHAVIOR），泛化性待验证
U型关系的解释（浅层接地）可能依赖特定任务设置
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 指令粒度对语言引导具身智能体性能呈U型影响，中等粒度表现最差。

papers.title: Towards Universal Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
papers.abstract: With the development of robotics, skeleton-based action recognition has become increasingly important, as human-robot interaction requires understanding the actions of humans and humanoid robots. Due to different sources of human skeletons and structures of humanoid robots, skeleton data naturally exhibit heterogeneity. However, previous works overlook the data heterogeneity of skeletons and solely construct models using homogeneous skeletons. Moreover, open-vocabulary action recognition is also essential for real-world applications. To this end, this work studies the challenging problem of heterogeneous skeleton-based action recognition with open vocabularies. We construct a large-scale Heterogeneous Open-Vocabulary (HOV) Skeleton dataset by integrating and refining multiple representative large-scale skeleton-based action datasets. To address universal skeleton-based action recognition, we propose a Transformer-based model that comprises three key components: unified skeleton representation, motion encoder for skeletons, and multi-grained motion-text alignment. The motion encoder feeds multi-modal skeleton embeddings into a two-stream Transformer-based encoder to learn spatio-temporal action representations, which are then mapped to a semantic space to align with text embeddings. Multi-grained motion-text alignment incorporates contrastive learning at three levels: global instance alignment, stream-specific alignment, and fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks with heterogeneous skeleton data demonstrate both the effectiveness and the generalization ability of the proposed method. Code is available at https://github.com/jidongkuang/Universal-Skeleton.

analysis.tldr: 提出通用骨架动作识别框架，通过统一表示和多粒度对齐解决异构骨架与开放词汇问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人交互需要理解人类和人形机器人的动作，但不同来源的骨架数据存在异构性，且开放词汇识别对实际应用至关重要。
analysis.problem: 异构骨架数据的开放词汇动作识别问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Transformer的模型，包含统一骨架表示、运动编码器和多粒度运动-文本对齐。运动编码器使用双流Transformer编码多模态骨架嵌入，多粒度对齐包括全局实例、流特定和细粒度对比学习。
contributions: 构建大规模异构开放词汇（HOV）骨架数据集
提出通用骨架动作识别框架，实现异构骨架和开放词汇识别
analysis.experiments: 在多个异构骨架基准数据集上验证了有效性和泛化能力。

papers.title: Improving LLM Code Reasoning via Semantic Equivalence Self-Play with Formal Verification
papers.abstract: We introduce a self-play framework for semantic equivalence in Haskell, utilizing formal verification to guide adversarial training between a generator and an evaluator. The framework leverages Liquid Haskell proofs for validating equivalence and execution-based counterexamples for inequivalence, organized via a difficulty-aware curriculum. To facilitate this, we release \textbf{OpInstruct-HSx}, a synthetic dataset of $\approx$28k validated Haskell programs. Empirical experiments show that our evaluator transfers effectively to downstream tasks, achieving up to 13.3pp accuracy gain on EquiBench and consistent gains on PySecDB. Ablation studies on the SEQ-SINQ regimes indicate that while inequivalence supervision provides data volume, equivalence proofs are uniquely responsible for the model's reasoning capabilities. The entire training pipeline and dataset are publicly released on GitHub and Hugging Face respectively.

analysis.tldr: 通过形式化验证引导的语义等价自博弈框架提升LLM代码推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在代码推理中缺乏对语义等价性的精确理解，难以区分等价与不等价程序，且缺乏高质量验证数据。
analysis.problem: 如何利用形式化验证自动生成语义等价/不等价训练数据，并提升LLM的代码推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验表明，不等价监督提供数据量，但等价证明是模型推理能力的关键。
analysis.method: 提出自博弈框架，生成器与评估器对抗训练，使用Liquid Haskell证明等价性，执行反例证明不等价性，并通过难度感知课程组织数据。
contributions: 提出基于形式化验证的语义等价自博弈框架，用于提升LLM代码推理。
发布OpInstruct-HSx数据集，包含约28k验证过的Haskell程序。
实验证明评估器在EquiBench上提升13.3pp准确率，并在PySecDB上取得一致增益。
analysis.experiments: 在EquiBench和PySecDB上评估，EquiBench准确率提升13.3pp，PySecDB上一致增益；消融实验分析等价/不等价监督的作用。
limitations: 仅针对Haskell语言，泛化到其他语言需验证。
依赖Liquid Haskell形式化验证工具，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

papers.title: Small Model as Master Orchestrator: Learning Unified Agent-Tool Orchestration with Parallel Subtask Decomposition
papers.abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) demonstrate clear advantages in tackling complex problems by coordinating diverse agents and external tools. However, most existing orchestration methods rely on static workflows or serial agent scheduling, and are further constrained by heterogeneous interface protocols between tools and agents. This leads to high system complexity and poor extensibility. To mitigate these issues, we propose Agent-as-Tool, a unified parallel orchestration paradigm that abstracts both agents and tools into a standardized, learnable action space with protocol normalization and explicit state feedback. Building on this paradigm, we train a lightweight orchestrator, ParaManager, which decouples planning decisions from subtask solving, enabling state-aware parallel subtask decomposition, delegation, and asynchronous execution. For training, we adopt a two-stage ParaManager training pipeline. It improves robustness by incorporating supervised fine-tuning (SFT) trajectories equipped with recovery mechanisms, and further applies reinforcement learning (RL) to achieve an optimal balance among task success, protocol compliance, diversity, and reasoning efficiency. Experiments show that ParaManager achieves strong performance across multiple benchmarks and exhibits robust generalization under unseen model pools.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agent-as-Tool统一编排范式，训练轻量级编排器ParaManager实现并行子任务分解与异步执行。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多智能体编排方法依赖静态工作流或串行调度，且受限于工具与智能体间的异构接口协议，导致系统复杂度高、扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何实现统一的、可学习的并行编排框架，以解耦规划与子任务求解，并支持状态感知的并行子任务分解与异步执行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agent-as-Tool统一编排范式，将智能体和工具抽象为标准化、可学习的动作空间；训练轻量级编排器ParaManager，采用两阶段训练：先通过带恢复机制的SFT轨迹进行监督微调，再应用强化学习优化任务成功率、协议合规性、多样性和推理效率的平衡。
contributions: 提出Agent-as-Tool统一编排范式，标准化智能体与工具的接口协议并引入显式状态反馈。
设计ParaManager编排器，实现状态感知的并行子任务分解、委派和异步执行。
提出两阶段训练流程，结合SFT和RL提升鲁棒性与性能平衡。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 轻量级编排器可能在大规模复杂任务中性能受限。
未讨论对异构工具和智能体协议的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agent-as-Tool统一编排范式，训练轻量级编排器ParaManager实现并行子任务分解与异步执行。

papers.title: MobileAgeNet: Lightweight Facial Age Estimation for Mobile Deployment
papers.abstract: Mobile deployment of facial age estimation requires models that balance predictive accuracy with low latency and compact size. In this work, we present MobileAgeNet, a lightweight age-regression framework that achieves an MAE of 4.65 years on the UTKFace held-out test set while maintaining efficient on-device inference with an average latency of 14.4 ms measured using the AI Benchmark application. The model is built on a pretrained MobileNetV3-Large backbone combined with a compact regression head, enabling real-time prediction on mobile devices. The training and evaluation pipeline is integrated into the NN LEMUR Dataset framework, supporting reproducible experimentation, structured hyperparameter optimization, and consistent evaluation. We employ bounded age regression together with a two-stage fine-tuning strategy to improve training stability and generalization. Experimental results show that MobileAgeNet achieves competitive accuracy with 3.23M parameters, and that the deployment pipeline from PyTorch training through ONNX export to TensorFlow Lite conversion - preserves predictive behavior without measurable degradation under practical on-device conditions. Overall, this work provides a practical, deployment-ready baseline for mobile-oriented facial age estimation.

analysis.tldr: MobileAgeNet 是一个轻量级面部年龄估计框架，在 UTKFace 上 MAE 为 4.65 年，移动端延迟 14.4 ms，参数量 3.23M。
analysis.research_motivation: 面部年龄估计在移动端部署需要模型在准确性和低延迟、小体积之间取得平衡，现有方法难以同时满足这些要求。
analysis.problem: 设计一个轻量级、低延迟且保持竞争性准确性的面部年龄估计模型，并确保从训练到移动端部署的完整流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练 MobileNetV3-Large 骨干网络和紧凑回归头，采用有界年龄回归和两阶段微调策略，结合 NN LEMUR Dataset 框架进行训练和评估，并通过 PyTorch→ONNX→TensorFlow Lite 流程部署。
contributions: 提出 MobileAgeNet，一个轻量级面部年龄估计框架，在 UTKFace 上达到 4.65 MAE，移动端延迟 14.4 ms。
提供完整的部署流水线，从 PyTorch 训练到 TensorFlow Lite 转换，且无精度损失。
analysis.experiments: 在 UTKFace 测试集上评估 MAE 为 4.65 年，使用 AI Benchmark 测量平均延迟 14.4 ms，参数量 3.23M。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅在 UTKFace 一个数据集上评估，泛化性未知。
未与更多轻量级基线方法进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MobileAgeNet 是一个轻量级面部年龄估计框架，在 UTKFace 上 MAE 为 4.65 年，移动端延迟 14.4 ms，参数量 3.23M。

papers.title: TeMuDance: Contrastive Alignment-Based Textual Control for Music-Driven Dance Generation
papers.abstract: Existing music-driven dance generation approaches have achieved strong realism and effective audio-motion alignment. However, they generally lack semantic controllability, making it difficult to guide specific movements through natural language descriptions. This limitation primarily stems from the absence of large-scale datasets that jointly align music, text, and motion for supervised learning of text-conditioned control. To address this challenge, we propose TeMuDance, a framework that enables text-based control for music-conditioned dance generation without requiring any manually annotated music-text-motion triplet dataset. TeMuDance introduces a motion-centred bridging paradigm that leverages motion as a shared semantic anchor to align disjoint music-dance and text-motion datasets within a unified embedding space, enabling cross-modal retrieval of missing modalities for end-to-end training. A lightweight text control branch is then trained on top of a frozen music-to-dance diffusion backbone, preserving rhythmic fidelity while enabling fine-grained semantic guidance. To further suppress noise inherent in the retrieved supervision, we design a dual-stream fine-tuning strategy with confidence-based filtering. We also propose a novel task-aligned metric that quantifies whether textual prompts induce the intended kinematic attributes under music conditioning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TeMuDance achieves competitive dance quality while substantially improving text-conditioned control over existing methods.

analysis.tldr: TeMuDance通过对比对齐实现音乐驱动舞蹈生成中的文本控制，无需人工标注的三模态数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音乐驱动舞蹈生成方法缺乏语义可控性，难以通过自然语言指导特定动作，主要因为缺少大规模音乐-文本-动作对齐数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有人工标注的音乐-文本-动作三元组数据集的情况下，实现文本条件控制的音乐驱动舞蹈生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TeMuDance框架，采用以运动为中心的桥接范式，利用运动作为共享语义锚点，将不相交的音乐-舞蹈和文本-运动数据集对齐到统一嵌入空间，实现跨模态检索；在冻结的音乐到舞蹈扩散骨干上训练轻量文本控制分支，并设计双流微调策略和置信度过滤抑制检索噪声。
contributions: 提出TeMuDance框架，首次实现无需三元组数据集的文本控制音乐驱动舞蹈生成。
设计运动中心桥接范式，利用对比对齐统一音乐、文本和运动嵌入空间。
提出双流微调策略和置信度过滤，有效抑制检索监督中的噪声。
提出任务对齐的新指标，量化文本提示在音乐条件下诱导的运动属性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到大量实验表明TeMuDance在保持舞蹈质量的同时显著提升了文本条件控制能力。
limitations: 依赖检索质量，可能受限于现有数据集的对齐程度。
文本控制分支的轻量设计可能限制复杂语义的精确表达。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TeMuDance通过对比对齐实现音乐驱动舞蹈生成中的文本控制，无需人工标注的三模态数据集。

papers.title: Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization for Tensor Completion with Arbitrary Sampling
papers.abstract: The recently established Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (CNNM) addresses the problem of \textit{tensor completion with arbitrary sampling} (TCAS), which involves restoring a tensor from a subset of its entries sampled in an arbitrary manner. Despite its promising performance, the optimization procedure of CNNM needs performing Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) multiple times, which is computationally expensive and hard to parallelize. To address the issue, we reformulate the optimization objective of CNNM from the perspective of convolution eigenvectors. By introducing pre-learned convolution eigenvectors which are shared among different tensors, we propose a novel method called Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (ICNNM), which bypasses the SVD step so as to decrease significantly the computational time. In addition, due to the extra prior knowledge encoded in the pre-learned convolution eigenvectors, ICNNM also outperforms CNNM in terms of recovery performance. Extensive experiments on video completion, prediction and frame interpolation verify the superiority of ICNNM over CNNM and several other competing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出ICNNM方法，通过预训练卷积特征向量避免SVD，加速张量补全并提升恢复性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有张量补全方法CNNM需要多次SVD，计算昂贵且难以并行化，限制了其在大规模数据上的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决张量补全中CNNM方法计算效率低下的问题，同时保持或提升恢复性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从卷积特征向量角度重新表述CNNM优化目标，引入预训练的共享卷积特征向量，避免SVD步骤，提出归纳式卷积核范数最小化（ICNNM）。
contributions: 提出ICNNM方法，通过预训练卷积特征向量替代SVD，显著降低计算时间。
ICNNM在视频补全、预测和帧插值任务上恢复性能优于CNNM及其他方法。
analysis.experiments: 在视频补全、预测和帧插值任务上进行实验，验证ICNNM优于CNNM和其他方法。
limitations: 预训练卷积特征向量需要额外数据或先验知识。
方法可能对预训练特征向量的质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ICNNM方法，通过预训练卷积特征向量避免SVD，加速张量补全并提升恢复性能。

papers.title: Rule-VLN: Bridging Perception and Compliance via Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Rectification
papers.abstract: As embodied AI transitions to real-world deployment, the success of the Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task tends to evolve from mere reachability to social compliance. However, current agents suffer from a "goal-driven trap", prioritizing physical geometry ("can I go?") over semantic rules ("may I go?"), frequently overlooking subtle regulatory constraints. To bridge this gap, we establish Rule-VLN, the first large-scale urban benchmark for rule-compliant navigation. Spanning a massive 29k-node environment, it injects 177 diverse regulatory categories into 8k constrained nodes across four curriculum levels, challenging agents with fine-grained visual and behavioral constraints. We further propose the Semantic Navigation Rectification Module (SNRM), a universal, zero-shot module designed to equip pre-trained agents with safety awareness. SNRM integrates a coarse-to-fine visual perception VLM framework with an epistemic mental map for dynamic detour planning. Experiments demonstrate that while Rule-VLN challenges state-of-the-art models, SNRM significantly restores navigation capabilities, reducing CVR by 19.26% and boosting TC by 5.97%.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个大规模合规导航基准Rule-VLN及零样本语义导航修正模块SNRM，显著提升VLN智能体的规则遵循能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLN智能体陷入“目标驱动陷阱”，优先考虑几何可达性而忽视语义规则约束，难以满足真实部署中的社会合规要求。
analysis.problem: 现有VLN方法缺乏对细粒度规则约束的感知与遵循能力，导致在复杂城市环境中频繁违反交通、行为等规范。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出智能体存在“目标驱动陷阱”，即优先考虑物理几何（“我能走吗？”）而非语义规则（“我可以走吗？”），经常忽略微妙的监管约束。
analysis.method: 提出Semantic Navigation Rectification Module (SNRM)，一种零样本模块，集成粗到细的视觉感知VLM框架与认知心智地图，实现动态绕行规划。
contributions: 构建首个大规模城市合规导航基准Rule-VLN，包含29k节点环境、177种规则类别和8k约束节点，分四个课程难度。
提出零样本SNRM模块，通过语义推理与几何修正增强预训练智能体的安全意识和规则遵循能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Rule-VLN基准上测试，SNRM将CVR降低19.26%，TC提升5.97%。
limitations: SNRM为零样本模块，可能无法处理未见过的复杂规则组合。
基准仅覆盖城市环境，泛化到其他场景（如室内）需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个大规模合规导航基准Rule-VLN及零样本语义导航修正模块SNRM，显著提升VLN智能体的规则遵循能力。

papers.title: Bolzano: Case Studies in LLM-Assisted Mathematical Research
papers.abstract: We report new results on eight problems in mathematics and theoretical computer science, produced with the assistance of Bolzano, an open-source multi-agent LLM system. Bolzano orchestrates rounds of interaction between parallel prover agents and a verifier agent while maintaining a persistent knowledge base that is carried across rounds. Classified using the significance-autonomy taxonomy of Feng et al., six of the eight results reach the level of publishable research, and five of the eight were produced essentially autonomously by Bolzano. Our results provide evidence that LLMs can contribute meaningfully to mathematical research, complementing recent reports by Bubeck et al., Woodruff et al., and others.

analysis.tldr: Bolzano 多智能体 LLM 系统在数学研究中取得可发表级成果，展示 LLM 辅助数学研究的潜力。
analysis.research_motivation: 数学研究需要大量创造性推理，传统方法难以自动化，LLM 的推理能力为辅助数学研究提供了新可能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 系统自动或半自动地解决数学和理论计算机科学中的开放问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Bolzano，一个开源多智能体 LLM 系统，通过并行证明智能体与验证智能体多轮交互，并维护跨轮持久知识库。
contributions: 在八个数学/理论计算机科学问题上取得新结果，其中六个达到可发表研究水平。
五个结果由 Bolzano 自主产生，证明 LLM 可对数学研究做出有意义贡献。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖问题领域的选择，泛化性未知。
自主性定义可能模糊，需要更细粒度评估。

papers.title: In-Context Learning Under Regime Change
papers.abstract: Non-stationary sequences arise naturally in control, forecasting, and decision-making. The data-generating process shifts at unknown times, and models must detect the change, discard or downweight obsolete evidence, and adapt to new dynamics on the fly. Transformer-based foundation models increasingly rely on in-context learning for time series forecasting, tabular prediction, and continuous control. As these models are deployed in non-stationary environments, understanding their ability to detect and adapt to regime shifts is important. We formalize this as an in-context change-point detection problem and formally establish the existence of transformer models that solve this problem. Our construction demonstrates that model complexity, in layers and parameters, depends on the level of information available about the change-point location, from no knowledge to knowing exact timing. We validate our results with experiments on synthetic linear regression and linear dynamical systems, where trained transformers match the performance of optimal baselines across information levels. We also show that encoding and incorporating changepoint knowledge indeed improves the real-world performance of a pretrained foundation models on infectious disease forecasting and on financial volatility forecasting around Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) announcements without retraining, demonstrating practical applicability to real-world regime changes.

analysis.tldr: 本文研究Transformer模型在非平稳序列中通过上下文学习检测和适应机制变化的能力，并证明存在可解决该问题的Transformer模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 非平稳序列在控制、预测和决策中普遍存在，数据生成过程会在未知时间发生转变，模型需要检测变化、丢弃或降低过时证据的权重，并实时适应新动态。Transformer基础模型越来越多地依赖上下文学习进行时间序列预测、表格预测和连续控制，理解它们在非平稳环境中检测和适应机制变化的能力至关重要。
analysis.problem: 形式化上下文学习中的变化点检测问题，并探究Transformer模型能否以及如何检测和适应机制变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过理论构造证明存在可解决上下文变化点检测问题的Transformer模型，并在合成线性回归和线性动力系统上通过实验验证，同时展示将变化点知识编码到预训练基础模型中可以提升真实世界任务（传染病预测和金融波动预测）的性能。
contributions: 形式化定义了上下文变化点检测问题。
理论上证明了存在可解决该问题的Transformer模型，并分析了模型复杂度与变化点位置信息水平的关系。
通过合成实验验证了理论结果，并展示了在真实世界任务中利用变化点知识提升预训练模型性能的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成线性回归和线性动力系统上进行了实验，训练后的Transformer在不同信息水平下匹配最优基线的性能；并在传染病预测和FOMC公告前后的金融波动预测上展示了预训练基础模型通过编码变化点知识提升性能。
limitations: 理论构造可能依赖于特定假设，实际部署中变化点检测的鲁棒性有待进一步验证。
实验仅涉及线性回归和线性动力系统，更复杂的非线性系统尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文研究Transformer模型在非平稳序列中通过上下文学习检测和适应机制变化的能力，并证明存在可解决该问题的Transformer模型。

papers.title: DVAR: Adversarial Multi-Agent Debate for Video Authenticity Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of video generation technologies poses a significant challenge to media forensics, as conventional detection methods often fail to generalize beyond their training distributions. To address this, we propose DVAR (Debate-based Video Authenticity Reasoning), a training-free framework that reformulates video detection as a structured multi-agent forensic reasoning process. Moving beyond the paradigm of pattern matching, DVAR orchestrates a competition between a Generative Hypothesis Agent and a Natural Mechanism Agent. Through iterative rounds of cross-examination, these agents defend their respective explanations against abnormal evidence, driving a logical convergence where the truth emerges from rigorous stress-testing. To adjudicate these conflicting claims, we apply Occam's Razor through the Minimum Description Length (MDL) framework, defining an Explanatory Cost to quantify the "logical burden" of each reasoning path. Furthermore, we integrate GenVideoKB, a dynamic knowledge repository that provides high-level reasoning heuristics on generative boundaries and failure modes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DVAR achieves competitive performance against supervised state-of-the-art methods while exhibiting superior generalization to unseen generative architectures. By transforming detection into a transparent debate, DVAR provides explicit, interpretable reasoning traces for robust video authenticity assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于多智能体辩论的视频真伪检测框架，无需训练即可超越监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频生成技术快速演进，传统检测方法难以泛化到未见过的生成分布，亟需可解释且鲁棒的检测方案。
analysis.problem: 视频真伪检测中，现有方法依赖模式匹配，泛化能力差且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DVAR框架，通过生成假设智能体与自然机制智能体进行多轮交叉辩论，利用最小描述长度（MDL）原则计算解释成本以裁决冲突，并集成动态知识库GenVideoKB提供高层推理启发。
contributions: 提出训练无关的辩论式视频真伪检测框架，将检测转化为结构化多智能体推理过程。
引入MDL框架量化推理路径的逻辑负担，实现透明可解释的裁决。
集成动态知识库GenVideoKB，提升对未知生成架构的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上与监督方法对比，DVAR在泛化到未见生成架构时表现优越，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 辩论过程可能计算开销较大，实时性待验证。
依赖知识库的覆盖范围，对全新生成技术可能需更新。

papers.title: Adverse-to-the-eXtreme Panoptic Segmentation: URVIS 2026 Study and Benchmark
papers.abstract: This paper presents the report of the URVIS 2026 challenge on adverse-to-extreme panoptic segmentation. As the first challenge of its kind, it attracted 17 registered participants and 47 submissions, with 4 teams reaching the final phase. The challenge is based on the MUSES dataset, a multi-sensor benchmark for panoptic segmentation in adverse-to-extreme weather, including RGB frame camera, LiDAR, radar, and event camera data. Weighted Panoptic Quality (wPQ) is designed and adopted as the official ranking metric for fair evaluation across weather conditions. In this report, we summarise the challenge setting and benchmark results, analyse the performance of the submitted methods, and discuss current progress and remaining challenges for robust multimodal panoptic segmentation. Link: https://urvis-workshop.github.io/challenge-Muses.html

analysis.tldr: URVIS 2026挑战赛报告：面向极端恶劣天气的全景分割基准与多模态方法分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全景分割方法在极端天气下性能退化严重，缺乏统一基准和公平评价指标，阻碍了鲁棒多模态感知的发展。
analysis.problem: 建立首个面向极端恶劣天气的全景分割挑战赛，设计公平评价指标，并系统分析现有方法的性能与不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于MUSES多传感器数据集（RGB、LiDAR、雷达、事件相机），设计加权全景质量（wPQ）作为排名指标，组织竞赛并分析提交方法。
contributions: 首次举办极端恶劣天气全景分割挑战赛，提供标准化基准。
提出加权全景质量（wPQ）指标，实现跨天气条件的公平评价。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅基于单一数据集MUSES，泛化性待验证。
