analysis.one_sentence_summary: URVIS 2026挑战赛报告：面向极端恶劣天气的全景分割基准与多模态方法分析。

papers.title: A phenotype-driven and evidence-governed framework for knowledge graph enrichment and hypotheses discovery in population data
papers.abstract: Current knowledge graph (KG) construction methods are confirmatory, focusing on recovering known relationships rather than identifying novel or context-dependent nodes. This paper proposes a phenotype-driven and evidence-governed framework that shifts the paradigm toward structured hypothesis discovery and controlled KG expansion. The approach integrates graph neural networks (GNNs) for phenotype discovery, causal inference, probabilistic reasoning and large language models (LLMs) for hypothesis generation and claim extraction within a unified pipeline. The framework prioritizes relationships that are both structurally supported by data and underexplored in the literature. KG expansion is formulated as a multi-objective optimization problem, where candidate claims are jointly evaluated in terms of relevance, structural validation and novelty. Pareto-optimal selection enables the identification of non-dominated claims that balance confirmation and discovery, avoiding trivial or redundant knowledge inclusion. Experiments on heterogeneous population datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework produces more interpretable phenotypes, reveals context-dependent causal structures and generates high-quality claims that align with both data and scientific evidence. Compared to rule-based and LLM-only baselines, the method achieves the best trade-off across plausibility, novelty, validation and relevance. In retrieval-augmented settings, it significantly improves performance (Recall@5=0.98) while reducing hallucination rates (0.05), highlighting its effectiveness in grounding LLM outputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种表型驱动、证据治理的知识图谱扩展框架，结合GNN、因果推断、概率推理和LLM，实现结构化假设发现与可控KG扩展。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识图谱构建方法偏向确认已知关系，难以发现新颖或上下文相关的节点，限制了在群体数据中的假设发现能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从群体数据中系统性地发现并验证新颖、上下文相关的知识图谱节点与关系，同时避免冗余和低质量知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成图神经网络进行表型发现、因果推断、概率推理和LLM用于假设生成与声明提取，将KG扩展建模为多目标优化问题，通过帕累托最优选择平衡确认与发现。
contributions: 提出一种表型驱动、证据治理的框架，将KG扩展从确认性转向假设发现。
将KG扩展形式化为多目标优化问题，实现新颖性与验证性的平衡。
在异构群体数据集上验证了框架在可解释表型、上下文因果结构和高质量声明生成方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在异构群体数据集上实验，与基于规则和仅LLM的基线相比，在合理性、新颖性、验证性和相关性上取得最佳权衡；在检索增强设置中Recall@5=0.98，幻觉率0.05。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始KG和群体数据。
多目标优化计算复杂度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种表型驱动、证据治理的知识图谱扩展框架，结合GNN、因果推断、概率推理和LLM，实现结构化假设发现与可控KG扩展。

papers.title: Light-Adapted Electroretinogram and Oscillatory Potentials (LEOPs) Dataset for Autism Spectrum Disorder and Typically Developing Individuals
papers.abstract: The LEOPs (Light-ERG-Oscillatory Potentials) dataset provides light-adapted (LA) electroretinogram (ERG) and Oscillatory Potentials (OPs) waveforms for typically developing Control, Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) and ASD + Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) childhood and adolescent populations. The ERGs were recorded in the Right And Left eyes with skin electrodes using the handheld RETeval device at two sites in Australia and the United Kingdom. The LEOPs dataset includes 5309 single flash ERG and 4434 OPs waveforms as well as images selected from each participant showing the position of the skin electrode. The LEOPs dataset is constructed from recordings using a 9 step randomized flash series from $-0.37$ to $1.20$~$Td.s$, a 2 step at 113 and 446 $Td.s$ flash strengths (2500 Control, 1730 ASD and 451 ASD + ADHD samples), as well as the $85$~$Td.s$ (Light Adapted 3 $cd.s.m^{-2}$ (LA3)) equivalent International Society of Clinical Electrophysiology of Vision (ISCEV) Standard flash with 435 Control, 176 ASD and 37 ASD + ADHD waveform samples. Code for the stimulus is provided along with participant demographics, date and time of testing, and where available diagnostic scores for the ASD and ASD + ADHD groups, alongside iris color, electrode position with image files and time domain values for the ERG and summed values for the OPs. The repository contains excel file, exported JSON files on the patient level that are more suitable for machine learning tasks, images of electrode position for each recording and the protocol files for use with the RETeval.

analysis.tldr: LEOPs数据集提供了自闭症谱系障碍和典型发育个体的光适应视网膜电图和振荡电位波形，适用于机器学习研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的诊断缺乏客观生物标志物，视网膜电图（ERG）作为一种非侵入性生理测量，可能提供新的诊断线索，但缺乏标准化、公开的数据集来支持机器学习研究。
analysis.problem: 构建一个包含ASD、ASD+ADHD和典型发育个体的光适应ERG和振荡电位（OPs）波形的公开数据集，并附带详细元数据，以促进基于机器学习的生物标志物发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用手持RETeval设备在澳大利亚和英国两个站点，通过皮肤电极记录左右眼的光适应ERG和OPs波形，采用9步随机闪光序列和ISCEV标准闪光，收集了5309个单次闪光ERG和4434个OPs波形，并提供了参与者人口统计、诊断评分、虹膜颜色、电极位置图像等元数据。
contributions: 发布了首个包含ASD、ASD+ADHD和典型发育个体的光适应ERG和OPs波形的公开数据集，样本量较大（2500 Control, 1730 ASD, 451 ASD+ADHD）。
提供了标准化记录协议、代码和多种格式的数据文件（Excel、JSON），便于机器学习任务使用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅包含儿童和青少年人群，可能不适用于成人。
数据来自两个站点，可能存在设备或操作差异，但未详细分析跨站点一致性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LEOPs数据集提供了自闭症谱系障碍和典型发育个体的光适应视网膜电图和振荡电位波形，适用于机器学习研究。

papers.title: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs for Inpatient Diagnosis: Real-World Performance, Safety, and Cost Across Ten Frontier Models
papers.abstract: Background: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly proposed for diagnostic support, but few evaluations use real-world multimodal inpatient data, particularly in low and middle-income country (LMIC) public hospitals. Methods: We conducted VALID, a retrospective evaluation of 539 multimodal inpatient cases from a tertiary public hospital in South Africa. Inputs included radiology imaging (CT, MRI, CXR) and reports, laboratory results, clinical notes, and vital signs. Expert panels adjudicated 300 cases (balanced and discordant subsets) to establish ground truth diagnoses, differentials, and reasoning. Ten multimodal LLMs generated zero-shot outputs. A calibrated three-model LLM Jury scored all outputs and routine ward diagnoses across diagnostic accuracy, differential quality, reasoning, and patient safety (>10,000 evaluations). Primary outcomes were composite scores ($S_3$, $S_4$) and win rates. Results: (i) LLM performance was tightly clustered (<15% variation) despite large cost differences; low-cost models performed comparably to top models. (ii) All LLMs significantly outperformed routine ward diagnoses on average diagnostic and safety scores. (iii) Top performance was achieved by GPT-5.1, followed by Gemini models. (vi) Adding radiology reports improved performance by 6%. (v) Diagnostic and reasoning scores were highly correlated ($ρ= 0.85$). (vi) Output rates varied (65-100%) due to input constraints. Results were robust across subsets and evaluation design. Conclusions: Across a real-world LMIC dataset, multimodal LLMs showed similar diagnostic performance despite large cost differences and outperformed routine care on average safety metrics. Affordability, robustness, and deployment constraints may outweigh marginal performance differences in LMIC settings.

analysis.tldr: 在真实南非公立医院住院数据上，十种多模态LLM诊断表现相近，低成本模型不输顶级模型，且均优于常规诊疗。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM诊断评估多使用合成或非多模态数据，缺乏在低收入国家真实住院场景下的系统比较，尤其是成本与性能的权衡。
analysis.problem: 评估多模态LLM在真实住院诊断中的准确性、安全性和成本效益，并比较不同模型在低收入国家公立医院环境下的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM性能高度聚类（差异<15%），低成本模型与顶级模型表现相当；所有LLM平均诊断和安全得分显著优于常规诊疗；诊断与推理得分高度相关（ρ=0.85）；添加放射学报告提升6%性能；输出率因输入限制在65-100%不等。
analysis.method: 回顾性评估539例多模态住院病例，由专家小组裁定300例金标准诊断，使用十种多模态LLM进行零样本输出，并通过校准的三模型LLM陪审团评分（>10,000次评估），主要指标为复合得分S3、S4和胜率。
contributions: 首次在真实低收入国家公立医院多模态住院数据上系统评估十种前沿LLM的诊断性能、安全性和成本。
发现低成本模型与顶级模型性能相当，且所有LLM均优于常规诊疗，为资源受限环境下的模型选择提供依据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果细节，但提及了主要结果如性能聚类、优于常规诊疗、成本差异等。
limitations: 仅基于南非一家三级公立医院数据，可能不具广泛代表性。
零样本设置可能未充分利用模型微调潜力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在真实南非公立医院住院数据上，十种多模态LLM诊断表现相近，低成本模型不输顶级模型，且均优于常规诊疗。

papers.title: DOSE: Data Selection for Multi-Modal LLMs via Off-the-Shelf Models
papers.abstract: High-quality and diverse multimodal data are essential for improving vision-language models (VLMs), yet existing datasets often contain noisy, redundant, and poorly aligned samples. To address these problems, data filtering is commonly used to enhance the efficiency and performance of multimodal learning, but it introduces extra computational cost because filtering models are usually trained on the same data they are meant to screen. To reduce this cost, we study DOSE, which explores whether off-the-shelf pretrained models that have never seen the target data can be used to select training samples for larger and stronger multimodal models without any task-specific training. Even without fine-tuning, these models can effectively assess text quality and image-text alignment to guide data selection. Based on this, we build a joint quality-alignment distribution and apply adaptive weighted sampling to select informative samples while maintaining long-tail diversity. This approach enhances data diversity, enabling models trained on DOSE-filtered data to match or surpass those trained on the full dataset on standard VQA and math benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

analysis.tldr: 利用现成预训练模型无需微调即可为多模态大模型筛选高质量训练数据，提升效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态数据集常含噪声、冗余和低质量样本，数据过滤虽能提升学习效率但需额外训练过滤模型，计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练过滤模型的前提下，利用现成预训练模型高效筛选高质量、多样化的多模态训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现成预训练模型即使未在目标数据上微调，也能有效评估文本质量和图文对齐程度，从而指导数据筛选。
analysis.method: 构建联合质量-对齐分布，并应用自适应加权采样，在保持长尾多样性的同时选择信息量大的样本。
contributions: 提出DOSE方法，利用现成预训练模型无需微调即可筛选多模态训练数据。
设计联合质量-对齐分布与自适应加权采样，兼顾数据质量与多样性。
在标准VQA和数学基准上，DOSE筛选后的数据训练出的模型性能匹配或超越全量数据训练。
analysis.experiments: 在标准VQA和数学基准上进行了实验，验证了DOSE的有效性、效率和可扩展性。
limitations: 依赖现成预训练模型的质量，若模型本身偏差可能影响筛选效果。
自适应加权采样的超参数可能需要针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用现成预训练模型无需微调即可为多模态大模型筛选高质量训练数据，提升效率与性能。

papers.title: UGD: An Unsupervised Geometric Distance for Evaluating Real-world Noisy Point Cloud Denoising
papers.abstract: Point cloud denoising is a fundamental and crucial challenge in real-world point cloud applications. Existing quantitative evaluation metrics for point cloud denoising methods are implemented in a supervised manner, which requires both the denoised point cloud and the corresponding ground-truth clean point cloud to compute a representative geometric distance. This requirement is highly problematic in real-world scenarios, where ground-truth clean point clouds are often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective unsupervised geometric distance (UGD) for real-world noisy point cloud denoising, calculated solely from noisy point clouds. The core idea of UGD is to learn a patch-wise prior model from a set of clean point clouds and then employ this prior model as the ground-truth to quantify the degradation by measuring the geometric variations of the denoised point cloud. To this end, we first learn a pristine Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with extracted patch-wise quality-aware features from a set of pristine clean point clouds by a patch-wise feature extraction network, which serves as the ground-truth for the quantitative evaluation. Then, the UGD is defined as the weighted sum of distances between each patch of the denoised point cloud and the learned pristine GMM model in the patch space. To train the employed patch-wise feature extraction network, we propose a self-supervised training framework through multi-task learning, which includes pair-wise quality ranking, distortion classification, and distortion distribution prediction. Quantitative experiments with synthetic noise confirm that the proposed UGD achieves comparable performance to supervised full-reference metrics. Moreover, experimental results on real-world data demonstrate that the proposed UGD enables unsupervised evaluation of point cloud denoising methods based exclusively on noisy point clouds.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督几何距离UGD，仅用噪声点云评估去噪效果，无需真实干净点云。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有点云去噪评估指标需要干净点云作为真值，但在真实场景中难以获取，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有真实干净点云的情况下，定量评估噪声点云的去噪质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从干净点云中学习先验高斯混合模型（GMM），然后计算去噪点云每个patch与GMM的距离加权和作为UGD；通过自监督多任务学习训练patch特征提取网络。
contributions: 提出无监督几何距离UGD，仅依赖噪声点云即可评估去噪效果。
设计自监督训练框架，通过多任务学习（质量排序、失真分类、失真分布预测）训练特征提取网络。
analysis.experiments: 在合成噪声数据上与全参考指标对比性能相当，在真实数据上验证了仅基于噪声点云的无监督评估能力。
limitations: 依赖干净点云集合来学习先验GMM，可能受限于先验数据的代表性。
patch特征提取网络的设计可能影响评估准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督几何距离UGD，仅用噪声点云评估去噪效果，无需真实干净点云。

papers.title: MCPO: Mastery-Consolidated Policy Optimization for Large Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising approach to improve the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Among RLVR algorithms, Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and its variants have demonstrated strong performance and high training efficiency. However, GRPO-style objectives exhibit two issues on high accuracy prompts including mastered prompts (rollout accuracy =1) and majority-correct prompts (rollout accuracy in (0.5,1)). For mastered prompts, group-relative advantages vanish, yielding no training signal and unconstrained policy drift that can cause forgetting. For majority-correct prompts, the induced query weight shrinks as accuracy increases, weakening consolidation from partial correctness to mastery. To alleviate this, we propose Mastery-Consolidated Policy Optimization (MCPO), which introduces (i) a hinge-KL regularizer applied exclusively to mastered prompts to bound harmful policy drift between successive gradient steps, and (ii) a weighting mechanism that prioritizes majority-correct prompts to better allocate optimization effort. Extensive experiments across three mathematical benchmarks demonstrate that MCPO consistently improves pass@1 performance. Counter-intuitively, rather than restricting exploration, MCPO boosts pass@k metrics, indicating that mastery consolidation further catalyzes solution diversity.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCPO算法，通过铰链KL正则化和加权机制解决GRPO在掌握和多数正确提示上的训练信号消失和策略漂移问题，提升推理模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR算法（如GRPO）在提升LLM推理能力方面表现优异，但在高准确率提示（掌握提示和多数正确提示）上存在训练信号消失和策略漂移问题，导致遗忘和优化效率下降，亟需改进。
analysis.problem: GRPO风格目标在掌握提示（rollout准确率=1）上优势消失导致无训练信号和策略漂移，在多数正确提示（rollout准确率在0.5到1之间）上查询权重随准确率增加而缩小，削弱了从部分正确到掌握的巩固。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到GRPO在掌握提示上优势消失导致策略漂移和遗忘，在多数正确提示上权重缩小削弱巩固效果。
analysis.method: 提出Mastery-Consolidated Policy Optimization (MCPO)，包含两个关键组件：(i) 铰链KL正则化，仅应用于掌握提示以限制连续梯度步之间的有害策略漂移；(ii) 加权机制，优先处理多数正确提示以更好地分配优化努力。
contributions: 识别并分析了GRPO在高准确率提示上的两个问题：掌握提示上优势消失和多数正确提示上权重缩小。
提出MCPO算法，通过铰链KL正则化和加权机制缓解上述问题，提升推理模型性能。
在三个数学基准上验证MCPO一致提升pass@1性能，并意外发现其提升pass@k指标，表明掌握巩固促进了解决方案多样性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数学基准上进行实验，评估pass@1和pass@k指标，结果显示MCPO一致提升pass@1，并提升pass@k。
limitations: 摘要未提及在非数学推理任务上的泛化能力。
可能对超参数（如铰链KL正则化强度）敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MCPO算法，通过铰链KL正则化和加权机制解决GRPO在掌握和多数正确提示上的训练信号消失和策略漂移问题，提升推理模型性能。

papers.title: Hyperspectral Unmixing Hierarchies
papers.abstract: Unmixing reveals the spatial distribution and spectral details of different constituents, called endmembers, in a hyperspectral image. Because unmixing has limited ground truth requirements, can accommodate mixed pixels, and is closely tied to light propagation, it is a uniquely powerful tool for analyzing hyperspectral images. However, spectral variability inhibits unmixing performance, the proper way to determine the number of endmembers is ambiguous, and the clarity of the endmembers degrades as more are included. Hierarchical structure is a possible solution to all three problems. Here, hierarchical unmixing is defined by imposing a hierarchical abundance sum constraint on Deep Nonnegative Matrix Factorization. Binary Linear Unmixing Tactile Hierarchies (BLUTHs) solve the hierarchical unmixing problem with a simple network architecture. Sparsity modulation unmixing growth tailors the topology of a BLUTH to each scene. The structure imposed by BLUTHs allows endmembers with varying levels of spectral contrast to be revealed, mitigating the challenge of spectral variability. The performance of BLUTHs exceeds state-of-the-art unmixing algorithms on laboratory scenes, particularly with regard to abundance estimation, while their performance remains competitive on remote sensing scenes. In addition, ocean color unmixing by BLUTHs is demonstrated on hyperspectral scenes from the HYPSO and PACE satellites.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化高光谱解混方法BLUTH，通过深度非负矩阵分解和稀疏性调制提升端元提取与丰度估计性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱解混面临光谱变异性、端元数量确定模糊以及端元清晰度随数量增加而下降三大挑战，层次化结构是潜在解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何通过层次化结构同时缓解光谱变异性、自动确定端元数量并保持端元清晰度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 光谱变异性抑制解混性能，端元数量确定方式模糊，且端元清晰度随数量增加而退化。
analysis.method: 在深度非负矩阵分解中施加层次化丰度和约束，提出二元线性解混触觉层次结构（BLUTH），并通过稀疏性调制解混增长定制网络拓扑。
contributions: 定义了层次化解混问题并引入层次化丰度和约束。
提出BLUTH网络架构，通过稀疏性调制自适应调整拓扑。
在实验室场景中丰度估计超越现有方法，在遥感场景中保持竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在实验室场景和遥感场景（包括HYPSO和PACE卫星的高光谱图像）上评估，实验室场景中丰度估计优于现有方法，遥感场景中性能相当。
limitations: 遥感场景性能仅保持竞争力，未显著超越。
层次化结构可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化高光谱解混方法BLUTH，通过深度非负矩阵分解和稀疏性调制提升端元提取与丰度估计性能。

papers.title: NaviFormer: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Transformer-like Model to Holistically Solve the Navigation Problem
papers.abstract: Path planning is usually solved by addressing either the (high-level) route planning problem (waypoint sequencing to achieve the final goal) or the (low-level) path planning problem (trajectory prediction between two waypoints avoiding collisions). However, real-world problems usually require simultaneous solutions to the route and path planning subproblems with a holistic and efficient approach. In this paper, we introduce NaviFormer, a deep reinforcement learning model based on a Transformer architecture that solves the global navigation problem by predicting both high-level routes and low-level trajectories. To evaluate NaviFormer, several experiments have been conducted, including comparisons with other algorithms. Results show competitive accuracy from NaviFormer since it can understand the constraints and difficulties of each subproblem and act consequently to improve performance. Moreover, its superior computation speed proves its suitability for real-time missions.

analysis.tldr: NaviFormer 用 Transformer 架构的深度强化学习模型统一解决路径规划中的高层路线与低层轨迹问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实导航问题通常需要同时解决高层路线规划和低层路径规划，但现有方法往往分开处理，效率低且难以兼顾全局最优。
analysis.problem: 如何用一个统一的模型高效地同时预测高层路线（航点序列）和低层轨迹（避障路径）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 Transformer 架构的深度强化学习模型，通过联合预测高层路线和低层轨迹来解决全局导航问题。
contributions: 提出 NaviFormer，一个统一解决路线规划和路径规划问题的 Transformer 强化学习模型。
实验表明模型在精度和计算速度上具有竞争力，适合实时任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到与多种算法对比，NaviFormer 在精度上具有竞争力，且计算速度更快，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 摘要未提及在复杂动态环境中的泛化能力。
可能对大规模场景的扩展性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NaviFormer 用 Transformer 架构的深度强化学习模型统一解决路径规划中的高层路线与低层轨迹问题。

papers.title: Visual Inception: Compromising Long-term Planning in Agentic Recommenders via Multimodal Memory Poisoning
papers.abstract: The evolution from static ranking models to Agentic Recommender Systems (Agentic RecSys) empowers AI agents to maintain long-term user profiles and autonomously plan service tasks. While this paradigm shift enhances personalization, it introduces a vulnerability: reliance on Long-term Memory (LTM). In this paper, we uncover a threat termed "Visual Inception." Unlike traditional adversarial attacks that seek immediate misclassification, Visual Inception injects triggers into user-uploaded images (e.g., lifestyle photos) that act as "sleeper agents" within the system's memory. When retrieved during future planning, these poisoned memories hijack the agent's reasoning chain, steering it toward adversary-defined goals (e.g., promoting high-margin products) without prompt injection. To mitigate this, we propose CognitiveGuard, a dual-process defense framework inspired by human cognition. It consists of a System 1 Perceptual Sanitizer (diffusion-based purification) to cleanse sensory inputs and a System 2 Reasoning Verifier (counterfactual consistency checks) to detect anomalies in memory-driven planning. Extensive experiments on a mock e-commerce agent environment demonstrate that Visual Inception achieves about 85% Goal-Hit Rate (GHR), while CognitiveGuard reduces this risk to around 10% with configurable latency trade-offs (about 1.5s in lite mode to about 6.5s for full sequential verification), without quality degradation under our setup.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉注入攻击，利用多模态记忆投毒破坏智能推荐系统的长期规划，并设计认知防御框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能推荐系统依赖长期记忆进行个性化规划，但记忆投毒攻击可隐蔽地操纵推理链，现有研究未充分关注此类威胁。
analysis.problem: 如何利用用户上传图像中的隐蔽触发器（视觉注入）攻击智能推荐系统的长期记忆，并设计有效防御。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 攻击方法：Visual Inception，在用户图像中注入触发器作为休眠代理，在规划时劫持推理链。防御方法：CognitiveGuard，包含系统1感知净化器（扩散模型净化）和系统2推理验证器（反事实一致性检查）。
contributions: 首次揭示智能推荐系统中基于多模态记忆投毒的长期规划威胁（Visual Inception）。
提出双过程认知防御框架CognitiveGuard，结合感知净化和推理验证。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟电商智能体环境中，Visual Inception达到约85%目标命中率，CognitiveGuard将风险降至约10%，延迟可配置（轻量模式约1.5秒，全顺序验证约6.5秒），且无质量下降。
limitations: 实验仅在模拟环境中进行，真实场景效果未知。
防御延迟在完全验证模式下较高（约6.5秒）。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉注入攻击，利用多模态记忆投毒破坏智能推荐系统的长期规划，并设计认知防御框架。

papers.title: Vision-Based Human Awareness Estimation for Enhanced Safety and Efficiency of AMRs in Industrial Warehouses
papers.abstract: Ensuring human safety is of paramount importance in warehouse environments that feature mixed traffic of human workers and autonomous mobile robots (AMRs). Current approaches often treat humans as generic dynamic obstacles, leading to conservative AMR behaviors like slowing down or detouring, even when workers are fully aware and capable of safely sharing space. This paper presents a real-time vision-based method to estimate human awareness of an AMR using a single RGB camera. We integrate state-of-the-art 3D human pose lifting with head orientation estimation to ascertain a human's position relative to the AMR and their viewing cone, thereby determining if the human is aware of the AMR. The entire pipeline is validated using synthetically generated data within NVIDIA Isaac Sim, a robust physics-accurate robotics simulation environment. Experimental results confirm that our system reliably detects human positions and their attention in real time, enabling AMRs to safely adapt their motion based on human awareness. This enhancement is crucial for improving both safety and operational efficiency in industrial and factory automation settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于单目RGB相机的实时人类意识估计方法，使AMR能根据工人注意力调整运动，提升仓库安全与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业仓库中人机混行场景下，现有方法将人类视为通用动态障碍物，导致AMR行为保守（如减速、绕行），即使工人已意识到机器人并安全共享空间，仍影响效率。
analysis.problem: 如何实时估计人类对AMR的注意力/意识状态，使AMR能据此调整运动策略，避免不必要的保守行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成3D人体姿态提升与头部朝向估计，利用单目RGB相机确定人体相对AMR的位置及视线锥，判断人类是否意识到AMR。
contributions: 提出基于单目RGB相机的实时人类意识估计方法，结合3D姿态与头部朝向。
在NVIDIA Isaac Sim仿真环境中验证系统有效性，证明可实时检测人体位置与注意力。
analysis.experiments: 在NVIDIA Isaac Sim合成数据上验证，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在仿真环境中验证，未在真实仓库场景测试。
依赖合成数据，可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性与噪声。

papers.title: Multi-stage Planning for Multi-target Surveillance using Aircrafts Equipped with Synthetic Aperture Radars Aware of Target Visibility
papers.abstract: Generating trajectories for synthetic aperture radar (SAR)-equipped aircraft poses significant challenges due to terrain constraints, and the need for straight-flight segments to ensure high-quality imaging. Related works usually focus on trajectory optimization for predefined straight-flight segments that do not adapt to the target visibility, which depends on the 3D terrain and aircraft orientation. In addition, this assumption does not scale well for the multi-target problem, where multiple straight-flight segments that maximize target visibility must be defined for real-time operations. For this purpose, this paper presents a multi-stage planning system. First, the waypoint sequencing to visit all the targets is estimated. Second, straight-flight segments maximizing target visibility according to the 3D terrain are predicted using a novel neural network trained with deep reinforcement learning. Finally, the segments are connected to create a trajectory via optimization that imposes 3D Dubins curves. Evaluations demonstrate the robustness of the system for SAR missions since it ensures high-quality multi-target SAR image acquisition aware of 3D terrain and target visibility, and real-time performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段规划系统，利用深度强化学习预测最大化目标可见性的直线飞行段，实现多目标SAR成像轨迹规划。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR飞机轨迹规划受地形约束和直线段成像需求限制，现有方法无法适应目标可见性（依赖3D地形和飞机朝向），且难以扩展到多目标实时场景。
analysis.problem: 如何为多目标SAR监视任务生成考虑3D地形和目标可见性的实时轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段规划：1) 航点排序访问所有目标；2) 使用深度强化学习训练的神经网络预测最大化目标可见性的直线段；3) 通过优化连接直线段形成3D Dubins曲线轨迹。
contributions: 提出多阶段规划系统，结合航点排序、可见性预测和轨迹优化。
利用深度强化学习训练神经网络预测考虑3D地形的目标可见性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真环境，真实场景验证不足。
多目标规模扩展性未明确。

papers.title: Channel-Level Semantic Perturbations: Unlearnable Examples for Diverse Training Paradigms
papers.abstract: The unauthorized use of personal data in model training has emerged as a growing privacy threat. Unlearnable examples (UEs) address this issue by embedding imperceptible perturbations into benign examples to obstruct feature learning. However, existing studies mainly evaluate UEs under from-scratch training settings, leaving their behavior under the widely adopted pretraining-finetuning (PF) paradigm largely unexplored. In this work, we provide the first systematic investigation of unlearnable examples across diverse training paradigms. Our analysis reveals that loading and freezing pretrained weights significantly weakens the effectiveness of existing UEs methods. We further explain these findings through semantic filtering: while UEs tend to induce models to overfit non-semantic noise, thereby weakening their semantic extraction capabilities, under the PF paradigm, frozen shallow layers preserve data semantics, effectively filtering out distracting information like unlearnable noise. Guided by these insights, we propose a hierarchical deception strategy, Shallow Semantic Camouflage (SSC), that confines the generation process to a semantically valid subspace, aiming to bypass the semantic suppression introduced by pretrained weights. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently preserves data unlearnability even under challenging training paradigms, such as shallow-layer freezing and semantic-focused pretraining (SF-Pretrain), bridging the critical gap in pretrain-based unlearnable learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出浅层语义伪装（SSC）方法，通过层次化欺骗策略在预训练-微调范式下实现不可学习样本，解决现有方法在冻结预训练权重时失效的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 个人数据在模型训练中的未经授权使用日益成为隐私威胁，不可学习样本（UEs）通过嵌入不可察觉扰动来阻碍特征学习，但现有研究主要评估从头训练场景，忽略了广泛采用的预训练-微调（PF）范式下的行为。
analysis.problem: 现有不可学习样本方法在预训练-微调范式下，尤其是冻结浅层权重时，有效性显著下降，需要设计能适应不同训练范式（包括PF）的UEs方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 加载和冻结预训练权重会显著削弱现有UEs方法的效果；通过语义过滤解释：UEs倾向于诱导模型过拟合非语义噪声，但在PF范式下，冻结的浅层保留数据语义，有效过滤不可学习噪声等干扰信息。
analysis.method: 提出层次化欺骗策略——浅层语义伪装（SSC），将生成过程限制在语义有效子空间中，以绕过预训练权重引入的语义抑制。
contributions: 首次系统研究不可学习样本在不同训练范式（包括预训练-微调）下的行为，揭示冻结预训练权重削弱UEs有效性的现象并给出语义过滤解释。
提出浅层语义伪装（SSC）方法，在语义有效子空间中生成扰动，在浅层冻结和语义聚焦预训练等挑战性范式下保持数据不可学习性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖预训练权重的质量，对特定预训练模型敏感。
语义有效子空间的构建可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出浅层语义伪装（SSC）方法，通过层次化欺骗策略在预训练-微调范式下实现不可学习样本，解决现有方法在冻结预训练权重时失效的问题。

papers.title: Hyperbolic Enhanced Representation Learning for Incomplete Multi-view Clustering
papers.abstract: Incomplete Multi-View Clustering (IMVC) faces the challenge of learning discriminative representations from fragmentary observations while maintaining robustness against missing views. However, prevalent Euclidean-based methods suffer from a geometric mismatch when modeling real-world data with intrinsic hierarchies, leading to semantic blurring where representations drift towards spatially proximal but semantically distinct neighbors. To bridge this gap, we propose HERL, a Hyperbolic Enhanced Representation Learning framework for IMVC. Operating within the Poincaré ball, HERL constructs a structure-aware latent space to enhance representation learning. Specifically, we design a dual-constraint hyperbolic contrastive mechanism optimizing: an angular-based loss to preserve semantic identity via directional alignment, and a distance-based loss to enforce hierarchical compactness. Furthermore, a hyperbolic prototype head is introduced to rectify global structural drift by aligning cross-view hierarchy-aware prototype distributions. Consequently, HERL disentangles fine-grained semantic correlations to sharpen cluster boundaries and imposes geometric constraints to rectify the data recovery process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that HERL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出双曲空间增强的不完整多视图聚类框架，解决欧氏空间几何不匹配导致的语义模糊问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不完整多视图聚类方法在欧氏空间中建模，难以捕捉数据固有的层次结构，导致表示向空间近邻但语义不同的样本漂移，造成语义模糊。
analysis.problem: 不完整多视图聚类中，从缺失观测中学习判别性表示并保持对缺失视图的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出欧氏空间方法存在几何不匹配，导致语义模糊（representations drift towards spatially proximal but semantically distinct neighbors）。
analysis.method: 在庞加莱球中构建结构感知潜在空间，设计双约束双曲对比机制（角度损失保持语义身份，距离损失强制层次紧致性），并引入双曲原型头对齐跨视图层次感知原型分布。
contributions: 提出双曲增强表示学习框架HERL，解决不完整多视图聚类中的几何不匹配问题。
设计双约束双曲对比机制和双曲原型头，有效分离细粒度语义相关性并纠正全局结构漂移。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 双曲空间计算复杂度可能较高。
对层次结构不明显的多视图数据可能增益有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双曲空间增强的不完整多视图聚类框架，解决欧氏空间几何不匹配导致的语义模糊问题。

papers.title: Self-Reasoning Agentic Framework for Narrative Product Grid-Collage Generation
papers.abstract: Narrative-driven product photography has become a prevalent paradigm in modern marketing, as coherent visual storytelling helps convey product value and establishes emotional engagement with consumers. However, existing image generation methods do not support structured narrative planning or cross-panel coordination, often resulting in weak storytelling and visual incoherence. In practice, narrative product photography is commonly presented as multi-grid collages, where multiple views or scenes jointly communicate a product narrative. To ensure visual consistency across grids and aesthetic harmony of the overall composition, we generate the collage as a single unified image rather than composing independently synthesized panels. We propose a self-reasoning agentic framework for narrative product grid collage generation. Given a product packshot and its name, the system first constructs a Product Narrative Framework that explicitly represents the product's identity, usage context, and situational environment, and translates it into complementary grids governed by a shared visual style. Constraint-aware prompts are then compiled and fed to a generation model that synthesizes the collage jointly. The generated output is evaluated on both content validity and photography quality, with explicit gates determining whether to proceed or refine. When evaluation fails, the system performs failure attribution and applies targeted refinement, enabling progressive improvement through iterative self-reflection. Experiments demonstrate that our framework consistently improves aesthetic quality, narrative richness, and visual coherence, compared to direct prompting baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出自推理智能体框架，通过叙事规划、约束感知提示和迭代自反思，实现多格产品拼贴画的一致生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 叙事驱动的产品摄影在营销中日益重要，但现有图像生成方法缺乏结构化叙事规划和跨面板协调，导致故事性弱和视觉不连贯。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有连贯叙事和视觉一致性的多格产品拼贴画。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接提示生成多格拼贴画时，各面板之间缺乏协调，整体视觉不和谐，叙事性弱。
analysis.method: 自推理智能体框架：先构建产品叙事框架（身份、使用场景、环境），转化为共享视觉风格的多格布局；生成约束感知提示并联合合成拼贴画；通过内容有效性和摄影质量评估门控，失败时进行归因和定向优化，迭代自反思改进。
contributions: 提出首个用于叙事产品拼贴画生成的自推理智能体框架，集成叙事规划、约束感知生成和迭代自反思。
通过实验证明该方法在美学质量、叙事丰富性和视觉连贯性上优于直接提示基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及与直接提示基线相比有改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的产品照片和名称输入。
迭代自反思可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自推理智能体框架，通过叙事规划、约束感知提示和迭代自反思，实现多格产品拼贴画的一致生成。

papers.title: Training-inference input alignment outweighs framework choice in longitudinal retinal image prediction
papers.abstract: Predicting disease progression from longitudinal imaging is useful for clinical decision making and trial design. Recent methods have moved toward increasing generative complexity, but the conditions under which this complexity is necessary remain unclear. We propose that generative complexity should match the entropy of the predictable component of a task's conditional posterior, with training-inference input alignment required in all regimes. Two model-light measurements, a task-entropy analysis on raw image pairs and a posterior-concentration analysis on a stochastic model, let practitioners assess the complexity a task warrants before committing to a modeling framework. We validated this framework on a fundus autofluorescence (FAF) dataset by contrasting five conditioning configurations, sharing one architecture and training set, spanning standard conditional diffusion, inference-aligned stochastic training, and deterministic regression. Training-inference alignment produced large gains (delta-SSIM +0.082, SSIM +0.086, both p < 0.001), while the choice among aligned frameworks produced no clinically meaningful difference across evaluated metrics. Across two FAF platforms, inter-visit change was dominated by time-invariant acquisition variability rather than disease progression, and the stochastic models' posteriors collapsed to an effective point, explaining the framework equivalence. We trained a deterministic Temporal Retinal U-Net (TRU) and evaluated it on 28,899 eyes across three manufacturers and two modalities (two FAF platforms and en-face SLO), with three independent cohorts evaluated zero-shot. TRU matched or exceeded three published baselines on delta-SSIM, SSIM, and PSNR. These findings show that when disease progression is slow compared with acquisition variability, a deterministic regression model matches or outperforms more complex stochastic alternatives.

analysis.tldr: 纵向视网膜图像预测中，训练-推理输入对齐比生成框架选择更重要。
analysis.research_motivation: 纵向图像预测对临床决策和试验设计有价值，但现有方法趋向增加生成复杂度，而何时需要这种复杂度尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 确定在纵向视网膜图像预测中，生成复杂度是否必要，以及训练-推理输入对齐与框架选择哪个更关键。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：当疾病进展相对于采集变异性较慢时，随机模型的后验坍缩为有效点，导致框架等价；训练-推理对齐带来显著增益，而框架选择无临床意义差异。
analysis.method: 提出两种模型轻量测量（任务熵分析和后验集中分析）来评估任务所需复杂度；对比五种条件配置（标准条件扩散、对齐随机训练、确定性回归），并训练确定性Temporal Retinal U-Net (TRU)。
contributions: 提出训练-推理输入对齐比生成框架选择更重要的观点，并通过实验验证。
开发两种模型轻量测量方法，帮助从业者在选择框架前评估任务复杂度。
训练确定性TRU模型，在多个数据集上匹配或超越现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在眼底自发荧光（FAF）数据集上对比五种条件配置，并在三个制造商、两种模态（两个FAF平台和en-face SLO）的28,899只眼上零样本评估TRU。
limitations: 仅针对纵向视网膜图像预测，可能不适用于其他领域。
确定性模型在疾病进展快于采集变异性的场景下可能不如随机模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 纵向视网膜图像预测中，训练-推理输入对齐比生成框架选择更重要。

papers.title: TSM-Pose: Topology-Aware Learning with Semantic Mamba for Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Category-level object pose estimation is fundamental for embodied intelligence, yet achieving robust generalization to unseen instances remains challenging. However, existing methods mainly rely on simple feature extraction and aggregation, which struggle to capture category-shared topological structures and conduct semantic keypoint modeling, limiting their generalization. To address these, we propose a \textbf{T}opology-Aware Learning with \textbf{S}emantic \textbf{M}amba for Category-Level \textbf{P}ose Estimation framework (TSM-Pose). Specifically, we introduce a Topology Extractor to capture the global topological representation of the point cloud, which is integrated into local geometry features and enables robust category-level structural representation. Simultaneously, we propose a Mamba-based Global Semantic Aggregator that injects semantics priors into keypoints to enhance their expressiveness and leverages multiple TwinMamba blocks to model long-range dependencies for more effective global feature aggregation. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets (REAL275, CAMERA25, and HouseCat6D) demonstrate that TSM-Pose outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出拓扑感知与语义Mamba框架，提升类别级物体姿态估计的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 类别级物体姿态估计对具身智能至关重要，但现有方法难以泛化到未见实例，主要因为缺乏对类别共享拓扑结构的建模和语义关键点表示。
analysis.problem: 如何实现类别级物体姿态估计中对未见实例的鲁棒泛化，特别是捕获全局拓扑结构和语义关键点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TSM-Pose框架，包含拓扑提取器（Topology Extractor）捕获点云全局拓扑表示并融入局部几何特征，以及基于Mamba的全局语义聚合器（Global Semantic Aggregator）注入语义先验到关键点，并使用多个TwinMamba块建模长程依赖。
contributions: 提出拓扑提取器，捕获类别共享的全局拓扑结构，增强类别级结构表示。
提出基于Mamba的全局语义聚合器，注入语义先验并建模长程依赖，提升关键点表达力和特征聚合效果。
analysis.experiments: 在REAL275、CAMERA25和HouseCat6D三个基准数据集上，TSM-Pose优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量点云输入，对噪声或遮挡敏感。
Mamba模块的计算效率在实时应用中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出拓扑感知与语义Mamba框架，提升类别级物体姿态估计的泛化能力。

papers.title: Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks for Enhanced Breast Cancer Thermographic Classification: A Novel Quantum-Classical Integration Approach
papers.abstract: Breast cancer diagnosis through thermographic image analysis remains a critical challenge in medical AI, with classical deep learning approaches facing limitations in complex thermal pattern classification tasks. This paper presents a novel Hybrid Quantum Neural Network (HQNN) architecture that integrates quantum computing principles with classical convolutional neural networks for enhanced breast cancer classification. Our approach employs parameterized quantum circuits with multi-head attention mechanisms for quantum-aware feature encoding, coupled with classical convolutional layers for comprehensive pattern recognition. The quantum component utilizes a 4qubit variational circuit with strongly entangling layers, while the classical component incorporates advanced attention mechanisms for feature fusion. Experimental validation on breast cancer thermographic data demonstrates substantial performance improvements over state-of-the-art classical architectures, with the quantum-enhanced approach exhibiting superior convergence dynamics and enhanced feature representation capabilities. Our findings provide evidence for quantum advantage in medical image classification through classical simulation, establishing a framework for quantum-classical hybrid systems in healthcare applications. The methodology addresses key challenges in quantum machine learning deployment while maintaining computational feasibility on near-term quantum devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合量子神经网络（HQNN）用于乳腺癌热成像分类，在模拟中优于经典方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 乳腺癌热成像诊断中，经典深度学习在复杂热模式分类上存在局限，量子计算有望提供增强特征表示能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用量子计算提升乳腺癌热成像分类的准确性和特征提取能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合量子神经网络（HQNN），结合参数化量子电路（4量子比特变分电路，强纠缠层）与经典卷积神经网络，并引入多头注意力机制进行量子感知特征编码和融合。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的HQNN架构，集成量子计算与经典CNN用于乳腺癌分类。
通过模拟实验证明量子增强方法在收敛动态和特征表示上优于经典SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在乳腺癌热成像数据上验证，与经典SOTA对比，显示性能提升，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅基于经典模拟，未在真实量子硬件上验证。
量子优势可能受限于当前量子设备的噪声和规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合量子神经网络（HQNN）用于乳腺癌热成像分类，在模拟中优于经典方法。

papers.title: Better with Less: Tackling Heterogeneous Multi-Modal Image Joint Pretraining via Conditioned and Degraded Masked Autoencoder
papers.abstract: Learning robust representations across extremely heterogeneous modalities remains a fundamental challenge in multi-modal vision. As a critical and profound instantiation of this challenge, high-resolution (HR) joint optical and synthetic aperture radar (SAR) pretraining seeks modality synergy to mutually enhance single-source representations; its potential is severely hindered by the Heterogeneity-Resolution Paradox: finer spatial scales drastically amplify the physical divergence between complex radar geometries and non-homologous optical textures. Consequently, migrating medium-resolution-oriented rigid alignment paradigms to HR scenarios triggers either severe feature suppression to force equivalence, or feature contamination driven by extreme epistemic uncertainty. Both extremes inevitably culminate in profound representation degradation and negative transfer. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose CoDe-MAE, pioneering a \textit{better synergy with less alignment} philosophy. First, Optical-anchored Knowledge Distillation (OKD) implicitly regularizes SAR's speckle noise by mapping it into a pure semantic manifold. Building on this, Conditioned Contrastive Learning (CCL) utilizes a gradient buffering mechanism to align shared consensus while safely preserving divergent physical signatures. Concurrently, Cross-Modal Degraded Reconstruction (CDR) deliberately strips non-homologous spectral pseudo-features, truncating the inherently ill-posed mapping to capture true structural invariants. Extensive analyses validate our theoretical claims. Pretrained on 1M samples, CoDe-MAE demonstrates remarkable data efficiency, successfully preventing representation degradation and establishing new state-of-the-art performance across diverse single- and bi-modal downstream tasks, substantially outperforming foundation models scaled on vastly larger datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoDe-MAE，通过条件化与退化掩码自编码器解决高分辨率异质多模态图像联合预训练中的异质性-分辨率悖论。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率联合光学与SAR图像预训练中，空间尺度放大加剧了雷达几何与光学纹理的物理差异，导致特征抑制或污染，引发表征退化与负迁移。
analysis.problem: 克服异质性-分辨率悖论，实现高分辨率异质多模态图像的有效联合预训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到异质性-分辨率悖论：高分辨率下强制对齐导致特征抑制或污染，造成表征退化与负迁移。
analysis.method: 提出CoDe-MAE，包含光学锚定知识蒸馏（OKD）、条件对比学习（CCL）和跨模态退化重建（CDR）三个组件。
contributions: 提出CoDe-MAE框架，首次在异质多模态联合预训练中采用“更少对齐、更好协同”的策略。
通过理论分析和大量实验证明方法能有效防止表征退化，在单模态和双模态下游任务上取得新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在100万样本上预训练，在多种单/双模态下游任务上超越基于更大数据集的预训练模型。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，需要仔细调节梯度缓冲机制。
仅验证了光学与SAR模态，其他异质模态组合的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoDe-MAE，通过条件化与退化掩码自编码器解决高分辨率异质多模态图像联合预训练中的异质性-分辨率悖论。

papers.title: AutoPKG: An Automated Framework for Dynamic E-commerce Product-Attribute Knowledge Graph Construction
papers.abstract: Product attribute extraction in e-commerce is bottlenecked by ontologies that are inconsistent, incomplete, and costly to maintain. We present AutoPKG, a multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) framework that automatically constructs a Product-attribute Knowledge Graph (PKG) from multimodal product content. AutoPKG induces product types and type-specific attribute keys on demand, extracts attribute values from text and images, and consolidates updates through a centralized decision agent that maintains a globally consistent canonical graph. We also propose an evaluation protocol for dynamic PKGs that measures type and key validity, consolidation quality, and edge-level accuracy for value assertions after canonicalization. On a large real-world marketplace catalog dataset from Lazada (Alibaba), AutoPKG achieves up to 0.953 Weighted Knowledge Efficiency (WKE) for product types, 0.724 WKE for attribute keys, and 0.531 edge-level F1 for multimodal value extraction. Across three public benchmarks, our method improves edge-level exact-match F1 by 0.152 and yields a precision gain of 0.208 on the attribute extraction application. Online A/B tests show that AutoPKG-derived attributes increase Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) in Badge by 3.81 percent, in Search by 5.32 percent, and in Recommendation by 7.89 percent, supporting the practical value of AutoPKG in production.

analysis.tldr: AutoPKG 利用多智能体 LLM 框架自动从多模态商品内容构建产品属性知识图谱，显著提升电商属性提取效果和业务指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 电商产品属性提取受限于不一致、不完整且维护成本高的本体，亟需自动化构建动态知识图谱的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从多模态商品内容中构建一致、完整的产品属性知识图谱，并支持动态更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体 LLM 框架 AutoPKG，包含诱导产品类型和属性键、从文本和图像提取属性值、以及通过集中决策代理维护全局一致规范图的模块。
contributions: 提出 AutoPKG 框架，自动构建动态产品属性知识图谱。
设计针对动态 PKG 的评估协议，涵盖类型和键有效性、整合质量及边级准确性。
在真实电商数据集和公开基准上取得显著提升，在线 A/B 测试验证业务价值。
analysis.experiments: 在 Lazada 真实数据集上，产品类型 WKE 达 0.953，属性键 WKE 达 0.724，多模态值提取边级 F1 为 0.531；三个公开基准上边级精确匹配 F1 提升 0.152，属性提取精度提升 0.208；在线 A/B 测试显示 GMV 在 Badge、Search、Recommendation 分别提升 3.81%、5.32%、7.89%。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的推理能力，对低资源语言或长尾品类效果未知。
框架复杂度较高，多智能体协作可能引入额外延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoPKG 利用多智能体 LLM 框架自动从多模态商品内容构建产品属性知识图谱，显著提升电商属性提取效果和业务指标。

papers.title: Structured 3D-SVD: A Practical Framework for the Compression and Reconstruction of Biological Volumetric Images
papers.abstract: This work introduces Structured 3D-SVD as a practical framework for the reconstruction, compression, and analysis of biological volumetric data. Inspired by the logic of matrix singular value decomposition (SVD), the proposed approach represents third-order volumetric data in the spatial domain and supports progressive reconstruction through ordered quasi-singular coeffients. The experimental evaluation was carried out on two biological volumetric datasets: one full-volume scan of a fish and another of a brain. The results show that Structured 3D-SVD achieves reconstruction quality close to that of Tucker decomposition while requiring shorter computation times and outperforms canonical polyadic decomposition (CPD) in both accuracy and runtime. In addition, a progressive reconstruction analysis shows that relatively low truncation levels are sufficient to preserve the main volumetric structures, while higher truncation levels lead to more detailed reconstructions.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化3D-SVD框架，用于生物体积图像的压缩与重建，在精度和速度上优于CPD，接近Tucker分解。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物体积图像数据量大，需要高效的压缩与重建方法，现有方法如Tucker分解计算时间长，CPD精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何实现生物体积图像的高效压缩与渐进式重建，平衡重建质量与计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化3D-SVD，将三阶体积数据在空间域表示，通过有序准奇异系数支持渐进式重建。
contributions: 提出结构化3D-SVD框架，用于生物体积图像的压缩与重建。
实验表明该方法在重建质量上接近Tucker分解，计算时间更短，且优于CPD。
analysis.experiments: 在两个生物体积数据集（鱼全脑扫描和脑扫描）上评估，比较了Tucker分解和CPD，进行了渐进式重建分析。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的生物体积数据。
未讨论在更大规模或更复杂数据集上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化3D-SVD框架，用于生物体积图像的压缩与重建，在精度和速度上优于CPD，接近Tucker分解。

papers.title: MEMRES: A Memory-Augmented Resolver with Confidence Cascade for Agentic Python Dependency Resolution
papers.abstract: We present MEMRES, an agentic system for Python dependency resolution that introduces a multi-level confidence cascade where the LLM serves as the last resort. Our system combines: (1) a Self-Evolving Memory that accumulates reusable resolution patterns via tips and shortcuts; (2) an Error Pattern Knowledge Base with 200+ curated import-to-package mappings; (3) a Semantic Import Analyzer; and (4) a Python 2 heuristic detector resolving the largest failure category. On HG2.9K using Gemma-2 9B (10 GB VRAM). MEMRES resolves 2503 of 2890 (86.6%, 10-run average) snippets, combining intra-session memory with our confidence cascade for the remainder. This already exceeds PLLM's 54.7% overall success rate by a wide margin.

analysis.tldr: MEMRES 通过记忆增强和置信度级联，在低资源 LLM 上显著提升 Python 依赖解析成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: Python 依赖解析在 Agent 系统中至关重要，但现有方法依赖大型 LLM 或规则，存在资源消耗大、失败模式多等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用轻量级 LLM 和结构化知识库高效解决 Python 依赖解析问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MEMRES 系统，包含自进化记忆、错误模式知识库、语义导入分析器和 Python 2 启发式检测器，并通过多级置信度级联将 LLM 作为最后手段。
contributions: 提出一种记忆增强的置信度级联框架，减少对 LLM 的依赖。
构建包含 200+ 映射的错误模式知识库和自进化记忆机制。
在 HG2.9K 基准上使用 Gemma-2 9B 达到 86.6% 的解析成功率，远超 PLLM 的 54.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在 HG2.9K 数据集上使用 Gemma-2 9B 模型，10 次运行平均解析 2890 个片段中的 2503 个（86.6%），并与 PLLM 的 54.7% 对比。
limitations: 可能依赖特定知识库的维护和更新。
实验仅基于单一模型和数据集，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MEMRES 通过记忆增强和置信度级联，在低资源 LLM 上显著提升 Python 依赖解析成功率。

papers.title: D-QRELO: Training- and Data-Free Delta Compression for Large Language Models via Quantization and Residual Low-Rank Approximation
papers.abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) accelerates taskspecific large language models (LLMs) development, but the resulting proliferation of finetuned models incurs substantial memory overhead. Delta compression addresses this by retaining a single pre-trained LLM with multiple compressed delta weights. However, existing methods fail on models fine-tuned with largescale datasets. We find that larger SFT data scale amplifies delta parameter magnitude, singular values, and entropy, exacerbating compression errors. To tackle this, we propose DQRELO (Delta Compression via Quantization and Residual Low-Rank), a novel training- and data-free delta compression method. It combines coarse-grained one-bit quantization to capture the dominant structure of the delta, followed by compensated residual low-rank approximation to recover fine-grained details from the smaller residual error. Experiments on various LLMs spanning dense and MoE architectures across multiple domains under this challenging setting demonstrate that DQRELO outperforms existing methods. Moreover, we establish key design principles for delta compression through extensive empirical analysis, demonstrating how task difficulty, architecture, and layer positioning create predictable patterns that can guide optimal compression strategies in production systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练和数据的增量压缩方法，通过粗粒度量化加残差低秩近似，解决大规模微调数据下增量压缩效果差的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调模型数量激增导致存储开销巨大，现有增量压缩方法在大规模微调数据集上效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用训练数据和额外训练的情况下，高效压缩大规模微调产生的增量权重。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现更大的微调数据规模会放大增量参数的幅度、奇异值和熵，从而加剧压缩误差。
analysis.method: 先对增量权重进行粗粒度1比特量化以捕获主要结构，再对残差进行低秩近似以恢复细粒度细节。
contributions: 提出DQRELO，一种无需训练和数据的增量压缩方法，结合量化与残差低秩近似。
通过大量实验揭示了任务难度、架构和层位置对压缩效果的影响规律，为生产系统提供设计原则。
analysis.experiments: 在多种密集和MoE架构的LLM上，跨多个领域进行实验，DQRELO优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的微调任务或模型架构。
未讨论压缩后模型在下游任务上的性能损失细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练和数据的增量压缩方法，通过粗粒度量化加残差低秩近似，解决大规模微调数据下增量压缩效果差的问题。

papers.title: Adaptive receptive field-based spatial-frequency feature reconstruction network for few-shot fine-grained image classification
papers.abstract: Feature reconstruction techniques are widely applied for few-shot fine-grained image classification (FSFGIC). Our research indicates that one of the main challenges facing existing feature-based FSFGIC methods is how to choose the size of the receptive field to extract feature descriptors (including spatial and frequency feature descriptors) from different category input images, thereby better performing the FSFGIC tasks. To address this, an adaptive receptive field-based spatial-frequency feature reconstruction network (ARF-SFR-Net) is proposed. The designed ARF-SFR-Net has the capability to adaptively determine receptive field sizes for obtaining spatial and frequency features, and effectively fuse them for reconstruction and FSFGIC tasks. The designed ARF-SFR-Net can be easily embedded into a given episodic training mechanism for end-to-end training from scratch. Extensive experiments on multiple FSFGIC benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed ARF-SFR-Net over state-of-the-art approaches. The code is available at: https://github.com/ICL-SUST/ARF-SFR-Net.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应感受野的空间-频率特征重建网络，用于小样本细粒度图像分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于特征重建的小样本细粒度图像分类方法难以自适应选择感受野大小来提取不同类别图像的空间和频率特征描述符，导致分类性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应确定感受野大小以提取空间和频率特征，并有效融合用于特征重建和分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出感受野大小选择是现有方法的主要挑战之一，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自适应感受野的空间-频率特征重建网络（ARF-SFR-Net），能够自适应确定感受野大小以获取空间和频率特征，并有效融合用于重建和分类。网络可嵌入情景训练机制进行端到端训练。
contributions: 提出自适应感受野机制，动态选择空间和频率特征提取的感受野大小。
设计空间-频率特征融合与重建网络，提升小样本细粒度图像分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个小样本细粒度图像分类基准数据集上进行了实验，结果表明所提方法优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能对感受野自适应策略的泛化性未充分验证。
计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应感受野的空间-频率特征重建网络，用于小样本细粒度图像分类。

papers.title: LLMs can persuade only psychologically susceptible humans on societal issues, via trust in AI and emotional appeals, amid logical fallacies
papers.abstract: Scarce longitudinal evidence examines LLMs' persuasiveness and humanness along time-evolving psychological frameworks. We introduce Talk2AI, a longitudinal framework quantifying psycho-social, reasoning and affective dimensions of LLMs' persuasiveness about polarizing societal topics. In a four-way longitudinal setup, Talk2AI's 770 participants engaged in structured conversations with one of four leading LLMs on topics like climate change, social media misinformation, and math anxiety. This produced 3,080 conversations over 60,000 turns. After each wave, participants reported conviction in their initial topic stance, perceived opinion change, LLM's perceived humanness, a self-donation to the topic and a textual explanation. Feedback time series showed longitudinal inertia in convictions, indicating some human anchoring to initial opinions even after repeated exposure to AI-generated arguments. Interestingly, NLP analyses revealed that both humans and LLMs relied on fallacious reasoning in 1 conversational quip every 6, countering the ``LLMs as superior systems" stereotype behind LLMs' cognitive surrender. LLMs' perceived humanness was most learnable from sociodemographic, psychological and engagement features ($R^2=0.44$), followed by opinion change ($R^2=0.34$), conviction ($R^2=0.26$) and personal endowment ($R^2=0.24$). Crucially, explainable AI (XAI) indicated: (i) the presence of individuals more susceptible to LLM-based opinion changes; (ii) psychological susceptibility to LLM-convincing consisted of having more trust in LLMs, being more agreeable and extraverted and with a higher need for cognition. A multiverse approach with mixed-effects models confirmed XAI results, alongside strong individual differences. Talk2AI provides a grounded framework and evidence for detecting how GenAI can influence human opinions via multiple psycho-social pathways in AI-human digital platforms.

analysis.tldr: LLMs 的说服力仅对心理易感性高的人群有效，且依赖于信任、情感诉求和逻辑谬误。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究缺乏纵向证据来检验 LLMs 的说服力和拟人化程度随时间演变的心理机制。
analysis.problem: 量化 LLMs 在极化社会议题上的说服力及其心理、推理和情感维度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类和 LLMs 在对话中每 6 次交锋就出现一次谬误推理，反驳了“LLMs 是优越系统”的刻板印象；人类对初始观点存在纵向惯性。
analysis.method: 提出 Talk2AI 纵向框架，通过四波对话实验收集 770 名参与者的反馈时间序列，结合 NLP 分析和可解释 AI 进行多维度量化。
contributions: 引入 Talk2AI 框架，首次纵向量化 LLMs 的说服力与拟人化程度。
发现 LLMs 的说服力仅对心理易感性高（信任 AI、高宜人性、高外向性、高认知需求）的人群有效。
揭示人类和 LLMs 均频繁使用谬误推理，挑战了 LLMs 认知优越的假设。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本可能不具有全球代表性。
仅涉及四个 LLMs，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs 的说服力仅对心理易感性高的人群有效，且依赖于信任、情感诉求和逻辑谬误。

papers.title: PivotMerge: Bridging Heterogeneous Multimodal Pre-training via Post-Alignment Model Merging
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) rely on multimodal pre-training over diverse data sources, where different datasets often induce complementary cross-modal alignment capabilities. Model merging provides a cost-effective mechanism for integrating multiple expert MLLMs with complementary strengths into a unified model. However, existing model merging research mainly focuses on post-finetuning scenarios, leaving the pre-training stage largely unexplored. We argue that the core of MLLM pre-training lies in establishing effective cross-modal alignment, which bridges visual and textual representations into a unified semantic space. Motivated by this insight, we introduce the post-alignment merging task, which aims to integrate cross-modal alignment capabilities learned from heterogeneous multimodal pre-training. This setting introduces two key challenges: cross-domain parameter interference, where parameter updates learned from different data distributions conflict during merging, and layer-wise alignment contribution disparity, where different layers and projectors contribute unevenly to cross-modal alignment. To address them, we propose \textbf{PivotMerge}, a post-alignment merging framework for cross-modal projectors. PivotMerge incorporates two key components: Shared-space Decomposition and Filtering, which disentangles shared alignment patterns from domain-specific variations and suppresses conflicting directions, and Alignment-guided Layer-wise Merging, which assigns layer-specific merging weights based on differing alignment contributions. We construct systematic CC12M-based post-alignment merging scenarios for evaluation. Extensive experiments on multiple multimodal benchmarks show that PivotMerge consistently outperforms existing baselines, demonstrating its effectiveness and generalization ability.

analysis.tldr: 提出PivotMerge框架，通过共享空间分解与对齐引导层合并，解决多模态预训练后对齐中的参数干扰与层贡献差异问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型合并研究主要聚焦微调后场景，忽略了多模态大模型预训练阶段中跨模态对齐能力整合的需求，而不同数据源预训练产生的对齐能力互补但难以直接融合。
analysis.problem: 如何有效合并从异构多模态预训练中学到的跨模态对齐能力，克服跨域参数干扰和层间对齐贡献不均衡两大挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出跨域参数干扰（不同数据分布的参数更新冲突）和层间对齐贡献差异（不同层/投影器对对齐贡献不均）是后对齐合并的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出PivotMerge框架，包含共享空间分解与过滤（分离共享对齐模式与领域特定变化并抑制冲突方向）和对齐引导的层合并（根据对齐贡献分配层特定合并权重）。
contributions: 首次定义并形式化多模态预训练后的后对齐合并任务，揭示其两大核心挑战。
提出PivotMerge框架，通过共享空间分解与对齐引导层合并有效整合跨模态对齐能力。
在基于CC12M构建的系统性评测场景中，PivotMerge在多个多模态基准上超越现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 基于CC12M构建后对齐合并场景，在多个多模态基准上进行评估，PivotMerge一致优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定投影器架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
共享空间分解的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PivotMerge框架，通过共享空间分解与对齐引导层合并，解决多模态预训练后对齐中的参数干扰与层贡献差异问题。

papers.title: Playing Psychic: Using Thought Trees to Predict Reasoning Models Accuracy on Coding Tasks
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown that test-time scaling can substantially improve model performance on complex tasks, particularly in the coding domain. Under this paradigm, models use a larger token budget during inference to generate intermediate reasoning traces before producing a final answer. However, current evaluations primarily rely on competitive programming benchmarks, which may not capture the full range of reasoning abilities. In this work, we perform a systematic study of frontier reasoning models to understand their performance on real-world coding benchmarks. To gain more insights into the performance of such models, we devise a programmatic way to {\em automatically generate} coding tasks of arbitrary difficulty and structure from existing benchmarks. Using this framework, our analysis reveals that the structure of a reasoning trace, not just its contents, is a strong predictor of correctness. Motivated by this, we propose structured thought-trees as means to represent reasoning traces. To illustrate their use, we train a lightweight classifier on features extracted from thought-trees to predict trace correctness, and demonstrate that flagging and retrying structurally anomalous traces based on the extracted features yields consistent gains at lower complexity levels.

analysis.tldr: 通过思维树结构预测推理模型在编程任务上的正确性，并利用异常轨迹重试提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估主要依赖竞争性编程基准，无法全面反映推理模型在真实世界编程任务上的表现，且缺乏对推理轨迹结构与正确性关系的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估前沿推理模型在真实编程任务上的性能，并利用推理轨迹结构预测正确性以提升效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理轨迹的结构（而非仅内容）是正确性的强预测因子。
analysis.method: 提出结构化思维树表示推理轨迹，训练轻量级分类器基于思维树特征预测轨迹正确性，并对结构异常轨迹进行标记和重试。
contributions: 系统研究了前沿推理模型在真实编程基准上的表现。
提出自动生成任意难度和结构编程任务的框架。
发现推理轨迹结构是正确性的强预测因子，并基于此提出思维树方法和异常重试策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法仅在较低复杂度级别上验证了增益。
轻量级分类器的泛化能力可能受限于任务类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过思维树结构预测推理模型在编程任务上的正确性，并利用异常轨迹重试提升性能。

papers.title: CoGR-MoE: Concept-Guided Expert Routing with Consistent Selection and Flexible Reasoning for Visual Question Answering
papers.abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) requires models to identify the correct answer options based on both visual and textual evidence. Recent Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) methods improve option reasoning by grouping similar concepts or routing based on examples. However, unstable routing can lead to inconsistent expert selection in the same question type, while overly stable routing may reduce flexibility. To address this, we propose Concept-Guided Routing framework (CoGR-MoE), which incorporates semantics of the answer options to guide expert selection in the training phase. Next, option features are used to reweight the selected experts, producing discriminative representations for each candidate option. These option-level representations are further used for option comparison and optimized via contrastive learning. The experimental results indicate that CoGR-MoE delivers strong performance across multiple VQA tasks, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出概念引导的专家路由框架CoGR-MoE，通过选项语义指导专家选择与对比学习提升VQA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MoE方法在VQA中路由不稳定，导致同类问题专家选择不一致或缺乏灵活性，影响推理效果。
analysis.problem: 如何利用答案选项的语义信息稳定且灵活地引导专家路由，以提升VQA中选项推理的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出不稳定路由导致同类问题专家选择不一致，而过度稳定则降低灵活性。
analysis.method: 提出CoGR-MoE框架，在训练阶段利用答案选项语义指导专家选择，并用选项特征重加权专家输出，通过对比学习优化选项级表示。
contributions: 提出概念引导的专家路由机制，利用选项语义稳定专家选择。
引入选项特征重加权和对比学习，增强选项判别性表示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量选项语义表示。
对比学习训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概念引导的专家路由框架CoGR-MoE，通过选项语义指导专家选择与对比学习提升VQA性能。

papers.title: Test-Time Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models: A Systematic Study under Real-World Distribution Shifts
papers.abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models have shown strong potential for learning generalizable representations from large-scale neural data, yet their clinical deployment is hindered by distribution shifts across clinical settings, devices, and populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) offers a promising solution by enabling models to adapt to unlabeled target data during inference without access to source data, a valuable property in healthcare settings constrained by privacy regulations and limited labeled data. However, its effectiveness for EEG remains largely underexplored. In this work, we introduce NeuroAdapt-Bench, a systematic benchmark for evaluating test-time adaptation methods on EEG foundation models under realistic distribution shifts. We evaluate representative TTA approaches from other domains across multiple pretrained foundation models, diverse downstream tasks, and heterogeneous datasets spanning in-distribution, out-of-distribution, and extreme modality shifts (e.g., Ear-EEG). Our results show that standard TTA methods yield inconsistent gains and often degrade performance, with gradient-based approaches particularly prone to heavy degradation. In contrast, optimization-free methods demonstrate greater stability and more reliable improvements. These findings highlight the limitations of existing TTA techniques in EEG, provide guidance for future development, and underscore the need for domain-specific adaptation strategies.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估了测试时自适应方法在脑电基础模型上的表现，发现无优化方法更稳定可靠。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑电基础模型在临床部署中面临分布偏移问题，而测试时自适应（TTA）无需源数据即可适应目标域，但现有TTA方法在脑电领域的有效性尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 评估现有测试时自适应方法在脑电基础模型上应对真实世界分布偏移的效果，并识别其局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准TTA方法在脑电任务上效果不一致且常导致性能下降，基于梯度的方法尤其容易严重退化，而无优化方法更稳定可靠。
analysis.method: 构建了NeuroAdapt-Bench基准，在多个预训练基础模型、下游任务和异构数据集上系统评估代表性TTA方法。
contributions: 首次系统评估测试时自适应方法在脑电基础模型上的表现
构建了NeuroAdapt-Bench基准，涵盖多种分布偏移场景
揭示了现有TTA方法在脑电领域的局限性，并指出无优化方法更优
analysis.experiments: 在多个预训练基础模型、下游任务和数据集上评估了代表性TTA方法，包括分布内、分布外和极端模态偏移场景。
limitations: 仅评估了现有TTA方法，未提出新的脑电专用自适应策略
基准可能未覆盖所有临床分布偏移类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学

papers.title: Rethinking Cross-Dose PET Denoising: Mitigating Averaging Effects via Residual Noise Learning
papers.abstract: Cross-dose denoising for low-dose positron emission tomography (LDPET) has been proposed to address the limited generalization of models trained at a single noise level. In practice, neural networks trained on a specific dose level often fail to generalize to other dose conditions due to variations in noise magnitude and statistical properties. Conventional "one-size-for-all" models attempt to handle this variability but tend to learn averaged representations across noise levels, resulting in degraded performance. In this work, we analyze this limitation and show that standard training formulations implicitly optimize an expectation over heterogeneous noise distributions. To this end, we propose a unified residual noise learning framework that estimates noise directly from low-dose PET images rather than predicting full-dose images. Experiments on large-scale multi-dose PET datasets from two medical centers demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the "one-size-for-all" model, individual dose-specific U-Net models, and dose-conditioned approaches, achieving improved denoising performance. These results indicate that residual noise learning effectively mitigates the averaging effect and enhances generalization for cross-dose PET denoising.

analysis.tldr: 提出残差噪声学习框架，通过直接估计噪声而非预测全剂量图像，缓解跨剂量PET去噪中的平均效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 低剂量PET去噪模型在单一剂量水平上训练后难以泛化到其他剂量条件，而传统'一刀切'模型会学习噪声水平的平均表示，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决跨剂量PET去噪中模型因噪声幅度和统计特性变化而泛化能力差，以及标准训练隐式优化异质噪声分布期望导致的平均效应问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准训练公式隐式优化了异质噪声分布的期望，导致模型学习到平均化表示，从而在跨剂量场景下性能退化。
analysis.method: 提出统一残差噪声学习框架，直接从低剂量PET图像估计噪声，而非预测全剂量图像。
contributions: 分析了跨剂量PET去噪中平均效应的成因，即标准训练隐式优化异质噪声分布的期望。
提出残差噪声学习框架，通过直接估计噪声来缓解平均效应，提升跨剂量泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个医疗中心的大规模多剂量PET数据集上，所提方法优于'一刀切'模型、剂量特定U-Net和剂量条件方法，取得了更好的去噪性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及对极端低剂量或高噪声场景的鲁棒性。
可能依赖多剂量训练数据，在仅有单剂量数据时适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出残差噪声学习框架，通过直接估计噪声而非预测全剂量图像，缓解跨剂量PET去噪中的平均效应。

papers.title: Alignment Imprint: Zero-Shot AI-Generated Text Detection via Provable Preference Discrepancy
papers.abstract: Detecting AI-generated text is an important but challenging problem. Existing likelihood-based detection methods are often sensitive to content complexity and may exhibit unstable performance. In this paper, our key insight is that modern Large Language Models (LLMs) undergo alignment (including fine-tuning and preference tuning), leaving a measurable distributional imprint. We theoretically derive this imprint by abstracting the alignment process as a sequence of constrained optimization steps, showing that the log-likelihood ratio can naturally decompose into implicit instructional biases and preference rewards. We refer to this quantity as the Alignment Imprint. Furthermore, to mitigate the instability in high-entropy regions, we introduce Log-likelihood Alignment Preference Discrepancy (LAPD), a standardized information-weighted statistic based on alignment imprint. We provide statistical guarantee that alignment-based statistics dominate Fast-DetectGPT in performance. We also theoretically show that LAPD strictly improves the unweighted alignment scores when the aligned and base models are close in distribution. Extensive experiments show that LAPD achieves an improvement 45.82% relative to the strongest existing baselines, yielding large and consistent gains across all settings.

analysis.tldr: 利用对齐过程留下的分布印记，提出LAPD统计量实现零样本AI文本检测，性能大幅超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于似然的AI文本检测方法对内容复杂度敏感，性能不稳定，亟需更鲁棒的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM对齐过程留下的分布印记，实现零样本、高鲁棒性的AI生成文本检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM经过对齐（微调、偏好调优）后，其输出分布会留下可测量的印记，该印记可分解为隐式指令偏差和偏好奖励。
analysis.method: 将对齐过程抽象为约束优化步骤，理论推导出对齐印记（Alignment Imprint）作为对数似然比的分解；进一步提出标准化信息加权统计量LAPD，缓解高熵区域的不稳定性。
contributions: 理论推导了对齐过程留下的分布印记，并证明基于对齐的统计量在性能上优于Fast-DetectGPT。
提出LAPD统计量，严格改进了未加权的对齐分数，并在实验中相对最强基线提升45.82%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，仅报告了相对最强基线提升45.82%，且在所有设置下均有一致增益。
limitations: 依赖对齐模型与基座模型的分布接近假设，可能不适用于对齐程度极低的模型。
理论保证主要针对统计量优劣，实际部署中的计算开销和泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用对齐过程留下的分布印记，提出LAPD统计量实现零样本AI文本检测，性能大幅超越现有方法。

papers.title: ClimAgent: LLM as Agents for Autonomous Open-ended Climate Science Analysis
papers.abstract: Climate research is pivotal for mitigating global environmental crises, yet the accelerating volume of multi-scale datasets and the complexity of analytical tools have created significant bottlenecks, constraining scientific discovery to fragmented and labor-intensive workflows. While the emergence Large Language Models (LLMs) offers a transformative paradigm to scale scientific expertise, existing explorations remain largely confined to simple Question-Answering (Q&A) tasks. These approaches often oversimplify real-world challenges, neglecting the intricate physical constraints and the data-driven nature required in professional climate science.To bridge this gap, we introduce ClimAgent, a general-purpose autonomous framework designed to execute a wide spectrum of research tasks across diverse climate sub-fields. By integrating a unified tool-use environment with rigorous reasoning protocols, ClimAgent transcends simple retrieval to perform end-to-end modeling and analysis. To foster systematic evaluation, we propose ClimaBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for real-world climate discovery. It encompasses challenging problems spanning 5 distinct task categories derived from professional scenarios between 2000 and 2025. Experiments on ClimaBench demonstrate that ClimAgent significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving a 40.21% improvement over original LLM solutions in solution rigorousness and practicality. Our code are available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/ClimAgent.

analysis.tldr: 提出ClimAgent框架，将LLM作为智能体用于自动化气候科学分析，并构建ClimaBench基准，性能提升40.21%。
analysis.research_motivation: 气候研究依赖多尺度数据集和复杂分析工具，但现有工作流碎片化且劳动密集，LLM在气候科学中的应用仅限于简单问答，缺乏对物理约束和数据驱动需求的考虑。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个通用的自主框架，使LLM能够执行气候科学中的端到端建模与分析任务，并建立系统评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LLM在气候科学中的应用仅局限于简单问答，无法处理真实世界中的复杂物理约束和数据驱动分析需求。
analysis.method: ClimAgent：集成统一工具使用环境和严格推理协议，实现端到端建模与分析；ClimaBench：首个面向真实气候发现的综合基准，包含2000-2025年间5类专业任务。
contributions: 提出ClimAgent，一个通用的自主框架，将LLM作为智能体用于开放式的气候科学分析。
构建ClimaBench，首个涵盖多类别专业气候任务的综合基准。
实验表明ClimAgent在解决方案严谨性和实用性上比原始LLM提升40.21%。
analysis.experiments: 在ClimaBench上评估，ClimAgent相比基线方法在严谨性和实用性上提升40.21%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具集，泛化到其他科学领域需调整。
基准任务覆盖2000-2025年，未来任务可能超出范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ClimAgent框架，将LLM作为智能体用于自动化气候科学分析，并构建ClimaBench基准，性能提升40.21%。

papers.title: Noise-Adaptive Diffusion Sampling for Inverse Problems Without Task-Specific Tuning
papers.abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have recently shown remarkable performance on inverse problems (IPs). Optimization-based methods can fast solve IPs using DMs as powerful regularizers, but they are susceptible to local minima and noise overfitting. Although DMs can provide strong priors for Bayesian approaches, enforcing measurement consistency during the denoising process leads to manifold infeasibility issues. We propose Noise-space Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (N-HMC), a posterior sampling method that treats reverse diffusion as a deterministic mapping from initial noise to clean images. N-HMC enables comprehensive exploration of the solution space, avoiding local optima. By moving inference entirely into the initial-noise space, N-HMC keeps proposals on the learned data manifold. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis of our approach and extend the framework to a noise-adaptive variant (NA-NHMC) that effectively handles IPs with unknown noise type and level. Extensive experiments across four linear and three nonlinear inverse problems demonstrate that NA-NHMC achieves superior reconstruction quality with robust performance across different hyperparameters and initializations, significantly outperforming recent state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at https://github.com/NA-HMC/NA-HMC.

analysis.tldr: 提出噪声空间哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法，在初始噪声空间进行后验采样，避免局部最优和流形不可行问题，并扩展为噪声自适应变体以处理未知噪声类型和水平的逆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在逆问题中表现出色，但现有优化方法易陷入局部最优和噪声过拟合，贝叶斯方法则面临流形不可行问题，亟需一种能全面探索解空间且保持流形约束的采样方法。
analysis.problem: 解决扩散模型用于逆问题时，优化方法易陷入局部最优和噪声过拟合，以及贝叶斯方法中强制测量一致性导致流形不可行的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出噪声空间哈密顿蒙特卡洛（N-HMC），将反向扩散视为从初始噪声到干净图像的确定性映射，在初始噪声空间进行后验采样，避免局部最优并保持流形约束；进一步扩展为噪声自适应变体（NA-NHMC），处理未知噪声类型和水平的逆问题。
contributions: 提出N-HMC方法，在初始噪声空间进行后验采样，避免局部最优和流形不可行问题。
扩展为噪声自适应变体NA-NHMC，有效处理未知噪声类型和水平的逆问题。
在四个线性和三个非线性逆问题上取得优于现有方法的性能，并提供理论分析。
analysis.experiments: 在四个线性和三个非线性逆问题上进行实验，NA-NHMC在不同超参数和初始化下均表现出鲁棒性，显著优于最新方法。
limitations: 可能对复杂非线性逆问题的计算开销较高。
噪声自适应机制可能依赖噪声模型的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出噪声空间哈密顿蒙特卡洛方法，在初始噪声空间进行后验采样，避免局部最优和流形不可行问题，并扩展为噪声自适应变体以处理未知噪声类型和水平的逆问题。

papers.title: KIRA: Knowledge-Intensive Image Retrieval and Reasoning Architecture for Specialized Visual Domains
papers.abstract: Retrieval augmented generation (RAG) has transformed text based question answering, yet its extension to visual domains remains hindered by fundamental challenges: bridging the modality gap between image queries and text heavy knowledge bases, constructing semantically meaningful visual knowledge bases, performing multihop reasoning over retrieved images, and verifying that generated answers are faithfully grounded in visual evidence. We present KIRA (Knowledge Intensive Image Retrieval and Reasoning Architecture), a unified five stage framework that addresses ten core problems in visual RAG for specialized domains. KIRA introduces: (1) hierarchical semantic chunking with DINO based region detection for multi granularity knowledge base construction, (2) domain adaptive contrastive encoders with fewshot adaptation for rare visual concepts, (3) dualpath crossmodal retrieval with chainOfThought query expansion, (4) chainOfRetrieval for multihop visual reasoning with temporal and multiview support, and (5) evidence conditioned grounded generation with posthoc hallucination verification. We also propose DOMAINVQAR, a benchmark suite that evaluates visual RAG along three axes (retrieval precision, reasoning faithfulness, and domain correctness) going beyond standard recall metrics. Experiments across four specialized domains (medical Xray, circuit diagrams, satellite imagery, and histopathology) with a progressive six variant ablation demonstrate that KIRA achieves 0.97 retrieval precision, 1.0 grounding scores, and 0.707 domain correctness averaged across domains, while the ablation reveals actionable insights about when each component helps and when components introduce precision diversity tradeoffs that must be managed. Code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: KIRA 提出统一五阶段框架，通过分层语义分块、域自适应对比编码器、双路径跨模态检索、链式检索和证据条件生成，解决专业视觉领域的 RAG 核心问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）在文本问答中取得成功，但扩展到视觉领域面临模态鸿沟、视觉知识库构建、多跳推理和生成忠实性验证等挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决专业视觉领域中图像查询与文本知识库的模态对齐、多粒度知识库构建、多跳视觉推理和生成结果的可信验证问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 五阶段框架：1) 基于 DINO 的分层语义分块构建多粒度知识库；2) 域自适应对比编码器支持少样本适应罕见视觉概念；3) 双路径跨模态检索结合思维链查询扩展；4) 链式检索实现多跳视觉推理（支持时序和多视角）；5) 证据条件生成与事后幻觉验证。
contributions: 提出 KIRA 统一五阶段框架，解决视觉 RAG 的十个核心问题。
提出 DOMAINVQAR 基准，从检索精度、推理忠实性和领域正确性三个维度评估视觉 RAG。
analysis.experiments: 在医学X光、电路图、卫星图像和病理学四个专业领域进行实验，六种变体消融实验显示平均检索精度0.97、基础分数1.0、领域正确性0.707。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域知识库构建质量。
多跳推理的复杂度可能随检索步骤增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KIRA 提出统一五阶段框架，通过分层语义分块、域自适应对比编码器、双路径跨模态检索、链式检索和证据条件生成，解决专业视觉领域的 RAG 核心问题。

papers.title: Unified Ultrasound Intelligence Toward an End-to-End Agentic System
papers.abstract: Clinical ultrasound analysis demands models that generalize across heterogeneous organs, views, and devices, while supporting interpretable workflow-level analysis. Existing methods often rely on task-wise adaptation, and joint learning may be unstable due to cross-task interference, making it hard to deliver workflow-level outputs in practice. To address these challenges, we present USTri, a tri-stage ultrasound intelligence pipeline for unified multi-organ, multi-task analysis. Stage I trains a universal generalist USGen on different domains to learn broad, transferable priors that are robust to device and protocol variability. To better handle domain shifts and reach task-aligned performance while preserving ultrasound shared knowledge, Stage II builds USpec by keeping USGen frozen and finetuning dataset-specific heads. Stage III introduces USAgent, which mimics clinician workflows by orchestrating USpec specialists for multi-step inference and deterministic structured reports. On the FMC\_UIA validation set, our model achieves the best overall performance across 4 task types and 27 datasets, outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, qualitative results show that USAgent produces clinically structured reports with high accuracy and interpretability. Our study suggests a scalable path to ultrasound intelligence that generalizes across heterogeneous ultrasound tasks and supports consistent end-to-end clinical workflows. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/MacDunno/USTri.

analysis.tldr: 提出三阶段超声智能流水线USTri，实现跨器官、视图和设备的统一多任务分析，并支持端到端临床工作流。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床超声分析需要跨异构器官、视图和设备的通用模型，并支持可解释的工作流级分析，但现有方法依赖任务级适配，联合学习因跨任务干扰而不稳定，难以提供工作流级输出。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的超声智能系统，使其能泛化到多种器官、视图和设备，同时支持多步推理和结构化报告生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出联合学习因跨任务干扰而不稳定，导致难以实现工作流级输出。
analysis.method: 三阶段流水线：Stage I训练通用基础模型USGen学习跨域先验；Stage II冻结USGen并微调数据集特定头得到USpec；Stage III引入USAgent模拟临床工作流，编排USpec专家进行多步推理并生成确定性结构化报告。
contributions: 提出USTri三阶段超声智能流水线，实现统一的多器官、多任务分析。
引入USAgent模拟临床工作流，支持多步推理和结构化报告生成。
在FMC_UIA验证集上，4种任务类型和27个数据集上取得最佳整体性能。
analysis.experiments: 在FMC_UIA验证集上评估，涵盖4种任务类型和27个数据集，与最先进方法比较取得最佳整体性能；定性结果显示USAgent生成临床结构化报告具有高准确性和可解释性。
limitations: 摘要未提及在真实临床环境中的部署验证。
可能依赖特定数据集（FMC_UIA），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三阶段超声智能流水线USTri，实现跨器官、视图和设备的统一多任务分析，并支持端到端临床工作流。
