papers.title: The Cognitive Penalty: Ablating System 1 and System 2 Reasoning in Edge-Native SLMs for Decentralized Consensus
papers.abstract: Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs) are inclined explore Small Language Models (SLMs) as edge-native constitutional firewalls to vet proposals and mitigate semantic social engineering. While scaling inference-time compute (System 2) enhances formal logic, its efficacy in highly adversarial, cryptoeconomic governance environments remains underexplored. To address this, we introduce Sentinel-Bench, an 840-inference empirical framework executing a strict intra-model ablation on Qwen-3.5-9B. By toggling latent reasoning across frozen weights, we isolate the impact of inference-time compute against an adversarial Optimism DAO dataset. Our findings reveal a severe compute-accuracy inversion. The autoregressive baseline (System 1) achieved 100% adversarial robustness, 100% juridical consistency, and state finality in under 13 seconds. Conversely, System 2 reasoning introduced catastrophic instability, fundamentally driven by a 26.7% Reasoning Non-Convergence (cognitive collapse) rate. This collapse degraded trial-to-trial consensus stability to 72.6% and imposed a 17x latency overhead, introducing critical vulnerabilities to Governance Extractable Value (GEV) and hardware centralization. While rare (1.5% of adversarial trials), we empirically captured "Reasoning-Induced Sycophancy," where the model generated significantly longer internal monologues (averaging 25,750 characters) to rationalize failing the adversarial trap. We conclude that for edge-native SLMs operating under Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) constraints, System 1 parameterized intuition is structurally and economically superior to System 2 iterative deliberation for decentralized consensus. Code and Dataset: https://github.com/smarizvi110/sentinel-bench

analysis.tldr: 在去中心化共识场景中，边缘SLM的System 1直觉推理优于System 2迭代推理，后者导致认知崩溃和延迟开销。
analysis.research_motivation: DAO等去中心化自治组织倾向于使用小型语言模型作为边缘原生防火墙来审查提案并抵御语义社会工程攻击，但推理时计算（System 2）在高度对抗性的加密经济治理环境中的有效性尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 评估边缘原生SLM在去中心化共识中，System 1（自回归基线）与System 2（推理时计算）对对抗性提案的鲁棒性、一致性和效率的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: System 2推理引入了严重的计算-准确率反转：自回归基线（System 1）实现了100%的对抗鲁棒性和100%的司法一致性，而System 2导致26.7%的推理非收敛率（认知崩溃），共识稳定性降至72.6%，延迟增加17倍，并出现罕见的推理诱导的谄媚现象。
analysis.method: 提出Sentinel-Bench，一个包含840次推理的实证框架，在Qwen-3.5-9B模型上通过冻结权重切换潜在推理来执行严格的模型内消融实验，对比System 1和System 2在对抗性Optimism DAO数据集上的表现。
contributions: 首次系统评估了边缘SLM在去中心化共识中System 1与System 2推理的对抗鲁棒性和效率。
揭示了System 2推理在BFT约束下的认知崩溃和延迟开销，证明System 1在结构和经济上更优。
发布了Sentinel-Bench基准和数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-3.5-9B模型上使用840次推理的Sentinel-Bench框架，在对抗性Optimism DAO数据集上进行消融实验，测量了鲁棒性、一致性、延迟和认知崩溃率。
limitations: 仅测试了单一模型（Qwen-3.5-9B），泛化性未知。
数据集仅针对Optimism DAO，可能不适用于其他DAO场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在去中心化共识场景中，边缘SLM的System 1直觉推理优于System 2迭代推理，后者导致认知崩溃和延迟开销。

papers.title: Skilldex: A Package Manager and Registry for Agent Skill Packages with Hierarchical Scope-Based Distribution
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly extended at runtime via skill packages, structured natural-language instruction bundles loaded from a well-known directory. Community install tooling and registries exist, but two gaps persist: no public tool scores skill packages against Anthropic's published format specification, and no mechanism bundles related skills with the shared context they need to remain mutually coherent. We present Skilldex, a package manager and registry for agent skill packages addressing both gaps. The two novel contributions are: (1) compiler-style format conformance scoring against Anthropic's skill specification, producing line-level diagnostics on description specificity, frontmatter validity, and structural adherence; and (2) the skillset abstraction, a bundled collection of related skills with shared assets (vocabulary files, templates, reference documents) that enforce cross-skill behavioral coherence. Skilldex also provides supporting infrastructure: a three-tier hierarchical scope system, a human-in-the-loop agent suggestion loop, a metadata-only community registry, and a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. The system is implemented as a TypeScript CLI (skillpm / spm) with a Hono/Supabase registry backend, and is open-source.

analysis.tldr: Skilldex 是一个针对 LLM Agent 技能包的包管理器与注册中心，提供格式合规评分和技能集抽象以增强技能间一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM Agent 技能包社区工具缺乏对格式规范的自动评分机制，也无法将相关技能及其共享上下文打包以保持行为一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动评估技能包对 Anthropic 格式规范的符合度，并支持将相关技能及其共享资源（如词汇文件、模板）打包以维持跨技能行为一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Skilldex，包含两个核心贡献：(1) 编译器风格的格式合规评分，对描述特异性、frontmatter 有效性和结构遵循度进行行级诊断；(2) 技能集抽象，将相关技能与共享资产（词汇文件、模板、参考文档）捆绑，强制跨技能行为一致性。此外提供三级层次化作用域系统、人在回路 Agent 建议循环、元数据社区注册中心和 MCP 服务器。
contributions: 提出编译器风格的格式合规评分工具，针对 Anthropic 技能规范生成行级诊断。
提出技能集抽象，支持将相关技能与共享上下文打包以保持行为一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对 Anthropic 规范，对其他规范兼容性未知。
技能集抽象的有效性缺乏实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Skilldex 是一个针对 LLM Agent 技能包的包管理器与注册中心，提供格式合规评分和技能集抽象以增强技能间一致性。

papers.title: LAGS: Low-Altitude Gaussian Splatting with Groupwise Heterogeneous Graph Learning
papers.abstract: Low-altitude Gaussian splatting (LAGS) facilitates 3D scene reconstruction by aggregating aerial images from distributed drones. However, as LAGS prioritizes maximizing reconstruction quality over communication throughput, existing low-altitude resource allocation schemes become inefficient. This inefficiency stems from their failure to account for image diversity introduced by varying viewpoints. To fill this gap, we propose a groupwise heterogeneous graph neural network (GW-HGNN) for LAGS resource allocation. GW-HGNN explicitly models the non-uniform contribution of different image groups to the reconstruction process, thus automatically balancing data fidelity and transmission cost. The key insight of GW-HGNN is to transform LAGS losses and communication constraints into graph learning costs for dual-level message passing. Experiments on real-world LAGS datasets demonstrate that GW-HGNN significantly outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks across key rendering metrics, including PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS. Furthermore, GW-HGNN reduces computational latency by approximately 100x compared to the widely-used MOSEK solver, achieving millisecond-level inference suitable for real-time deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出GW-HGNN图神经网络用于低空高斯泼溅资源分配，平衡重建质量与传输成本，实现毫秒级推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 低空高斯泼溅（LAGS）在无人机协同3D重建中优先考虑重建质量，导致现有资源分配方案因忽略不同视角图像多样性而效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何为LAGS设计一种资源分配方法，在最大化重建质量的同时最小化通信开销，并适应非均匀图像贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出不同视角的图像组对重建过程的贡献不均匀，现有方案未能建模此多样性。
analysis.method: 提出分组异构图神经网络（GW-HGNN），将LAGS损失和通信约束转化为图学习代价，通过双层消息传递自动平衡数据保真度与传输成本。
contributions: 首次将图神经网络应用于LAGS资源分配，显式建模图像组的非均匀贡献。
提出GW-HGNN实现毫秒级推理，比MOSEK求解器快约100倍，且PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS指标显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在真实LAGS数据集上评估，GW-HGNN在PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS等渲染指标上显著优于现有基准，且推理延迟降低约100倍。
limitations: 可能依赖特定无人机编队和场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论多无人机协同中的通信拓扑动态变化问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GW-HGNN图神经网络用于低空高斯泼溅资源分配，平衡重建质量与传输成本，实现毫秒级推理。

papers.title: PRISM: Probing Reasoning, Instruction, and Source Memory in LLM Hallucinations
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) evolve from conversational assistants into agents capable of handling complex tasks, they are increasingly deployed in high-risk domains. However, existing benchmarks largely rely on mixed queries and posterior evaluation, output-level scoring, which quantifies hallucination severity but offers limited insight into where and why hallucinations arise in the generation pipeline. We therefore reformulate hallucination evaluation as a diagnostic problem and propose PRISM, a controlled benchmark that disentangles hallucinations into four dimensions: knowledge missing, knowledge errors, reasoning errors, and instruction-following errors, grounded in three stages of generation (memory, instruction, and reasoning). PRISM contains 9,448 instances across 65 tasks and supports fine-grained, stage-aware diagnostic evaluation. Evaluating 24 mainstream open-source and proprietary LLMs, we uncover consistent trade-offs across instruction following, memory retrieval, and logical reasoning, showing that mitigation strategies often improve specific dimensions at the expense of others. We hope PRISM provides a framework for understanding the specific mechanisms behind LLMs hallucinations, ultimately accelerating the development of trustworthy large language models.

analysis.tldr: PRISM 是一个将 LLM 幻觉分解为知识缺失、知识错误、推理错误和指令遵循错误四个维度的诊断基准，揭示了不同缓解策略之间的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉评测主要依赖混合查询和输出级评分，只能量化严重程度，无法定位生成管线中幻觉的具体来源和原因。
analysis.problem: 如何将 LLM 幻觉评估从输出级评分重构为诊断问题，以细粒度地识别幻觉在记忆、指令和推理三个生成阶段中的具体类型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PRISM 基准，包含 9,448 个实例和 65 个任务，将幻觉分解为知识缺失、知识错误、推理错误和指令遵循错误四个维度，并对应记忆、指令和推理三个生成阶段进行细粒度诊断评估。
contributions: 将幻觉评估重构为诊断问题，提出四维度分解框架。
构建包含 9,448 实例、65 任务的受控基准 PRISM，支持阶段感知的细粒度评估。
对 24 个主流 LLM 进行评测，发现指令遵循、记忆检索和逻辑推理之间存在一致权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在 24 个主流开源和专有 LLM 上评估，揭示了不同缓解策略在特定维度上的改进以牺牲其他维度为代价的权衡现象。
limitations: 基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有幻觉类型。
四维度分解可能无法完全捕捉复杂幻觉的交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PRISM 是一个将 LLM 幻觉分解为知识缺失、知识错误、推理错误和指令遵循错误四个维度的诊断基准，揭示了不同缓解策略之间的权衡。

papers.title: Beyond Text-Dominance: Understanding Modality Preference of Omni-modal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Native Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) have shifted from pipeline architectures to unified representation spaces. However, this native integration gives rise to a critical yet underexplored phenomenon: modality preference. To bridge this gap, we first systematically quantify modality preference of OLLMs using a newly-curated conflict-based benchmark and the modality selection rate metric. Our evaluation of ten representative OLLMs reveals a notable paradigm shift: unlike the ``text-dominance'' of traditional VLMs, most OLLMs exhibit a pronounced visual preference. To further understand the underlying mechanism, we conduct layer-wise probing and demonstrate that such modality preference is not static but emerges progressively in the mid-to-late layers. Building upon these insights, we leverage these internal signals to diagnose cross-modal hallucinations, achieving competitive performance across three downstream multi-modal benchmarks without task-specific data. Our work provides both a mechanistic understanding and a practical tool for building more trustworthy OLLMs. Our code and related resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/icip-cas/OmniPreference

analysis.tldr: 全模态大语言模型存在模态偏好，多数模型表现出视觉偏好而非文本主导。
analysis.research_motivation: 原生全模态大语言模型（OLLMs）从流水线架构转向统一表示空间，但模态偏好这一关键现象尚未被充分研究，理解其机制对构建可信模型至关重要。
analysis.problem: 量化并理解OLLMs中的模态偏好现象及其内在机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过冲突基准和模态选择率指标，发现大多数OLLMs表现出显著的视觉偏好，而非传统VLM的文本主导；层间探测表明模态偏好在中后期层逐渐涌现。
analysis.method: 构建冲突基准并定义模态选择率指标来量化偏好；通过层间探测分析偏好涌现机制；利用内部信号诊断跨模态幻觉。
contributions: 首次系统量化OLLMs的模态偏好，揭示视觉偏好范式转变
通过层间探测揭示模态偏好的动态涌现机制
利用内部信号实现跨模态幻觉诊断，无需任务特定数据
analysis.experiments: 在十个代表性OLLMs上评估模态偏好，并在三个下游多模态基准上验证幻觉诊断性能。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有OLLMs架构
幻觉诊断方法可能依赖特定内部信号选择
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 全模态大语言模型存在模态偏好，多数模型表现出视觉偏好而非文本主导。

papers.title: ProtoCycle: Reflective Tool-Augmented Planning for Text-Guided Protein Design
papers.abstract: Designing proteins that satisfy natural language functional requirements is a central goal in protein engineering. A straightforward baseline is to fine-tune generic instruction-tuned LLMs as direct text-to-sequence generators, but this is data- and compute-hungry. With limited supervision, LLMs can produce coherent plans in text yet fail to reliably realize them as sequences. This plan-execute gap motivates ProtoCycle, an agentic framework for protein design that uses LLMs primarily to drive a multi-round, feedback-driven decision cycle. ProtoCycle couples an LLM planner with a lightweight tool environment designed to emulate the iterative workflow of human protein engineering and uses LLM-driven reflection on tool feedback to revise plans. Trained with supervised trajectories and online reinforcement learning, ProtoCycle achieves strong language alignment while maintaining competitive foldability, and ablations show that reflection substantially improves sequence quality.

analysis.tldr: ProtoCycle通过反射式工具增强规划弥合蛋白质设计中的计划-执行差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将LLM微调为文本到序列生成器，但数据与计算开销大，且LLM在有限监督下生成的计划难以可靠地转化为实际序列。
analysis.problem: 解决蛋白质设计中LLM生成的文本计划与最终序列执行之间的差距（plan-execute gap）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM能生成连贯的文本计划，但无法可靠地将其实现为蛋白质序列，存在计划-执行差距。
analysis.method: 提出ProtoCycle，一个基于LLM的智能体框架，包含规划器、轻量工具环境和反射机制；通过监督轨迹和在线强化学习训练，利用工具反馈进行多轮决策循环。
contributions: 提出ProtoCycle框架，将LLM规划与工具增强反射结合，用于文本引导的蛋白质设计。
通过监督学习和在线强化学习训练，实现强语言对齐和可竞争的折叠性。
消融实验表明反射机制显著提升序列质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及消融实验显示反射改善序列质量。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具环境，泛化性未知。
训练需要监督轨迹和在线RL，计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProtoCycle通过反射式工具增强规划弥合蛋白质设计中的计划-执行差距。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT)
papers.abstract: We propose Physics-Informed Tracking (PIT), a video-based framework for tracking a single particle from video, where a neural network autoencoder localizes a particle as a heatmap peak (landmark) and a differentiable physics module embedded in the autoencoder constrains several landmarks over time (a trajectory) to satisfy known dynamics. The novel Physics-Informed Landmark Loss (PILL) compares this predicted trajectory back against the landmarks, enforcing physical consistency without labels. Its supervised variant (PILLS) instead compares the prediction against ground-truth position, velocity, and bounce from simulation, enabling end-to-end backpropagation. To support supervised and unsupervised learning, we use an autoencoder with a split bottleneck that separates A) tracking-related structure via landmark heatmaps from B) background noise and subsequent image reconstruction. We evaluate a replicated 26 factorial design (n = 4 replicates, 64 configurations), showing that PILLS consistently achieves sub-pixel tracking accuracy for the bilinear and physics-refined decoder outputs under both clean and noisy conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息跟踪框架，利用可微物理模块约束自编码器轨迹，实现无标签或弱监督下的亚像素粒子跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频中单粒子跟踪通常需要大量标注数据，且纯数据驱动方法难以保证物理一致性，限制了其在科学应用中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有标签或仅有少量标签的情况下，从视频中准确跟踪单个粒子，并确保轨迹符合已知物理规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PIT框架，包含自编码器（分裂瓶颈分离跟踪结构与背景噪声）和可微物理模块，通过物理信息地标损失（PILL）或无监督变体（PILLS）约束轨迹的物理一致性。
contributions: 提出物理信息地标损失（PILL），无需标签即可强制轨迹满足已知动力学。
设计分裂瓶颈自编码器，分离跟踪相关结构与背景噪声。
在64种配置的复制实验中，PILLS在干净和噪声条件下均实现亚像素跟踪精度。
analysis.experiments: 在复制2^6因子设计（n=4复制，64种配置）上评估，PILLS在双线性和物理精化解码器输出下均达到亚像素跟踪精度。
limitations: 仅针对单粒子跟踪，未扩展到多粒子或复杂场景。
依赖已知动力学模型，对未知动力学系统可能不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息跟踪框架，利用可微物理模块约束自编码器轨迹，实现无标签或弱监督下的亚像素粒子跟踪。

papers.title: EasyVideoR1: Easier RL for Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has demonstrated remarkable effectiveness in improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. As models evolve into natively multimodal architectures, extending RLVR to video understanding becomes increasingly important yet remains largely unexplored, due to the diversity of video task types, the computational overhead of repeatedly decoding and preprocessing high-dimensional visual inputs, and the difficulty of reproducible evaluation across numerous sensitive hyperparameters. Existing open-source RL training frameworks provide solid infrastructure for text and image scenarios but lack systematic optimizations tailored for video modality. In this work, we present \textbf{EasyVideoR1}, a complete and efficient reinforcement learning framework specifically designed for training large vision-language models on video understanding tasks. EasyVideoR1 makes the following contributions: (1) a full video RL training pipeline with offline preprocessing and tensor caching that eliminates redundant video decoding and yields a 1.47 $\times$ throughput improvement; (2) a comprehensive, task-aware reward system covering 11 distinct video and image problem types with unified routing and modular extension; (3) a mixed offline-online data training paradigm that combines curated high-quality trajectories with on-policy exploration, benefiting the learning of more challenging tasks; (4) joint image-video training with independently configurable pixel budgets, allowing the two modalities to mutually reinforce each other; and (5) an asynchronous multi-benchmark evaluation framework covering 22 mainstream video understanding benchmarks, with reproduced accuracy closely aligned with officially reported scores.

analysis.tldr: EasyVideoR1 提出首个专为视频理解设计的 RLVR 训练框架，通过离线预处理、张量缓存、任务感知奖励系统及混合训练范式，显著提升训练效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 将 RLVR 扩展到视频理解面临任务类型多样、高维视觉输入重复解码计算开销大、超参数敏感导致评估可重复性差等挑战，现有开源框架缺乏针对视频模态的系统优化。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个高效、完整且可复现的强化学习框架，用于训练大型视觉语言模型以完成视频理解任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 EasyVideoR1 框架，包含：(1) 离线预处理与张量缓存消除冗余视频解码，吞吐量提升 1.47 倍；(2) 覆盖 11 种视频/图像问题类型的任务感知奖励系统；(3) 混合离线-在线数据训练范式；(4) 联合图像-视频训练，独立配置像素预算；(5) 异步多基准评估框架覆盖 22 个主流视频理解基准。
contributions: 首个专为视频理解设计的完整 RLVR 训练框架，包含离线预处理与张量缓存优化。
提出任务感知奖励系统、混合训练范式及联合图像-视频训练方法。
analysis.experiments: 在 22 个主流视频理解基准上评估，复现精度与官方报告分数高度一致。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频任务类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
离线预处理与缓存可能增加存储开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EasyVideoR1 提出首个专为视频理解设计的 RLVR 训练框架，通过离线预处理、张量缓存、任务感知奖励系统及混合训练范式，显著提升训练效率与性能。

papers.title: CrossFlowDG: Bridging the Modality Gap with Cross-modal Flow Matching for Domain Generalization
papers.abstract: Domain generalization (DG) aims to maintain performance under domain shift, which in computer vision appears primarily as stylistic variations that cause models to overfit to domain-specific appearance cues rather than class semantics. To overcome this, recent methods use textual representations as stable, domain-invariant anchors. However, multimodal approaches that rely on cosine similarity-based contrastive alignment leave a modality gap where image and text embeddings remain geometrically separated despite semantic correspondence. We propose CrossFlowDG, a novel DG framework that addresses this residual gap using noise-free, cross-modal flow matching. By learning a continuous transformation in the joint Euclidean latent space, our framework explicitly transports domain-biased image embeddings toward domain-invariant text embeddings of the correct class. Using the efficient VMamba image encoder and CLIP's text encoder, CrossFlowDG is tested against four common DG benchmarks, and achieves competitive performance on several benchmarks and state-of-the-art on TerraIncognita. Code is available at: https://github.com/ajkrit/CrossFlowDG

analysis.tldr: CrossFlowDG 使用跨模态流匹配弥合图像与文本嵌入之间的模态间隙，提升域泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 域泛化中模型易过拟合于风格变化而非语义，现有多模态方法基于余弦相似度的对比对齐存在模态间隙，限制了泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何消除图像与文本嵌入在联合潜空间中的几何分离，实现稳定的域不变表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出对比对齐方法下图像和文本嵌入即使语义对应也保持几何分离，即模态间隙现象。
analysis.method: 提出 CrossFlowDG，利用无噪声的跨模态流匹配学习从域偏置图像嵌入到正确类别的域不变文本嵌入的连续变换，结合 VMamba 图像编码器和 CLIP 文本编码器。
contributions: 首次将跨模态流匹配引入域泛化，显式弥合模态间隙。
在多个域泛化基准上取得有竞争力的性能，并在 TerraIncognita 上达到最优。
analysis.experiments: 在四个常见域泛化基准上测试，与多种方法对比，TerraIncognita 上达到 SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练 CLIP 文本编码器的质量。
流匹配的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CrossFlowDG 使用跨模态流匹配弥合图像与文本嵌入之间的模态间隙，提升域泛化性能。

papers.title: Step-GRPO: Internalizing Dynamic Early Exit for Efficient Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models that use long chain-of-thought excel at problem-solving yet waste compute on redundant checks. Curbing this overthinking is hard: training-time length penalties can cripple ability, while inference-time early-exit adds system overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose Step-GRPO, a novel post-training framework that internalizes dynamic early-exit capabilities directly into the model. Step-GRPO shifts the optimization objective from raw tokens to semantic steps by utilizing linguistic markers to structure reasoning. We introduce a Dynamic Truncated Rollout mechanism that exposes the model to concise high-confidence trajectories during exploration, synergized with a Step-Aware Relative Reward that dynamically penalizes redundancy based on group-level baselines. Extensive experiments across three model sizes on diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Step-GRPO achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off. On Qwen3-8B, our method reduces token consumption by 32.0\% compared to the vanilla model while avoiding the accuracy degradation observed in traditional length-penalty methods.

analysis.tldr: Step-GRPO通过语义步骤级优化和动态截断机制，在不牺牲推理能力的前提下显著减少大模型冗余计算。
analysis.research_motivation: 大推理模型在长链思维中常产生冗余计算（过度思考），传统训练时长度惩罚会损害能力，而推理时早退策略增加系统开销，亟需一种既能减少计算又不影响性能的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不降低推理准确率的前提下，让模型内部学会动态早退，从而减少冗余的token生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出大模型在长链推理中存在过度思考现象，即生成大量不必要的中间步骤；传统长度惩罚方法会导致准确率下降。
analysis.method: 提出Step-GRPO框架，利用语言标记将推理结构化为语义步骤，通过动态截断滚动机制（Dynamic Truncated Rollout）让模型在探索时接触高置信度短轨迹，并结合步骤感知相对奖励（Step-Aware Relative Reward）基于组级基线动态惩罚冗余。
contributions: 提出Step-GRPO框架，将动态早退能力内化到模型中，无需额外系统开销。
设计动态截断滚动和步骤感知相对奖励机制，实现步骤级优化。
在多个基准和三种模型规模上验证了准确率-效率的优越权衡，Qwen3-8B上token消耗减少32.0%且无准确率下降。
analysis.experiments: 在多种基准上对三种不同规模的模型进行实验，结果显示Step-GRPO在Qwen3-8B上相比原始模型减少32.0%的token消耗，且避免了传统长度惩罚方法的准确率下降。
limitations: 可能依赖语言标记的合理设计，对无明确步骤结构的任务适应性未知。
实验仅在特定模型族（Qwen3）上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Step-GRPO通过语义步骤级优化和动态截断机制，在不牺牲推理能力的前提下显著减少大模型冗余计算。

papers.title: Bias-constrained multimodal intelligence for equitable and reliable clinical AI
papers.abstract: The integration of medical imaging and clinical text has enabled the emergence of generalist artificial intelligence (AI) systems for healthcare. However, pervasive biases, such as imbalanced disease prevalence, skewed anatomical region distributions, heterogeneous imaging protocols, and demographic disparities, pose significant challenges to the fairness and reliability of vision-language systems in real-world clinical settings. Here we present BiasCareVL, a bias-aware multimodal learning framework that introduces bias control directly into model design, rather than treating it as a post hoc correction. BiasCareVL incorporates adaptive uncertainty modeling with optional human-in-the-loop refinement to regulate the influence of dominant data patterns and to promote equitable reasoning under distributional imbalance. Trained on 3.44 million samples spanning over 15 imaging modalities, the framework supports diverse clinical tasks, including visual question answering, disease classification, segmentation, and report generation within a unified representation space. Across eight public benchmarks covering dermatology, oncology, radiology, and pathology, BiasCareVL consistently outperforms 20 state-of-the-art methods, with pronounced gains in clinically challenging scenarios, including over 10% accuracy improvement in multi-class skin lesion diagnosis and more than 20% Dice improvement in small tumor segmentation. Furthermore, BiasCareVL achieves diagnostic performance exceeding human accuracy with substantially reduced time requirements when evaluated with board-certified radiologists. By open-sourcing BiasCareVL, we aim to promote a transparent, reproducible, and equitable future for AI in healthcare, paving the way for general-purpose, trustworthy, and clinically reliable AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出 BiasCareVL，一种将偏置控制直接融入模型设计的医学多模态学习框架，在多个临床任务上显著提升公平性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学视觉-语言模型受限于数据偏置（如疾病分布不均、人口统计差异等），导致公平性和可靠性不足，而传统后处理校正方法效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在多模态医学AI模型设计中直接引入偏置控制，以提升在分布不平衡的真实临床场景下的公平性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出医学数据存在疾病流行率不平衡、解剖区域分布偏斜、成像协议异质和人口统计差异等偏置，这些偏置严重影响视觉-语言系统的公平性和可靠性。
analysis.method: 提出 BiasCareVL 框架，包含自适应不确定性建模和可选的人机协同精炼，将偏置控制直接融入模型设计而非后处理校正，在统一表示空间中支持多种临床任务。
contributions: 提出一种偏置感知的多模态学习框架，将偏置控制直接集成到模型设计中。
在涵盖15种以上成像模态的344万样本上训练，支持VQA、分类、分割和报告生成等任务。
在8个公开基准上超越20种最先进方法，尤其在皮肤病变诊断和小肿瘤分割上提升显著。
在放射科医生评估中，诊断性能超过人类且耗时更少，并开源以促进透明和可复现研究。
analysis.experiments: 在8个公开基准（涵盖皮肤科、肿瘤科、放射科和病理科）上评估，与20种SOTA方法对比，在多类皮肤病变诊断中准确率提升超10%，小肿瘤分割Dice提升超20%，并与放射科医生对比达到超越人类的诊断性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及在真实临床部署中的泛化性和鲁棒性验证。
可能对罕见疾病或极端偏置场景的适应性仍需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 BiasCareVL，一种将偏置控制直接融入模型设计的医学多模态学习框架，在多个临床任务上显著提升公平性和可靠性。

papers.title: SinkRouter: Sink-Aware Routing for Efficient Long-Context Decoding in Large Language and Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: In long-context decoding for LLMs and LMMs, attention becomes increasingly memory-bound because each decoding step must load a large amount of KV-cache data from GPU memory. Existing acceleration strategies often trade efficiency for accuracy by relying on heuristic pruning that may discard useful information. At a deeper level, they also tend to indiscriminately preserve all high-scoring tokens, treat early tokens as indispensable anchors, or rely on heuristic head routing, reflecting an insufficient mechanistic understanding of the attention sink phenomenon. In this paper, we show that the attention sink phenomenon corresponds to a stable, reachable, and error-controllable fixed point constructed during training. Based on this insight, we propose SinkRouter, a training-free selective routing framework that detects the sink signal and skips computations that would otherwise produce near-zero output. To translate this mechanism into real-world acceleration, we develop a hardware-aware Triton kernel with block-level branching and Split-K parallelism. We conduct extensive evaluations on a diverse suite of long-context benchmarks, including LongBench, InfiniteBench, CVBench, MileBench, and MMVP, using both text-only and multimodal backbones such as Llama-3.1-8B, Llama-3.1-70B, Yi-9B-200K, LLaVA-1.5-7B, and LLaVA-1.5-13B. Across these settings, SinkRouter consistently improves decoding efficiency while maintaining competitive accuracy, and reaches 2.03x speedup with a 512K context.

analysis.tldr: 提出SinkRouter，利用注意力汇聚现象跳过近零计算，实现长上下文解码加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文解码中注意力机制受限于内存带宽，现有启发式剪枝方法可能丢弃有用信息，且对注意力汇聚现象理解不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲准确性的前提下，利用注意力汇聚的机制性理解来加速长上下文解码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力汇聚现象对应训练中构建的稳定、可达且误差可控的固定点，可被检测并用于跳过近零输出计算。
analysis.method: SinkRouter：无训练的选择性路由框架，检测汇聚信号并跳过近零计算；配合硬件感知的Triton内核（块级分支和Split-K并行）。
contributions: 揭示了注意力汇聚现象作为训练中固定点的机制性理解
提出SinkRouter框架，实现无训练的长上下文解码加速
开发了硬件感知的Triton内核，在实际硬件上取得显著加速
analysis.experiments: 在LongBench、InfiniteBench、CVBench、MileBench、MMVP等基准上，使用Llama-3.1-8B/70B、Yi-9B-200K、LLaVA-1.5-7B/13B等模型评估，达到2.03倍加速（512K上下文），保持竞争性准确率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有注意力汇聚现象的模型
加速效果依赖于上下文长度和硬件特性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SinkRouter，利用注意力汇聚现象跳过近零计算，实现长上下文解码加速。

papers.title: Incentivizing Parametric Knowledge via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Cross-Cultural Entity Translation
papers.abstract: Cross-cultural entity translation remains challenging for large language models (LLMs) as literal or phonetic renderings are usually yielded instead of culturally appropriate translations in context. However, relevant knowledge may already be encoded in model parameters during large-scale pre-training. To incentivize the effective use of parametric knowledge, we propose EA-RLVR (Entity-Anchored Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards), a training framework that optimizes cross-cultural entity translation without relying on external knowledge bases. EA-RLVR anchors supervision on a verifiable, entity-level reward signal and incorporates lightweight structural gates to stabilize optimization. This design steers the model toward learning a robust reasoning process rather than merely imitating reference translations. We evaluate EA-RLVR on XC-Translate and observe consistent improvements in both entity translation accuracy and out-of-domain generalization. Specifically, training on merely 7k samples boosts Qwen3-14B's entity translation accuracy from 23.66\% to 31.87\% on a 50k test set comprising entirely unseen entities. The learned entity translation ability also transfers to general translation, yielding +1.35 XCOMET on WMT24++, which scales to +1.59 with extended optimization. Extensive analyses of $pass@k$ dynamics and reward formulations attribute these gains to superior sampling efficiency and a stable optimization landscape.

analysis.tldr: 提出EA-RLVR框架，通过可验证奖励的强化学习激励大语言模型利用参数化知识进行跨文化实体翻译，仅用7k样本即显著提升准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨文化实体翻译中，大语言模型常产生直译或音译而非文化适配的翻译，但相关参数化知识可能已存在于预训练模型中，如何有效激励模型利用这些知识是一个关键问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部知识库的情况下，通过训练框架优化大语言模型的跨文化实体翻译能力，使其生成文化上恰当的翻译而非字面或音译。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EA-RLVR（Entity-Anchored Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards）框架，基于可验证的实体级奖励信号进行监督，并引入轻量级结构门控以稳定优化，引导模型学习鲁棒的推理过程而非简单模仿参考翻译。
contributions: 提出EA-RLVR框架，通过可验证奖励的强化学习激励参数化知识用于跨文化实体翻译。
在XC-Translate数据集上，仅用7k样本将Qwen3-14B的实体翻译准确率从23.66%提升至31.87%，并在WMT24++上获得+1.35 XCOMET的通用翻译提升。
analysis.experiments: 在XC-Translate数据集上评估，训练集7k样本，测试集50k未见实体；在WMT24++上评估通用翻译迁移能力。
limitations: 方法仅在特定模型（Qwen3-14B）和数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
依赖可验证的实体级奖励信号，可能不适用于所有翻译场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EA-RLVR框架，通过可验证奖励的强化学习激励大语言模型利用参数化知识进行跨文化实体翻译，仅用7k样本即显著提升准确率。

papers.title: Adaptive Forensic Feature Refinement via Intrinsic Importance Perception
papers.abstract: With the rapid development of generative models and multimodal content editing technologies, the key challenge faced by synthetic image detection (SID) lies in cross-distribution generalization to unknown generation sources. In recent years, visual foundation models (VFM), which acquire rich visual priors through large scale image-text alignment pretraining, have become a promising technical route for improving the generalization ability of SID. However, existing VFM-based methods remain relatively coarse-grained in their adaptation strategies. They typically either directly use the final layer representations of VFM or simply fuse multi layer features, lacking explicit modeling of the optimal representational hierarchy for transferable forgery cues. Meanwhile, although directly fine-tuning VFM can enhance task adaptation, it may also damage the cross-modal pretrained structure that supports open-set generalization. To address this task specific tension, we reformulate VFM adaptation for SID as a joint optimization problem: it is necessary both to identify the critical representational layer that is more suitable for carrying forgery discriminative information and to constrain the disturbance caused by task knowledge injection to the pretrained structure. Based on this, we propose I2P, an SID framework centered on intrinsic importance perception. I2P first adaptively identifies the critical layer representations that are most discriminative for SID, and then constrains task-driven parameter updates within a low sensitivity parameter subspace, thereby improving task specificity while preserving the transferable structure of pretrained representations as much as possible.

analysis.tldr: 提出I2P框架，通过内在重要性感知自适应优化VFM特征层选择与参数更新约束，提升合成图像检测的跨分布泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成图像检测面临跨分布泛化挑战，现有VFM适配方法粗粒度，缺乏对最优表征层次的显式建模，且直接微调可能破坏预训练结构的开放集泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地识别VFM中最具判别力的表征层，并在注入任务知识时约束对预训练结构的扰动，以提升合成图像检测的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出I2P框架，包含两个核心：1）自适应识别对SID最具判别力的关键层表征；2）将任务驱动参数更新约束在低敏感度参数子空间内，以保持预训练表征的可迁移结构。
contributions: 将VFM适配SID重新表述为联合优化问题，兼顾关键层识别与预训练结构保护。
提出I2P框架，通过内在重要性感知实现自适应特征精炼与参数约束。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖VFM的预训练质量，对未见过的生成模型泛化能力需进一步验证。
低敏感度参数子空间的确定方法可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出I2P框架，通过内在重要性感知自适应优化VFM特征层选择与参数更新约束，提升合成图像检测的跨分布泛化能力。

papers.title: DO-Bench: An Attributable Benchmark for Diagnosing Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Object level hallucination remains a central reliability challenge for vision language models (VLMs), particularly in binary object existence verification. Existing benchmarks emphasize aggregate accuracy but rarely disentangle whether errors stem from perceptual limitations or from the influence of contextual textual priors, leaving underlying failure mechanisms ambiguous. We introduce DO-Bench, a controlled diagnostic benchmark that isolates these sources through structured multimodal interventions. Rather than evaluating models in unconstrained settings, DO-Bench probes two complementary dimensions: the Prior Override dimension progressively strengthens contextual textual priors while holding visual evidence constant to assess resistance to prior pressure, and the Perception-Limited dimension incrementally enhances visual evidence from full-scene context to localized object crops to measure perceptual grounding strength. This paired design enables attribution of errors to prior suppression, perceptual insufficiency, or their interaction. We further define two diagnostic metrics, PriorRobust and PerceptionAbility, to quantify these behaviors consistently. Evaluations across diverse open- and closed-source VLMs reveal systematic differences in prior sensitivity and perceptual reliability, demonstrating that object hallucination reflects heterogeneous, mechanism dependent failure patterns beyond aggregate accuracy.

analysis.tldr: DO-Bench通过结构化多模态干预诊断VLM物体幻觉的根源，区分先验压制与感知不足两种失败机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物体幻觉基准仅关注聚合准确率，无法区分错误源于感知限制还是上下文文本先验的影响，导致失败机制模糊不清。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可控诊断基准，以归因VLM物体幻觉中的感知错误与先验干扰错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出物体幻觉反映异质的、机制依赖的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出DO-Bench，包含两个互补维度：Prior Override（逐步增强上下文文本先验，保持视觉证据不变）和Perception-Limited（逐步增强视觉证据，从全场景到局部裁剪），并定义PriorRobust和PerceptionAbility两个诊断指标。
contributions: 提出DO-Bench，一种可控诊断基准，通过结构化多模态干预分离物体幻觉的感知与先验来源。
定义PriorRobust和PerceptionAbility两个指标，量化先验敏感性和感知可靠性。
跨多种开源和闭源VLM评估，揭示系统性的先验敏感性和感知可靠性差异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅关注二值物体存在验证，未覆盖其他幻觉类型。
干预设计可能无法完全模拟真实场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DO-Bench通过结构化多模态干预诊断VLM物体幻觉的根源，区分先验压制与感知不足两种失败机制。

papers.title: GRAIL: Autonomous Concept Grounding for Neuro-Symbolic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Neuro-symbolic Reinforcement Learning (NeSy-RL) combines symbolic reasoning with gradient-based optimization to achieve interpretable and generalizable policies. Relational concepts, such as "left of" or "close by", serve as foundational building blocks that structure how agents perceive and act. However, conventional approaches require human experts to manually define these concepts, limiting adaptability since concept semantics vary across environments. We propose GRAIL (Grounding Relational Agents through Interactive Learning), a framework that autonomously grounds relational concepts through environmental interaction. GRAIL leverages large language models (LLMs) to provide generic concept representations as weak supervision, then refines them to capture environment-specific semantics. This approach addresses both sparse reward signals and concept misalignment prevalent in underdetermined environments. Experiments on the Atari games Kangaroo, Seaquest, and Skiing demonstrate that GRAIL matches or outperforms agents with manually crafted concepts in simplified settings, and reveals informative trade-offs between reward maximization and high-level goal completion in the full environment.

analysis.tldr: GRAIL利用LLM自动为神经符号强化学习生成环境特定的关系概念，无需人工定义。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经符号强化学习依赖人工定义的关系概念，但概念语义随环境变化，手动定义成本高且适应性差。
analysis.problem: 如何让智能体自主地通过环境交互学习环境特定的关系概念，避免人工定义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GRAIL框架：使用LLM提供通用概念表示作为弱监督，然后通过环境交互精炼以捕获环境特定语义。
contributions: 提出GRAIL框架，实现关系概念的自主接地，无需人工定义。
在Atari游戏中验证GRAIL匹配或超越手工概念代理，并揭示奖励最大化与高级目标完成之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在Atari游戏Kangaroo、Seaquest和Skiing上进行实验，显示GRAIL在简化设置中匹配或超越手工概念代理，并在完整环境中揭示权衡。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的初始概念质量。
实验仅在Atari游戏上，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRAIL利用LLM自动为神经符号强化学习生成环境特定的关系概念，无需人工定义。

papers.title: Governed MCP: Kernel-Level Tool Governance for AI Agents via Logit-Based Safety Primitives
papers.abstract: AI agents increasingly call external tools (file system, network, APIs) through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). These tool calls are the agent's syscalls -- privileged operations with side effects on shared state -- yet today's safety enforcement lives entirely in userspace, where a 10-line script can bypass it. I propose Governed MCP, a kernel-resident tool governance gateway built on a logit-based safety primitive (ProbeLogits, companion paper: arXiv:2604.11943). The gateway interposes on every MCP tool call in a 6-layer pipeline: schema validation, trust tier check, rate limit, adversarial pre-filter, ProbeLogits gate (the load-bearing semantic check), and constitutional policy match, with a Blake3-hashed audit chain. I implement Governed MCP in Anima OS, a bare-metal x86_64 OS in approximately 86,000 lines of Rust. The five non-inference layers add 65.3 microseconds of overhead per call; ProbeLogits adds 65 ms (per-token-class semantic decision) on 7B Q4_0. A 4-config ablation on a 101-prompt MCP-domain benchmark shows that removing the ProbeLogits layer collapses F1 from 0.773 to 0.327 (Delta F1 = -0.446) -- hand-rule firewalling alone is insufficient. All 15 WASM-to-system host functions in the runtime route through the gateway (complete mediation of the WASM ABI surface; the scope and caveats of this claim are stated in Section 4.6); a 10-LoC userspace bypass that defeats existing guardrail libraries is structurally impossible against the kernel-resident gate.

analysis.tldr: 提出内核级MCP工具调用治理网关，通过logit安全原语实现不可绕过的AI Agent安全控制。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent通过MCP调用外部工具（文件系统、网络、API）时，这些调用相当于特权系统调用，但现有安全机制完全运行在用户态，容易被绕过（如10行脚本即可突破），缺乏内核级强制访问控制。
analysis.problem: 现有AI Agent工具调用的安全机制位于用户态，无法防止恶意或错误工具调用对共享状态产生副作用，需要一种不可绕过的内核级治理方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Anima OS内核中实现Governed MCP网关，对每个MCP工具调用执行6层流水线：schema验证、信任等级检查、速率限制、对抗预过滤、ProbeLogits门控（基于logit的安全原语，进行语义检查）和宪法策略匹配，并附加Blake3哈希审计链。
contributions: 提出内核级工具治理网关架构，实现MCP调用的完全中介（complete mediation）。
设计基于logit的安全原语ProbeLogits，作为语义检查的负载承载层。
在裸机x86_64操作系统Anima OS中实现原型，并验证其性能开销和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在101提示的MCP领域基准上进行4配置消融实验，移除ProbeLogits层后F1从0.773降至0.327（Delta F1 = -0.446），表明仅靠手工规则防火墙不足。非推理层每调用增加65.3微秒，ProbeLogits在7B Q4_0模型上增加65毫秒。
limitations: ProbeLogits依赖特定模型（7B Q4_0），可能不适用于更大或不同架构的模型。
实验仅在101提示的基准上进行，规模较小，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出内核级MCP工具调用治理网关，通过logit安全原语实现不可绕过的AI Agent安全控制。

papers.title: CCAR: Intrinsic Robustness as an Emergent Geometric Property
papers.abstract: Standard supervised learning optimizes for predictive accuracy but remains agnostic to the internal geometry of learned features, often yielding representations that are entangled and brittle. We propose Class-Conditional Activation Regularization (CCAR) to explicitly engineer the feature space, imposing a block-diagonal structure via a soft inductive bias. By shaping the latent representation to confine class energy to orthogonal subspaces, we create an intrinsic geometric scaffold that naturally filters noise and adversarial perturbations. We provide theoretical analysis linking this structural constraint to the maximization of the Fisher Discriminant Ratio, establishing a formal connection between geometric disentanglement and algorithmic stability. Empirically, this approach demonstrates that robustness is an emergent property of a well-engineered feature space, significantly outperforming baselines on label noise and input corruption benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CCAR正则化方法，通过强制特征空间块对角结构使鲁棒性成为涌现几何属性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准监督学习只优化预测精度，忽略特征内部几何结构，导致表征纠缠且脆弱，易受噪声和对抗攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何显式设计特征空间的几何结构，使鲁棒性成为内在涌现属性而非外部防御。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出类条件激活正则化（CCAR），通过软归纳偏置强制特征空间具有块对角结构，将类别能量限制在正交子空间中。
contributions: 提出CCAR方法，通过几何约束使鲁棒性成为特征空间的涌现属性
理论证明该结构约束与最大化Fisher判别比等价，建立了几何解缠与算法稳定性之间的联系
analysis.experiments: 在标签噪声和输入损坏基准上显著优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类任务，对生成或回归任务效果未知
块对角结构可能限制表征容量，影响复杂任务性能
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CCAR正则化方法，通过强制特征空间块对角结构使鲁棒性成为涌现几何属性。

papers.title: TimeRFT: Stimulating Generalizable Time Series Forecasting for TSFMs via Reinforcement Finetuning
papers.abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) advance generalization and data efficiency in time series forecasting by unified large-scale pretraining. But TSFMs remain lacking when adapting to specific downstream forecasting tasks for two reasons. First, the non-stationary and uncertain nature of time series data lead to inevitable temporal distribution shifts between historical training and future testing data, while current Supervised FineTuning (SFT)-based methods are prone to overfitting and may degrade generalization. Second, training data availability varies across forecasting tasks, requiring TSFMs to generalize well under diverse data regimes. To address these challenges, we introduce the Time series Reinforcement Finetuning (TimeRFT) paradigm for TSFM downstream adaptation, which consists of two task-specific training recipes: i) A forecasting quality-based temporal reward mechanism that conducts a multi-faceted evaluation of the contribution of each prediction step to overall forecasting accuracy. ii) A forecasting difficulty-based data selection strategy to identify time series samples with generalizable predictive patterns and informative training signals. Extensive experiments demonstrate TimeRFT can consistently outperform SFT-based adaptation methods across various real-world forecasting tasks and training data regimes, enhancing prediction accuracy and generalization against unforeseen distribution shifts.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的微调范式TimeRFT，通过时序奖励机制和数据选择策略提升时间序列基础模型在下游任务中的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）通过大规模预训练提升了泛化性和数据效率，但在适应特定下游预测任务时存在两个痛点：一是时间序列的非平稳性和不确定性导致历史训练与未来测试数据之间存在不可避免的分布偏移，当前基于监督微调（SFT）的方法容易过拟合且泛化能力下降；二是不同预测任务的数据可用性差异大，要求TSFMs在不同数据规模下都能良好泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种微调范式，使TSFMs在适应下游预测任务时既能缓解分布偏移导致的过拟合，又能在不同数据规模下保持良好泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前基于SFT的微调方法在时间序列预测中容易过拟合，导致泛化能力下降；同时，不同任务的数据可用性差异大，现有方法难以在所有数据规模下保持良好性能。
analysis.method: 提出TimeRFT范式，包含两个任务特定的训练策略：1）基于预测质量的时序奖励机制，对每个预测步骤对整体预测精度的贡献进行多维度评估；2）基于预测难度的数据选择策略，识别具有可泛化预测模式和信息性训练信号的时间序列样本。
contributions: 提出TimeRFT，一种基于强化学习的微调范式，用于时间序列基础模型的下游适应。
设计了预测质量驱动的时序奖励机制和预测难度驱动的数据选择策略。
实验表明TimeRFT在多种真实预测任务和数据规模下均优于基于SFT的适应方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多种真实世界预测任务和训练数据规模下进行了广泛实验，结果表明TimeRFT在预测准确性和对未知分布偏移的泛化能力上持续优于基于SFT的适应方法。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或训练效率方面的分析。
可能对奖励函数的设计和数据选择策略的阈值敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于强化学习的微调范式TimeRFT，通过时序奖励机制和数据选择策略提升时间序列基础模型在下游任务中的泛化能力。

papers.title: GAMMA-Net: Adaptive Long-Horizon Traffic Spatio-Temporal Forecasting Model based on Interleaved Graph Attention and Multi-Axis Mamba
papers.abstract: Accurate traffic forecasting is crucial for intelligent transportation systems, supporting effective traffic management, congestion reduction, and informed urban planning. However, traditional models often fail to adequately capture the intricate spatio-temporal dependencies present in traffic data. To overcome these limitations, we introduce GAMMA-Net, a novel approach that integrates Graph Attention Networks (GAT) with multi-axis Selective State Space Models (Mamba). The GAT component uses a self-attention mechanism to dynamically adjust the influence of nodes within the traffic network, enabling adaptive spatial dependency modeling based on real-time conditions. Simultaneously, the Mamba module efficiently models long-term temporal and spatial dynamics without the heavy computational cost of conventional recurrent architectures. Extensive experiments on several benchmark traffic datasets, including METR-LA, PEMS-BAY, PEMS03, PEMS04, PEMS07, and PEMS08, show that GAMMA-Net consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art models across different prediction horizons, achieving up to a 16.25% reduction in Mean Absolute Error (MAE) compared to baseline models. Ablation studies highlight the critical contributions of both the spatial and temporal components, emphasizing their complementary role in improving prediction accuracy. In conclusion, the GAMMA-Net model sets a new standard in traffic forecasting, offering a powerful tool for next-generation traffic management and urban planning. The code for this study is available at https://github.com/hdy6438/GAMMA-Net

analysis.tldr: GAMMA-Net 结合图注意力网络与多轴 Mamba 实现自适应长时交通预测，在多个基准数据集上取得 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统交通预测模型难以充分捕捉复杂的时空依赖关系，导致预测精度不足，影响智能交通系统的管理效率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且自适应地建模交通数据中的长时时空依赖关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GAMMA-Net，将图注意力网络（GAT）与多轴选择性状态空间模型（Mamba）交错集成，GAT 动态调整节点影响，Mamba 高效建模长时时空动态。
contributions: 首次将图注意力网络与多轴 Mamba 结合用于交通预测，实现自适应时空建模。
在六个基准数据集上取得 SOTA，MAE 最高降低 16.25%。
analysis.experiments: 在 METR-LA、PEMS-BAY、PEMS03、PEMS04、PEMS07、PEMS08 六个数据集上评估，与基线模型对比，并进行了消融研究。
limitations: 可能对极端事件或突发交通状况的泛化能力有限。
模型复杂度可能较高，部署时需考虑计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GAMMA-Net 结合图注意力网络与多轴 Mamba 实现自适应长时交通预测，在多个基准数据集上取得 SOTA。

papers.title: Q-DeepSight: Incentivizing Thinking with Images for Image Quality Assessment and Refinement
papers.abstract: Image Quality Assessment (IQA) models are increasingly deployed as perceptual critics to guide generative models and image restoration. This role demands not only accurate scores but also actionable, localized feedback. However, current MLLM-based methods adopt a single-look, language-only paradigm, which departs from human evidence-seeking judgment and yields weakly grounded rationales, limiting their reliability for in-the-loop refinement. We propose Q-DeepSight, a think-with-image framework that emulates this human-like process. It performs interleaved Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (iMCoT) with tool-augmented evidence acquisition (e.g., crop-and-zoom) to explicitly determine where quality degrades and why. To train these long iMCoT trajectories via reinforcement learning, we introduce two techniques: Perceptual Curriculum Reward (PCR) to mitigate reward sparsity and Evidence Gradient Filtering (EGF) to improve credit assignment for visually-grounded reasoning. Q-DeepSight achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse benchmarks, including natural, restored, and AI-generated content. Furthermore, we demonstrate its practical value with Perceptual-in-Generation (PiG), a training-free framework where Q-DeepSight's diagnoses guide iterative image enhancement, effectively closing the loop between assessment and refinement.

analysis.tldr: 提出Q-DeepSight框架，通过多模态思维链和强化学习实现可解释的图像质量评估与迭代优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM-based IQA模型采用单次语言推理，缺乏人类证据驱动的判断过程，导致反馈不可靠，难以用于生成模型的闭环优化。
analysis.problem: 如何让IQA模型像人类一样通过逐步观察和工具辅助获取证据，生成可操作的局部反馈，并用于指导图像生成/恢复的迭代改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Q-DeepSight框架，包含交错多模态思维链（iMCoT）和工具增强的证据获取（如裁剪放大）；通过强化学习训练长轨迹，引入感知课程奖励（PCR）缓解奖励稀疏性，证据梯度过滤（EGF）改进视觉推理的信用分配。
contributions: 提出think-with-image框架Q-DeepSight，模拟人类证据驱动的判断过程，实现可解释的IQA。
引入PCR和EGF技术，有效训练长多模态思维链轨迹。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，并展示其在无训练图像增强框架PiG中的实用价值。
analysis.experiments: 在自然、恢复和AI生成内容等多种基准上达到SOTA性能，并验证了PiG框架的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态训练数据。
推理过程较长，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Q-DeepSight框架，通过多模态思维链和强化学习实现可解释的图像质量评估与迭代优化。

papers.title: When W4A4 Breaks Camouflaged Object Detection: Token-Group Dual-Constraint Activation Quantization
papers.abstract: Camouflaged object detection (COD) segments objects that intentionally blend with the background, so predictions depend on subtle texture and boundary cues. COD is often needed under tight on-device memory and latency budgets, making low-bit inference highly desirable. However, COD is unusually hard to quantify aggressively. We study post-training W4A4 quantization of Transformer-based COD and find a task-specific cliff: heavy-tailed background tokens dominate a shared activation range, inflating the step size and pushing weak-but-structured boundary cues into the zero bin. This exposes a token-local bottleneck -- remove cross-token range domination and bound the zero-bin mass under 4-bit activations. To address this, we introduce COD-TDQ, a COD-aware Token-group Dual-constraint activation Quantization method. COD-TDQ addresses this token-local bottleneck with two coupled steps: Direct-Sum Token-Group (DSTG) assigns token-group scales to suppress cross-token range domination, and Dual-Constraint Range Projection (DCRP) projects each token-group clip range to keep the step-to-dispersion ratio and the zero-bin mass bounded. Across four COD benchmarks and two baseline models (CFRN and ESCNet), COD-TDQ consistently achieves an Sαscore more than 0.12 higher than that of the state-of-the-art quantization method without retraining. The code will be released.

analysis.tldr: 针对伪装目标检测的W4A4量化难题，提出Token-Group双约束激活量化方法，有效保留弱边界线索。
analysis.research_motivation: 伪装目标检测（COD）依赖细微纹理和边界线索，但低比特量化（如W4A4）会因背景token主导激活范围而破坏这些线索，现有量化方法未考虑COD的任务特异性。
analysis.problem: Transformer-based COD在4-bit激活量化下，重尾背景token主导共享激活范围，导致步长膨胀、弱边界线索被压入零bin，形成token局部瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现COD量化中的任务特定悬崖：背景token的激活值分布呈重尾，主导了全局激活范围，使得步长变大，而具有结构性的弱边界线索被量化到零bin中丢失。
analysis.method: 提出COD-TDQ方法，包含两个耦合步骤：Direct-Sum Token-Group (DSTG) 为每个token组分配独立缩放因子以抑制跨token范围主导；Dual-Constraint Range Projection (DCRP) 约束每个token组的裁剪范围，保持步长-离散度比和零bin质量在界内。
contributions: 首次系统研究Transformer-based COD在W4A4量化下的失效模式，揭示token局部瓶颈。
提出COD-TDQ量化方法，通过token组双约束激活量化保留弱边界线索。
在四个COD基准和两个基线模型上，Sα分数比最先进量化方法高0.12以上。
analysis.experiments: 在四个COD基准数据集和两个基线模型（CFRN和ESCNet）上评估，COD-TDQ一致获得Sα分数比最先进量化方法高0.12以上，无需重训练。
limitations: 方法针对Transformer-based COD设计，可能不直接适用于其他视觉任务。
未讨论W4A4量化对模型推理速度的实际提升效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对伪装目标检测的W4A4量化难题，提出Token-Group双约束激活量化方法，有效保留弱边界线索。

papers.title: CATP: Confidence-Aware Token Pruning for Camouflaged Object Detection
papers.abstract: Camouflaged Object Detection (COD) aims to segment targets that share extreme textural and structural similarities with their complex environments. Leveraging their capacity for long-range dependency modeling, Transformer-based detectors have become the mainstream approach and achieve state-of-the-art (SoTA) accuracy, yet their substantial computational overhead severely limits practical deployment. To address this, we propose a hierarchical Confidence-Aware Token Pruning framework (CATP) tailored for COD. Our approach hierarchically identifies and discards easily distinguishable tokens from both background and object interiors, focusing computations on critical boundary tokens. To compensate for information loss from pruning, we introduce a dual-path feature compensation mechanism that aggregates contextual knowledge from pruned tokens into enriched features. Extensive experiments on multiple COD benchmarks demonstrate that our method significantly reduces computational complexity while maintaining high accuracy, offering a promising research direction for the efficient deployment of COD models in real-world scenarios. The code will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种置信度感知的令牌剪枝框架，在保持高精度的同时显著降低伪装目标检测的计算复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer-based COD模型虽精度高，但计算开销大，难以实际部署，需要高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著损失精度的情况下减少Transformer在COD任务中的计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 背景和物体内部的令牌容易区分，边界令牌是关键难点。
analysis.method: 分层置信度感知令牌剪枝框架，识别并丢弃易区分令牌，通过双路径特征补偿机制聚合剪枝令牌的上下文信息。
contributions: 提出针对COD的置信度感知令牌剪枝框架，降低计算复杂度。
设计双路径特征补偿机制，缓解剪枝导致的信息损失。
analysis.experiments: 在多个COD基准上实验，方法显著降低计算复杂度并保持高精度。
limitations: 可能对极端伪装场景的边界令牌保留策略不够鲁棒。
双路径补偿机制可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种置信度感知的令牌剪枝框架，在保持高精度的同时显著降低伪装目标检测的计算复杂度。

papers.title: Applications of deep generative models to DNA reaction kinetics and to cryogenic electron microscopy
papers.abstract: This dissertation explores how deep generative models can advance the analysis of challenging biological problems by integrating domain knowledge with deep learning. It focuses on two areas: DNA reaction kinetics and cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM). In the first part, we present ViDa, a biophysics-informed framework leveraging variational autoencoders (VAEs) and geometric scattering transforms to generate biophysically-plausible embeddings of DNA reaction kinetics simulations. These embeddings are reduced to a two-dimensional space to visualize DNA hybridization and toehold-mediated strand displacement reactions. ViDa preserves structure and clusters trajectory ensembles into reaction pathways, making simulation results more interpretable and revealing new mechanistic insights. In the second part, we address key challenges in cryo-EM density map interpretation and protein structure modeling. We provide a comprehensive review and benchmarking of deep learning methods for atomic model building, with improved evaluation metrics and practical guidance. We then present Struc2mapGAN, a generative adversarial network that synthesizes high-fidelity experimental-like cryo-EM density maps from protein structures. Finally, we present CryoSAMU, a structure-aware multimodal U-Net that enhances intermediate-resolution cryo-EM maps by integrating density features with structural embeddings from protein language models via cross-attention. Overall, these contributions demonstrate the potential of deep generative models to interpret DNA reaction mechanisms and advance cryo-EM density map analysis and protein structure modeling.

analysis.tldr: 利用深度生成模型（VAE、GAN、U-Net）分析DNA反应动力学和冷冻电镜密度图，提升可解释性和建模精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物数据分析中，传统方法难以处理高维、复杂且噪声大的数据，深度生成模型能结合领域知识生成可解释的嵌入或高保真密度图，从而揭示新机制。
analysis.problem: 如何利用深度生成模型改进DNA反应动力学模拟的可解释性以及冷冻电镜密度图的建模与增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三个模型：ViDA（VAE+几何散射变换）用于DNA反应动力学嵌入；Struc2mapGAN（GAN）从蛋白质结构合成冷冻电镜密度图；CryoSAMU（多模态U-Net+交叉注意力）增强中等分辨率冷冻电镜图。
contributions: 提出ViDA框架，结合VAE和几何散射变换生成生物物理合理的DNA反应动力学嵌入，实现可视化与聚类。
提出Struc2mapGAN，从蛋白质结构生成高保真冷冻电镜密度图。
提出CryoSAMU，利用结构感知多模态U-Net增强中等分辨率冷冻电镜图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: ViDA可能依赖特定模拟数据，泛化性未知。
Struc2mapGAN生成的密度图与真实实验图的差异未量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用深度生成模型（VAE、GAN、U-Net）分析DNA反应动力学和冷冻电镜密度图，提升可解释性和建模精度。

papers.title: Structural Instability of Feature Composition
papers.abstract: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for disentangling feature superposition in transformer-based architectures, enabling precise control via activation steering. However, the theoretical foundations of compositional steering -- the simultaneous activation of distinct semantic latents -- remain under-explored. The prevailing Linear Representation Hypothesis often abstracts away non-linear interference effects that arise in overcomplete dictionaries. We present a geometric framework for analyzing the instability of feature unions. Modeling the activation space as a high-dimensional sparse cone manifold, we derive an asymptotic compositional-collapse threshold under a spherical dictionary model, characterized by the Gaussian mean width (statistical dimension) of the signal cone. We further show that, in the high-bias regime, ReLU rectification converts microscopic correlation-induced variance fluctuations into a systematic drift that accumulates under composition, yielding interference growth consistent with a ratchet effect. We validate the predicted scaling trends on structured semantic features extracted from CLEVR, where hierarchical correlations accelerate the transition relative to random baselines. Together, our results highlight geometric constraints on the scalability of union-based steering and motivate composition mechanisms that explicitly manage interference beyond naive linear superposition.

analysis.tldr: 稀疏自编码器在特征组合时存在结构不稳定性，几何分析揭示组合坍缩阈值与棘轮效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）虽能解耦特征叠加并实现激活操控，但组合操控（同时激活不同语义潜在变量）的理论基础尚不明确，现有线性表示假设忽略了过完备字典中的非线性干扰效应。
analysis.problem: 研究特征组合（compositional steering）中的结构不稳定性，即同时激活多个语义特征时出现的干扰和坍缩现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在高偏置区域，ReLU整流将微观相关性引起的方差波动转化为系统性漂移，在组合下累积，产生类似棘轮效应的干扰增长；且层次相关性加速了从随机基线到组合坍缩的转变。
analysis.method: 将激活空间建模为高维稀疏锥流形，在球形字典模型下推导特征组合的渐近坍缩阈值（由信号锥的高斯平均宽度/统计维度刻画），并分析ReLU整流导致的棘轮效应。
contributions: 提出几何框架分析特征组合的不稳定性，推导出组合坍缩的渐近阈值。
揭示ReLU整流在组合中产生棘轮效应，导致干扰累积。
在CLEVR数据集上验证了预测的缩放趋势，表明层次相关性加速坍缩。
analysis.experiments: 在CLEVR数据集的结构化语义特征上验证了预测的缩放趋势，显示层次相关性加速了相对于随机基线的转变。
limitations: 理论分析基于球形字典模型，可能不适用于更一般的字典结构。
实验仅在CLEVR数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 稀疏自编码器在特征组合时存在结构不稳定性，几何分析揭示组合坍缩阈值与棘轮效应。

papers.title: Refinement of Accelerated Demonstrations via Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control for Fast Contact-Rich Imitation Learning
papers.abstract: Fast execution of contact-rich manipulation is critical for practical deployment, yet providing fast demonstrations for imitation learning (IL) remains challenging: humans cannot demonstrate at high speed, and naively accelerating demonstrations alters contact dynamics and induces large tracking errors. We present a method to autonomously refine time-accelerated demonstrations by repurposing Iterative Reference Learning Control (IRLC) to iteratively update the reference trajectory from observed tracking errors. However, applying IRLC directly at high speed tends to produce larger early-iteration errors and less stable transients. To address this issue, we propose Incremental Iterative Reference Learning Control (I2RLC), which gradually increases the speed while updating the reference, yielding high-fidelity trajectories. We validate on real-robot whiteboard erasing and peg-in-hole tasks using a teleoperation setup with a compliance-controlled follower and a 3D-printed haptic leader. Both IRLC and I2RLC achieve up to 10x faster demonstrations with reduced tracking error; moreover, I2RLC improves spatial similarity to the original trajectories by 22.5% on average over IRLC across three tasks and multiple speeds (3x-10x). We then use the refined trajectories to train IL policies; the resulting policies execute faster than the demonstrations and achieve 100% success rates in the peg-in-hole task at both seen and unseen positions, with I2RLC-trained policies exhibiting lower contact forces than those trained on IRLC-refined demonstrations. These results indicate that gradual speed scheduling coupled with reference adaptation provides a practical path to fast, contact-rich IL.

analysis.tldr: 提出增量迭代参考学习控制（I2RLC），通过逐步加速和参考轨迹更新，自主优化高速演示轨迹，用于快速接触式模仿学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 接触式操作任务需要快速执行，但人类无法提供高速演示，而简单加速演示会改变接触动力学并导致大跟踪误差，限制了模仿学习的实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何自主优化时间加速后的演示轨迹，使其在高速下仍保持高保真度，以便用于快速接触式模仿学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接应用IRLC于高速场景会产生较大的早期迭代误差和较不稳定的瞬态行为；逐步加速并同时更新参考轨迹可缓解此问题。
analysis.method: 提出增量迭代参考学习控制（I2RLC），在每次迭代中逐步增加速度并更新参考轨迹，从而获得高保真轨迹。
contributions: 提出I2RLC方法，通过逐步加速和参考更新实现高速演示轨迹的自主优化。
在真实机器人擦白板和插销孔任务中验证，I2RLC相比IRLC将空间相似性平均提高22.5%，且训练的策略在插销孔任务中达到100%成功率并降低接触力。
analysis.experiments: 在真实机器人擦白板和插销孔任务中，使用遥操作设置（含柔顺控制从端和3D打印触觉主端）进行验证，比较IRLC和I2RLC在3x-10x加速下的性能，并训练模仿学习策略评估成功率与接触力。
limitations: 方法依赖遥操作设置和初始演示质量。
仅验证了两种接触式任务，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出增量迭代参考学习控制（I2RLC），通过逐步加速和参考轨迹更新，自主优化高速演示轨迹，用于快速接触式模仿学习。

papers.title: TowerDataset: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Transmission Corridor Segmentation with a Global-Local Fusion Framework
papers.abstract: Fine-grained semantic segmentation of transmission-corridor point clouds is fundamental for intelligent power-line inspection. However, current progress is limited by realistic data scarcity and the difficulty of modeling global corridor structure and local geometric details in long, heterogeneous scenes. Existing public datasets usually provide only a few coarse categories or short cropped scenes which overlook long-range structural dependencies, severe long-tail distributions, and subtle distinctions among safety-critical components. As a result, current methods are difficult to evaluate under realistic inspection settings, and their ability to preserve and integrate complementary global and local cues remains unclear. To address the above challenges, we introduce TowerDataset, a heterogeneous benchmark for transmission-corridor segmentation. TowerDataset contains 661 real-world scenes and about 2.466 billion points. It preserves long corridor extents, defines a fine-grained 22-class taxonomy, and provides standardized splits and evaluation protocols. In addition, we present a global-local fusion framework which preserves and fuses whole-scene and local-detail information. A whole-scene branch with NoCrop training and prototypical contrastive learning captures long-range topology and contextual dependencies. A block-wise local branch retains fine geometric structures. Both predictions are then fused and refined by geometric validation. This design allows the model to exploit both global relationships and local shape details when recognizing rare and confusing components. Experiments on TowerDataset and two public benchmarks demonstrate the challenge of the proposed benchmark and the robustness of our framework in real, complex, and heterogeneous transmission-corridor scenes. The dataset will be released soon at https://huggingface.co/datasets/tccx18/Towerdataset/tree/main.

analysis.tldr: 提出输电走廊点云分割的异构基准TowerDataset及全局-局部融合框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 输电走廊点云细粒度分割对智能巡检至关重要，但现有数据集场景短、类别粗、忽略长程结构依赖，且方法难以同时捕捉全局拓扑与局部几何细节。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、细粒度、保留长程结构的输电走廊点云基准，以及能有效融合全局与局部信息的分割方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有数据集存在长程结构依赖被忽略、严重长尾分布、安全关键部件细微差异难以区分等问题。
analysis.method: 提出TowerDataset基准（661个场景、24.66亿点、22类细粒度标签）和全局-局部融合框架：全局分支采用NoCrop训练和原型对比学习捕获长程拓扑，局部分支保留精细几何结构，最后通过几何验证融合并细化预测。
contributions: 构建了大规模、细粒度、保留长程结构的输电走廊点云分割基准TowerDataset。
提出全局-局部融合框架，有效结合全局拓扑与局部几何细节，提升对稀有和易混淆组件的识别能力。
analysis.experiments: 在TowerDataset和两个公开基准上实验，验证了基准的挑战性和框架在真实复杂场景中的鲁棒性。
limitations: 未提及跨域泛化能力。
框架计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出输电走廊点云分割的异构基准TowerDataset及全局-局部融合框架。

papers.title: When Earth Foundation Models Meet Diffusion: An Application to Land Surface Temperature Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Land surface temperature (LST) super-resolution is important for environmental monitoring. However, it remains challenging as coarse thermal observations severely underdetermine fine-scale structure. In this paper, we propose Earth Foundation Model-guided Diffusion (EFDiff), a novel framework for super-resolution under extreme spatial degradation. EFDiff uses the Prithvi-EO-2.0 Earth foundation model to encode high-resolution multispectral reflectance into geospatial embeddings, which are injected into the denoising network via cross-attention to guide fine-scale reconstruction from highly degraded observations. We study two variants, EFDiff-$ε$ and EFDiff-$x_0$, which offer complementary trade-offs between perceptual realism and pixel-level fidelity. We evaluate EFDiff under an extreme $32\times$ scale gap using a globally diverse benchmark comprising 242,416 co-registered Landsat thermal-reflectance patches. Results show that EFDiff consistently outperforms baseline methods and that cross-attention conditioning by EFM is more effective than HLS channel concatenation. Although we present EFDiff in the context of LST super-resolution, the framework is broadly applicable to remote sensing problems in which pretrained geospatial representations can guide generative reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出地球基础模型引导的扩散框架EFDiff，实现极端32倍空间降尺度下的地表温度超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 地表温度超分辨率对环境监测至关重要，但粗分辨率热观测严重欠定细尺度结构，现有方法难以应对极端空间退化。
analysis.problem: 在极端空间降尺度（如32倍）下，如何利用高分辨率多光谱反射率信息引导扩散模型生成高保真地表温度图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Prithvi-EO-2.0地球基础模型编码高分辨率多光谱反射率为地理空间嵌入，通过交叉注意力注入去噪网络，引导从高度退化观测中重建细尺度结构；提出EFDiff-ε和EFDiff-x0两种变体，分别侧重感知真实性和像素保真度。
contributions: 提出EFDiff框架，首次将地球基础模型与扩散模型结合用于极端空间降尺度超分辨率。
在242,416个全球多样化的Landsat热-反射率补丁上验证，EFDiff一致优于基线方法，且交叉注意力条件化比HLS通道拼接更有效。
analysis.experiments: 使用242,416个全球多样化的Landsat热-反射率补丁，在32倍尺度差距下评估，EFDiff一致优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多光谱反射率数据，在数据缺失场景下受限。
两种变体之间的权衡需要根据具体应用选择，可能增加使用复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出地球基础模型引导的扩散框架EFDiff，实现极端32倍空间降尺度下的地表温度超分辨率。

papers.title: enclawed: A Configurable, Sector-Neutral Hardening Framework for Single-User AI Assistant Gateways
papers.abstract: We present enclawed, a hard-fork hardening framework built on the OpenClaw AI assistant gateway. enclawed targets deployments that need attestable peer trust, deny-by-default external connectivity, signed-module loading, and a tamper-evident audit trail -- typically regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, defense, government). The framework ships in two flavors: an open flavor preserving OpenClaw compatibility while emitting audit, classification, and data-loss-prevention (DLP) signals, and an enclaved flavor activating strict allowlists, FIPS cryptographic-module assertion, mandatory manifest signature verification, and high-assurance peer attestation for the Model Context Protocol. The classification ladder is data-driven: deployers pick from five built-in presets or supply their own JSON. We ship a 356-case test suite (261 unit + 95 adversarial pen-tests) covering tamper detection, signature forgery, egress bypass, audit-log truncation, trust-root mutation, DLP evasion, prompt injection, code injection, and biconditional admission for net-capable extensions; real-time human-in-the-loop control; a memory-bounded transaction buffer with rollback; strict-mode TypeScript typecheck; and a CI workflow. The biconditional extension-admission gate extends the skill trust schema to non-skill extensions. The four-level verification lattice is now closed at the top: four skill-formal-* primitives plus a CLI produce a signed proof-carrying bundle the runtime re-checks at load, raising a skill from tested to formal via static effect-containment, refinement-typed dispatch, and bounded model checking. enclawed is a hardening framework, not an accredited certification; hardware, validated crypto, facilities, and assessor sign-off remain the deployer's responsibility.

analysis.tldr: enclawed 是一个面向单用户 AI 助手网关的可配置、领域中立加固框架，提供可证明的信任、默认拒绝外联、签名模块加载和防篡改审计追踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 在金融、医疗、国防等受监管行业中，AI 助手网关需要满足严格的安全与合规要求，现有方案缺乏可配置、可证明的加固框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可配置、领域中立且能提供可证明安全属性的 AI 助手网关加固框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 OpenClaw 构建硬分叉加固框架，提供开放和 enclaved 两种风格，包含数据驱动的分类阶梯、双条件扩展准入门、四层验证格、签名证明包等机制。
contributions: 提出 enclawed 框架，支持可配置的加固策略和两种部署风格。
设计双条件扩展准入门和四层验证格，提升扩展加载的安全性。
提供 356 个测试用例（含 95 个对抗性渗透测试）覆盖多种攻击场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架本身不是认证，硬件、验证密码学、设施和评估者签署仍由部署者负责。
可能仅适用于单用户场景，多用户或分布式场景未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: enclawed 是一个面向单用户 AI 助手网关的可配置、领域中立加固框架，提供可证明的信任、默认拒绝外联、签名模块加载和防篡改审计追踪。

papers.title: Lorentz Framework for Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation in hyperbolic space enables compact modeling of hierarchical structure while providing inherent uncertainty quantification. Prior approaches predominantly rely on the Poincaré ball model, which suffers from numerical instability, optimization, and computational challenges. We propose a novel, tractable, architecture-agnostic semantic segmentation framework (pixel-wise and mask classification) in the hyperbolic Lorentz model. We employ text embeddings with semantic and visual cues to guide hierarchical pixel-level representations in Lorentz space. This enables stable and efficient optimization without requiring a Riemannian optimizer, and easily integrates with existing Euclidean architectures. Beyond segmentation, our approach yields free uncertainty estimation, confidence map, boundary delineation, hierarchical and text-based retrieval, and zero-shot performance, reaching generalized flatter minima. We introduce a novel uncertainty and confidence indicator in Lorentz cone embeddings. Further, we provide analytical and empirical insights into Lorentz optimization via gradient analysis. Extensive experiments on ADE20K, COCO-Stuff-164k, Pascal-VOC, and Cityscapes, utilizing state-of-the-art per-pixel classification models (DeepLabV3 and SegFormer) and mask classification models (mask2former and maskformer), validate the effectiveness and generality of our approach. Our results demonstrate the potential of hyperbolic Lorentz embeddings for robust and uncertainty-aware semantic segmentation. Code is available at https://github.com/mxahan/Lorentz_semantic_segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出在双曲Lorentz模型中进行语义分割的框架，无需黎曼优化器，支持不确定性估计和零样本性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Poincaré球模型的双曲语义分割方法存在数值不稳定、优化困难和计算挑战，亟需更稳定高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 解决双曲空间中语义分割的数值不稳定、优化困难和计算效率问题，并实现不确定性量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Poincaré球模型在语义分割中面临数值不稳定和优化挑战；Lorentz模型可提供更稳定的优化和泛化平坦最小值。
analysis.method: 提出基于双曲Lorentz模型的语义分割框架，利用文本嵌入引导像素级层次表示，无需黎曼优化器，兼容现有欧几里得架构。
contributions: 首个在Lorentz模型上实现像素级和掩码分类的语义分割框架，架构无关且无需黎曼优化器。
引入Lorentz锥嵌入中的不确定性和置信度指标，提供免费不确定性估计、置信图、边界描绘、层次检索和零样本性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ADE20K、COCO-Stuff-164k、Pascal-VOC和Cityscapes上使用DeepLabV3、SegFormer、Mask2Former和MaskFormer验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，需要进一步调优。
在极大规模数据集上的计算开销尚未充分评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在双曲Lorentz模型中进行语义分割的框架，无需黎曼优化器，支持不确定性估计和零样本性能。

papers.title: The CTLNet for Shanghai Composite Index Prediction
papers.abstract: Shanghai Composite Index prediction has become a hot issue for many investors and academic researchers. Deep learning models are widely applied in multivariate time series forecasting, including recurrent neural networks (RNN), convolutional neural networks (CNN), and transformers. Specifically, the Transformer encoder, with its unique attention mechanism and parallel processing capabilities, has become an important tool in time series prediction, and has an advantage in dealing with long sequence dependencies and multivariate data correlations. Drawing on the strengths of various models, we propose the CNN-Transformer-LSTM Networks (CTLNet). This paper explores the application of CTLNet for Shanghai Composite Index prediction and the comparative experiments show that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出CNN-Transformer-LSTM混合网络用于上证指数预测，实验显示优于现有基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 上证指数预测对投资者和研究者具有重要价值，现有深度学习模型（RNN、CNN、Transformer）各有优势但单一模型难以全面捕捉时间序列的复杂特征。
analysis.problem: 如何融合CNN、Transformer和LSTM的优势，提升上证指数预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CTLNet，结合CNN提取局部特征、Transformer捕捉长程依赖、LSTM建模时序动态。
contributions: 提出CTLNet混合架构用于上证指数预测
实验表明CTLNet优于现有最先进基线
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对比实验显示模型优于基线。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集（上证指数）上验证，泛化性未知
未提供消融实验或详细分析各组件贡献
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CNN-Transformer-LSTM混合网络用于上证指数预测，实验显示优于现有基线。

papers.title: The Illusion of Certainty: Decoupling Capability and Calibration in On-Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is an increasingly important paradigm for post-training language models. However, we identify a pervasive Scaling Law of Miscalibration: while OPD effectively improves task accuracy, it systematically traps models in severe overconfidence. We trace this failure to an information mismatch: teacher supervision is formed under privileged context available during training, whereas the deployed model must report confidence using only deployment-time information. We formalize this perspective theoretically, showing that teacher-conditioned success is generally not a valid target for deployment-time confidence and that helpful privileged context induces entropy collapse and a systematic optimism bias. To address this, we propose a calibration-aware OPD framework, CaOPD, that estimates empirical confidence from model rollouts, replaces self-reported confidence with this student-grounded target, and distills the revised response through the same self-distillation pipeline. Experiments across various models and domains show that CaOPD achieves Pareto-optimal calibration while maintaining competitive capability, generalizing robustly under out-of-distribution and continual learning. Our findings highlight that capability distillation does not imply calibrated confidence, and that confidence should be treated as an essential objective in post-training. Code: https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/CaOPD

analysis.tldr: 提出CaOPD框架，通过解耦能力蒸馏与置信度校准，解决在线策略蒸馏中模型过度自信的系统性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线策略蒸馏（OPD）在语言模型后训练中日益重要，但现有方法导致模型严重过度自信，影响部署可靠性。
analysis.problem: OPD中教师监督信息存在训练与部署时的信息不匹配，导致模型置信度校准失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现OPD存在“误校准的缩放定律”：任务准确率提升的同时，模型系统性陷入过度自信。
analysis.method: 提出CaOPD框架，从模型自生成轨迹中估计经验置信度，替代自报告置信度作为学生目标，并通过自蒸馏管道进行校准。
contributions: 理论证明教师条件成功不是部署时置信度的有效目标，且特权上下文导致熵崩溃和乐观偏差。
提出CaOPD方法，实现帕累托最优的校准与能力保持，并在分布外和持续学习场景中表现鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型和领域上验证，CaOPD在保持竞争力的同时实现帕累托最优校准，并泛化到分布外和持续学习场景。
limitations: 可能依赖自生成轨迹的质量，低质量轨迹可能影响校准效果。
框架在极低资源场景下的有效性尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CaOPD框架，通过解耦能力蒸馏与置信度校准，解决在线策略蒸馏中模型过度自信的系统性问题。

papers.title: SafeDream: Safety World Model for Proactive Early Jailbreak Detection
papers.abstract: Multi-turn jailbreak attacks progressively erode LLM safety alignment across seemingly innocuous conversation turns, achieving success rates exceeding 90% against state-of-the-art models. Existing alignment-based and guardrail methods suffer from three key limitations: they require costly weight modification, evaluate each turn independently without modeling cumulative safety erosion, and detect attacks only after harmful content has been generated. To address these limitations, we first formulate the proactive early jailbreak detection problem with a new metric, detection lead, that measures how early an attack can be detected before the LLM complies. We then propose SAFEDREAM, a lightweight world-model-based framework that operates as an external module without modifying the LLM's weights. SAFEDREAM introduces three components: (1) a safety state world model that encodes LLM hidden states into a compact safety representation and predicts how it evolves across turns, (2) CUSUM detection that accumulates weak per-turn risk signals into reliable evidence, and (3) contrastive imagination that simultaneously rolls out attack and benign futures in latent space to issue early alarms before jailbreaks occur. On three multi-turn jailbreak benchmarks (XGuard-Train, SafeDialBench, SafeMTData) against 8 baselines, SAFEDREAM achieves the best detection timeliness across all benchmarks (1.06-1.20 turns before compliance) while maintaining competitive false positive rates and outperforming baselines in detection quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAFEDREAM世界模型框架，通过预测安全状态演化实现多轮越狱攻击的提前检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮越狱攻击通过看似无害的对话逐步侵蚀LLM安全对齐，现有方法需修改权重、独立评估每轮且仅在有害内容生成后检测，缺乏提前预警能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改LLM权重的前提下，提前检测多轮越狱攻击，即在模型生成有害响应之前发出警报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多轮越狱攻击成功率超过90%，现有方法无法建模安全状态的累积侵蚀，且检测滞后。
analysis.method: SAFEDREAM框架包含三个组件：安全状态世界模型（编码隐藏状态并预测演化）、CUSUM检测（累积弱风险信号）、对比想象（在潜在空间同时推演攻击和良性未来以提前报警）。
contributions: 形式化定义了提前越狱检测问题并引入新指标detection lead
提出轻量级世界模型框架SAFEDREAM，无需修改LLM权重即可实现提前检测
在三个基准上达到最佳检测时效性（合规前1.06-1.20轮），同时保持竞争性假阳性率
analysis.experiments: 在XGuard-Train、SafeDialBench、SafeMTData三个多轮越狱基准上，与8个基线对比，SAFEDREAM在检测时效性上最优，假阳性率有竞争力，检测质量优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM隐藏状态的可获取性
对比想象的计算开销未在摘要中明确
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAFEDREAM世界模型框架，通过预测安全状态演化实现多轮越狱攻击的提前检测。

papers.title: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network for Image Classification
papers.abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) has brought new breakthroughs to the field of image classification by introducing the self-attention mechanism and Graph Convolutional Networks(GCN) have been proposed and successfully applied in data representation and analysis. However, there are key challenges which limit their further development: (1) The patch size selected by ViT is crucial for accurate predictions, which raises a natural question: How to select the size of patches properly or how to comprehensively combine small patches and larger patches; (2) While the spatial structure information is important in vision tasks, the 1D position embeddings fails to capture the spatial structure information of patches more accurately; (3) The GCN can capture the local connectivity relationships between image nodes, but it lacks the ability to capture global graph structural information. On the contrary, the self-attention mechanism of ViT can draw the global relation on image patches, but it is unable to model the local structure of image. To overcome such limitations, we propose the Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network (GCN-HViT) for image classification. Specifically, the Hierarchical ViT we designed can model patch-wise information interactions on a global scale within each level and model hierarchical relationships between small patches and large patches across multiple levels. In addition, the proposed GCN method functions as a local feature extractor to obtain the local representation of each image patch which serves as a 2D position embedding of each patch in the 2D space. Meanwhile, it models patch-wise information interactions on a local scale within each level. Extensive experiments on 3 real-world datasets demonstrate that GCN-HViT achieves state-of-the-art performance.
