analysis.tldr: 提出GCN-HViT，通过层次化ViT与GCN结合，同时捕获图像的全局和局部结构信息，在图像分类任务上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: ViT在图像分类中依赖patch大小选择且1D位置编码无法捕获空间结构，GCN能捕获局部连接但缺乏全局信息，两者互补但现有方法未能有效结合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个同时捕获图像全局关系（ViT）和局部结构（GCN）的层次化模型，并解决patch大小选择和空间位置编码问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ViT的patch大小选择影响预测准确性，1D位置嵌入无法准确捕获空间结构；GCN缺乏全局图结构信息，而ViT无法建模局部结构。
analysis.method: 提出GCN-HViT，包含层次化ViT（多层级建模小patch和大patch的层次关系）和GCN局部特征提取器（作为2D位置嵌入并建模局部patch交互）。
contributions: 设计层次化ViT，在全局尺度上建模patch间信息交互，并在多层级间建模小patch和大patch的层次关系。
提出GCN作为局部特征提取器，为每个patch提供2D位置嵌入，并在局部尺度上建模patch交互。
analysis.experiments: 在3个真实世界数据集上进行实验，结果表明GCN-HViT达到了最先进的性能。
limitations: 摘要未提供具体数据集名称和规模，可能泛化性需进一步验证。
层次化ViT的计算复杂度可能较高，未讨论效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GCN-HViT，通过层次化ViT与GCN结合，同时捕获图像的全局和局部结构信息，在图像分类任务上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Self-Reinforcing Controllable Synthesis of Rare Relational Data via Bayesian Calibration
papers.abstract: Imbalanced data are commonly present in real-world applications. While data synthesis can effectively mitigate data scarcity for rare classes, and LLMs have revolutionized text generation, the application of LLMs to the synthesis of relational/structured tabular data remains underexplored. Moreover, existing approaches lack an effective feedback mechanism to guide LLMs in continuously optimizing the quality of the generated data throughout the synthesis process. In this work, we propose RDDG, Relational Data generator with Dynamic Guidance, which is a unified in-context learning framework that employs progressive chain-of-thought (CoT) steps to generate tabular data for enhancing downstream imbalanced classification performance. RDDG first uses core set selection to identify representative samples from the original data, then utilizes in-context learning to discover the inherent patterns and correlations among attributes within the core set, and subsequently generates tabular data while preserving the aforementioned constraints. More importantly, it incorporates a self-reinforcing feedback mechanism that provides automatic assessments of the quality of the generated data, enabling continuous quality optimization throughout the generation process. Experimental results on multiple real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that RDDG outperforms existing approaches in both data fidelity and downstream imbalanced classification performance. We make our code available at https://github.com/cszhangLMU/RDDG.

analysis.tldr: 提出RDDG框架，利用LLM和贝叶斯校准的自强化反馈机制生成稀有关系数据，提升下游不平衡分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实应用中不平衡数据普遍存在，数据合成可缓解稀有类数据稀缺问题，但LLM在关系/结构化表格数据合成中的应用尚未充分探索，且现有方法缺乏有效反馈机制来持续优化生成数据质量。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM生成高质量的关系/结构化表格数据，并通过自强化反馈机制持续优化生成质量，以提升下游不平衡分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RDDG框架，包含核心集选择、上下文学习发现属性模式与相关性、渐进式思维链生成表格数据，以及自强化反馈机制（贝叶斯校准）自动评估生成数据质量并持续优化。
contributions: 提出RDDG，一个统一上下文学习框架，利用渐进式CoT步骤生成表格数据以增强不平衡分类。
引入自强化反馈机制，通过贝叶斯校准自动评估生成数据质量，实现生成过程的持续优化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实和合成数据集上实验，RDDG在数据保真度和下游不平衡分类性能上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的上下文学习能力，对复杂关系数据生成效果未知。
贝叶斯校准的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RDDG框架，利用LLM和贝叶斯校准的自强化反馈机制生成稀有关系数据，提升下游不平衡分类性能。

papers.title: PersonalHomeBench: Evaluating Agents in Personalized Smart Homes
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems are rapidly advancing toward real-world applications, yet their readiness in complex and personalized environments remains insufficiently characterized. To address this gap, we introduce PersonalHomeBench, a benchmark for evaluating foundation models as agentic assistants in personalized smart home environments. The benchmark is constructed through an iterative process that progressively builds rich household states, which are then used to generate personalized, context-dependent tasks. To support realistic agent-environment interaction, we provide PersonalHomeTools, a comprehensive toolbox enabling household information retrieval, appliance control, and situational understanding. PersonalHomeBench evaluates both reactive and proactive agentic abilities under unimodal and multimodal observations. Thorough experimentation reveals a systematic performance reduction as task complexity increases, with pronounced failures in counterfactual reasoning and under partial observability, where effective tool-based information gathering is required. These results position PersonalHomeBench as a rigorous evaluation platform for analyzing the robustness and limitations of personalized agentic reasoning and planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出PersonalHomeBench基准，用于评估智能体在个性化智能家居环境中的表现，发现任务复杂度增加时性能下降，反事实推理和部分可观测性下失败明显。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体AI系统在复杂个性化环境中的准备度评估不足，缺乏针对智能家居场景的标准化测试平台。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估基础模型作为智能体在个性化智能家居环境中的反应式和主动式能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 任务复杂度增加时性能系统性下降，反事实推理和部分可观测性下失败明显，需要有效的工具信息收集。
analysis.method: 通过迭代过程构建丰富家庭状态，生成个性化上下文相关任务，并提供PersonalHomeTools工具箱支持信息检索、设备控制和情境理解。
contributions: 提出PersonalHomeBench基准，用于评估个性化智能家居中的智能体能力
提供PersonalHomeTools工具箱，支持真实智能体-环境交互
实验揭示任务复杂度和部分可观测性下的性能瓶颈
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到实验揭示了性能下降和失败模式。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖有限的家居场景和任务类型
未提及跨语言或跨文化适应性
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PersonalHomeBench基准，用于评估智能体在个性化智能家居环境中的表现，发现任务复杂度增加时性能下降，反事实推理和部分可观测性下失败明显。

papers.title: Introspection Adapters: Training LLMs to Report Their Learned Behaviors
papers.abstract: When model developers or users fine-tune an LLM, this can induce behaviors that are unexpected, deliberately harmful, or hard to detect. It would be far easier to audit LLMs if they could simply describe their behaviors in natural language. Here, we study a scalable approach to rapidly identify learned behaviors of many LLMs derived from a shared base LLM. Given a model $M$, our method works by finetuning models $M_i$ from $M$ with implanted behaviors $b_i$; the $(M_i, b_i)$ pairs serve as labeled training data. We then train an introspection adapter (IA): a single LoRA adapter jointly trained across the finetunes $M_i$ to cause them to verbalize their implanted behaviors. We find that this IA induces self-description of learned behaviors even in finetunes of $M$ that were trained in very different ways from the $M_i$. For example, IAs generalize to AuditBench, achieving state-of-the-art at identifying explicitly hidden concerning behaviors. IAs can also be used to detect encrypted finetuning API attacks. They scale favorably with model size and training data diversity. Overall, our results suggest that IAs are a scalable, effective, and practically useful approach to auditing fine-tuned LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出内省适配器（IA），通过微调植入行为并训练LoRA适配器，使LLM能自然语言报告自身习得行为，实现可扩展的审计。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调LLM可能引入难以检测的意外或有害行为，现有审计方法复杂且不具扩展性，亟需一种能让模型直接描述自身行为的高效审计手段。
analysis.problem: 如何让微调后的LLM以自然语言方式报告其习得的（包括隐藏的）行为，从而快速识别多种模型中的异常行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从共享基模型M出发，微调出多个植入特定行为b_i的模型M_i，将(M_i, b_i)作为标注数据；然后联合训练一个LoRA适配器（内省适配器IA），使这些微调模型能口头描述其植入行为。IA可泛化到以不同方式微调的模型。
contributions: 提出内省适配器（IA）方法，通过植入行为训练使LLM能自我报告习得行为。
在AuditBench上达到最先进性能，能检测加密微调API攻击，且随模型大小和数据多样性扩展良好。
analysis.experiments: 在AuditBench上评估，IA达到最先进性能；能检测加密微调API攻击；实验表明IA随模型大小和训练数据多样性扩展良好。
limitations: 可能依赖植入行为的多样性和代表性，对未见行为泛化能力未知。
训练过程需要构造植入行为的微调模型，成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出内省适配器（IA），通过微调植入行为并训练LoRA适配器，使LLM能自然语言报告自身习得行为，实现可扩展的审计。

papers.title: Modeling Biomechanical Constraint Violations for Language-Agnostic Lip-Sync Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: Current lip-sync deepfake detectors rely on pixel-level artifacts or audio-visual correspondence, failing to generalize across languages because these cues encode data-dependent patterns rather than universal physical laws. We identify a more fundamental principle: generative models do not enforce the biomechanical constraints of authentic orofacial articulation, producing measurably elevated temporal lip variance -- a signal we term temporal lip jitter -- that is empirically consistent across the speaker's language, ethnicity, and recording conditions. We instantiate this principle through BioLip, a lightweight framework operating on 64 perioral landmark coordinates extracted by MediaPipe.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于生物力学约束违反的跨语言唇同步深度伪造检测方法
analysis.research_motivation: 现有唇同步深度伪造检测器依赖像素级伪影或音视频对应，无法跨语言泛化，因为这些线索编码的是数据依赖模式而非普遍物理规律。
analysis.problem: 跨语言场景下唇同步深度伪造检测的泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成模型不强制执行真实口面部发音的生物力学约束，导致可测量的时间唇部方差升高（称为时间唇部抖动），该信号在说话者语言、种族和录制条件下经验一致。
analysis.method: 提出BioLip，一种轻量级框架，利用MediaPipe提取的64个口周界标坐标，基于生物力学约束违反进行检测。
contributions: 识别了时间唇部抖动作为跨语言唇同步深度伪造的通用生物力学信号
提出了BioLip框架，仅使用口周界标坐标实现轻量级检测
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端遮挡或低质量视频敏感
仅依赖口周界标，可能无法检测其他类型的伪造
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于生物力学约束违反的跨语言唇同步深度伪造检测方法

papers.title: Channel Attention-Guided Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Referring Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Referring image segmentation (RIS) requires accurate segmentation of target regions in images according to language descriptions, which is a cross-modal task integrating vision and language. Existing RIS methods typically employ large-scale vision and language encoding models to improve performance, but their enormous parameter size severely restricts deployment in scenarios with limited computing resources. To solve this problem, this paper proposes a channel attention-guided cross-modal knowledge distillation method, which transfers the high-order fine-grained correlations between vision and language learned by the teacher network, as well as the correlations between semantic components represented by each channel, to the student network. Compared with the traditional pixel-wise relational distillation, this method not only enables the student to learn the knowledge of the teacher, but also retains part of its independent learning ability, alleviating the transfer of learning bias. Experimental results on two public datasets show that the proposed distillation method does not introduce additional parameters during inference and can achieve significant performance improvement for the student model.

analysis.tldr: 提出通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，用于轻量化指代图像分割模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RIS方法依赖大规模编码模型，参数量大，难以部署在资源受限场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持轻量化的同时，让学生模型有效学习教师模型中的跨模态高阶细粒度关联和通道语义关联。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统像素级关系蒸馏可能传递学习偏差，而本文方法通过保留学生独立学习能力缓解该问题。
analysis.method: 通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏，传递教师网络中学到的视觉-语言高阶细粒度关联以及各通道表示的语义成分关联。
contributions: 提出通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，传递高阶细粒度关联和通道语义关联。
在推理时不引入额外参数，显著提升学生模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开数据集上验证，蒸馏方法不引入额外参数且显著提升学生模型性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨模态蒸馏在更复杂场景或更大模型上的表现。
可能依赖特定教师网络结构，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，用于轻量化指代图像分割模型。

papers.title: AutoOR: Scalably Post-training LLMs to Autoformalize Operations Research Problems
papers.abstract: Optimization problems are central to decision-making in manufacturing, logistics, scheduling, and other industrial settings. Translating complicated descriptions of these problems into solver-ready formulations requires specialized operations research (OR) expertise, making it hard to scale. We present AutoOR, a scalable synthetic data generation and reinforcement learning pipeline that trains LLMs to autoformalize optimization problems specified in natural language across linear, mixed-integer, and non-linear categories. AutoOR generates verified training data from standard optimization forms and uses solver execution feedback as the reward signal for RL post-training. AutoOR applied to an 8B model achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results across six established OR benchmarks, matching significantly larger frontier models. For a non-linear problem class involving physical dynamics, where frontier models score near 0%, we introduce a curriculum RL strategy that bootstraps from limited initial training data to make this class tractable for post-training. We believe that methods such as AutoOR can significantly accelerate industrial decision-making with AI.

analysis.tldr: AutoOR通过合成数据生成和强化学习后训练，使8B模型在运筹学问题自动形式化上达到前沿水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 将自然语言描述的优化问题自动转化为求解器可读的公式需要运筹学专业知识，难以规模化，限制了工业决策效率。
analysis.problem: 如何训练LLM自动将自然语言描述的线性、混合整数和非线性优化问题形式化为求解器可用的公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AutoOR流水线，包括从标准优化形式生成验证过的合成数据，以及使用求解器执行反馈作为奖励信号的强化学习后训练。
contributions: 提出可扩展的合成数据生成和强化学习后训练流水线AutoOR，用于训练LLM自动形式化运筹学问题。
在六个运筹学基准上，8B模型达到或超越前沿大模型，并通过课程强化学习策略使非线性物理动力学问题从近0%提升至可处理。
analysis.experiments: 在六个运筹学基准上评估，8B模型取得最先进或竞争性结果；针对非线性物理动力学问题，课程强化学习策略使前沿模型近0%的得分变得可行。
limitations: 可能依赖特定优化形式的数据生成，泛化到更广泛问题有待验证。
课程强化学习策略的初始数据需求可能限制其在新问题上的应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoOR通过合成数据生成和强化学习后训练，使8B模型在运筹学问题自动形式化上达到前沿水平。

papers.title: Frequency-Decomposed INR for NIR-Assisted Low-Light RGB Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Addressing the issues of severe noise and high frequency structural degradation in visible images under low-light conditions, this paper proposes a Near Infrared (NIR) aided low light image restoration method based on Frequency Decoupled Implicit Neural Representation (FDINR). Based on the statistical prior of RGB-NIR cross-modal frequency correlations, specifically that low-frequency RGB signals are more reliable, whereas high frequency NIR signals exhibit higher correlation, we explicitly decompose images into distinct frequency components via multi-scale wavelet transforms and construct a dual-branch implicit neural representation framework. Within this framework, we design a cross modal differentiated frequency supervision mechanism, leveraging low light RGB to guide the reconstruction of low frequency luminance and color, and utilizing high-SNR NIR signals to constrain the generation of high frequency texture details, thereby achieving complementary advantages in the frequency domain. Furthermore, an uncertainty-based adaptive weighting loss function is introduced to automatically balance the contributions of different frequency tasks, solving the problems of color distortion and artifacts caused by rigid fusion in the spatial domain common in traditional methods. Experimental results demonstrate that FD-INR not only effectively restores image luminance consistency and structural details but also, benefitting from its implicit continuous representation, outperforms existing methods in arbitrary-resolution reconstruction tasks, significantly enhancing the reliability of low light perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率解耦隐式神经表示（FDINR），利用RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性实现低光图像去噪与任意分辨率重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光环境下可见光图像存在严重噪声和高频结构退化，传统方法在空间域刚性融合易导致颜色失真和伪影，且缺乏对跨模态频率互补特性的利用。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用NIR辅助信息，在频率域实现RGB图像的去噪与结构细节恢复，并支持任意分辨率重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性统计先验：低频RGB信号更可靠，高频NIR信号相关性更高。
analysis.method: 基于多尺度小波变换将图像分解为不同频率分量，构建双分支隐式神经表示框架，设计跨模态差异化频率监督机制（低频由RGB引导，高频由NIR约束），并引入基于不确定性的自适应加权损失函数平衡不同频率任务。
contributions: 提出频率解耦隐式神经表示（FDINR）框架，显式利用RGB-NIR跨模态频率互补性。
设计跨模态差异化频率监督机制和自适应加权损失函数，解决空间域刚性融合问题。
在低光图像去噪和任意分辨率重建任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖NIR与RGB图像的对齐质量。
计算复杂度可能较高，实时性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率解耦隐式神经表示（FDINR），利用RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性实现低光图像去噪与任意分辨率重建。

papers.title: Generative Semantic Communication via Alternating Dual-Domain Posterior Sampling
papers.abstract: Generative semantic communication (SemCom) harnesses pretrained generative priors to improve the perceptual quality of wireless image transmission. Existing generative SemCom receivers, however, rely on maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation, which fundamentally cannot preserve the data distribution and thus limits achievable perceptual quality. Moreover, current diffusion-based approaches using single-domain guidance face significant limitations: latent-domain guidance is sensitive to channel noise, while image-domain guidance inherits decoder bias. Simply combining both domains simultaneously yields an overconfident pseudo-posterior. In this paper, we formulate semantic decoding as a Bayesian inverse problem and prove that posterior sampling achieves optimal perceptual quality by preserving the data distribution. Building on this insight, we propose alternating dual-domain posterior sampling (ADDPS), a diffusion-based SemCom receiver that alternately enforces latent-domain and image-domain consistency during the sampling process. This alternating strategy decomposes joint posterior sampling into simpler subproblems, avoiding gradient conflicts while retaining the complementary strengths of both domains. Experiments on FFHQ demonstrate that the proposed ADDPS achieves superior perceptual quality compared with existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出交替双域后验采样（ADDPS）方法，通过扩散模型实现生成式语义通信中的最优感知质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式语义通信接收器基于最大后验估计，无法保持数据分布，限制了感知质量；单域引导方法存在信道噪声敏感或解码器偏差问题，简单组合双域会导致过度自信的伪后验。
analysis.problem: 如何在无线图像传输中通过后验采样实现最优感知质量，同时克服单域引导的局限性和双域联合的梯度冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出最大后验估计无法保持数据分布，单域引导（潜域或图像域）各有缺陷，简单组合双域会产生过度自信的伪后验。
analysis.method: 提出交替双域后验采样（ADDPS），在扩散采样过程中交替施加潜域和图像域一致性约束，将联合后验采样分解为更简单的子问题，避免梯度冲突并保留双域互补优势。
contributions: 将语义解码形式化为贝叶斯逆问题，证明后验采样通过保持数据分布实现最优感知质量。
提出ADDPS方法，交替执行潜域和图像域一致性约束，实现高效且高质量的后验采样。
analysis.experiments: 在FFHQ数据集上实验，ADDPS相比现有方法实现了更优的感知质量。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和泛化能力。
交替采样的计算开销可能高于单域方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出交替双域后验采样（ADDPS）方法，通过扩散模型实现生成式语义通信中的最优感知质量。

papers.title: Improving Radio Interferometry Imaging by Explicitly Modeling Cross-Domain Consistency in Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Radio astronomy plays a crucial role in understanding the universe, particularly within the realm of non-thermal astrophysics. Images of celestial objects are derived from the signals (called visibility) measured by radio telescopes. Such imaging results, called dirty images, contain artifacts due to factors such as sparsity and therefore require reconstruction to improve imaging quality. Existing methods typically restrict reconstruction to a unimodal domain, either to the dirty image after imaging or to the sparse visibility prior to imaging. Focusing solely on each unimodal reconstruction results in the loss of complementary in-context information in either the visibility or image domain, leading to an incomplete modeling of mutual dependency and consistency. To address these challenges, we propose CDCRec, a multimodal radio interferometric data reconstruction method that explicitly models cross-domain consistency. We design a hierarchical multi-task and multi-stage framework to enhance the exploration of interplays between domains during reconstruction. Our experimental results demonstrate that CDCRec improves imaging performance through enhanced cross-domain correlation extraction. In particular, our self-supervised complementary modeling strategy is better than current methods at interferometric domain translations that rely heavily on recovering dense information from constrained source-domain data.

analysis.tldr: 提出CDCRec，通过显式建模跨域一致性提升射电干涉成像质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 射电天文成像中，脏图像因稀疏性等存在伪影，现有方法仅限制在单模态域（图像或可见度）重建，丢失了互补上下文信息，无法充分建模跨域依赖和一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用可见度和图像两个域之间的互补信息，显式建模跨域一致性以提升射电干涉成像重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出仅关注单模态重建会导致丢失另一域的互补上下文信息，无法完整建模相互依赖和一致性。
analysis.method: 提出CDCRec，一种多模态射电干涉数据重建方法，设计分层多任务多阶段框架，显式建模跨域一致性，并通过自监督互补建模策略增强域间交互。
contributions: 提出CDCRec，显式建模跨域一致性的多模态重建方法。
设计分层多任务多阶段框架，增强重建中域间交互。
实验表明CDCRec通过增强跨域相关性提取提升成像性能，自监督互补建模优于依赖密集恢复的域翻译方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定望远镜配置或数据特性。
多阶段框架可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CDCRec，通过显式建模跨域一致性提升射电干涉成像质量。

papers.title: AstroSURE: Learning to Remove Noise from Astronomical Images Without Ground Truth Data
papers.abstract: In astronomical imaging, the low photon count of exposures necessitates extensive post-processing steps, including contamination removal and denoising. This paper evaluates deep-learning denoising methods that can be trained without clean ground-truth images and assesses their utility for detection11 oriented analysis of astronomical data. We adapt and compare Noise2Noise, Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator, and blind-spot-based methods using synthetic data and real observations from the Hubble Space Telescope (HST) and the Canada-France-Hawaii Telescope (CFHT). Performance is evaluated using object-detection metrics, including correct detection rate and false alarm rate, together with image-based metrics and pixel-distribution diagnostics. The results show that these methods can improve faint-source detectability relative to the original noisy images, with encouraging gains on HST data after domain-consistent initialization, while transfer to CFHT data is more limited, highlighting the importance of instrument/domain similarity for unsupervised adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 无监督深度学习去噪方法在天文图像中提升微弱源检测能力，但域迁移效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 天文图像因光子计数低而噪声严重，传统去噪依赖干净真值，但天文数据难以获取无噪声图像，因此需要无需真值的无监督去噪方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有干净真值图像的情况下，有效去除天文图像噪声并提升微弱源检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对比了Noise2Noise、Stein's无偏风险估计和盲点方法，在哈勃和CFHT数据上评估，并采用域一致初始化。
contributions: 系统评估了多种无监督去噪方法在天文图像上的表现
使用目标检测指标（正确检测率、虚警率）评估去噪对微弱源检测的影响
analysis.experiments: 在哈勃空间望远镜和加拿大-法国-夏威夷望远镜的真实观测数据上进行了实验，使用合成数据和真实数据，评估了图像指标和检测指标。
limitations: 域迁移到CFHT数据时性能有限
未提供与其他有监督方法的直接对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无监督深度学习去噪方法在天文图像中提升微弱源检测能力，但域迁移效果有限。

papers.title: Bias in the Loop: Auditing LLM-as-a-Judge for Software Engineering
papers.abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly used as judges to evaluate code artifacts when exhaustive human review or executable test coverage is unavailable. LLM-judge is increasingly relevant in agentic software engineering workflows, where it can help rank candidate solutions and guide patch selection. While attractive for scale, current practice lacks a principled account of reliability and bias: repeated evaluations of the same case can disagree; small prompt edits can swing outcomes; and seemingly semantics-preserving, human-equivalent perturbations may elicit divergent verdicts. This paper studies LLM-as-a-Judge for code through a measurement-first lens. We analyze two pointwise judging regimes across code generation, code repair task, and test generation, and we systematically probe prompt-induced biases. Our study considers difficulty levels for repeated runs and controlled prompt interventions that isolate one presentation cue at a time, and it evaluates judges using consistency and sensitivity to bias. We find that judge decisions are highly sensitive to prompt biases even when the underlying code snippet is unchanged. Across all three tasks, several biases systematically shift preferences toward the option favored by the prompt, improving accuracy when that option aligns with the gold answer but substantially reducing it otherwise. In some settings, these effects are large enough to change task-level conclusions and alter relative model rankings. These findings show that reported judge performance may reflect prompt artifacts rather than stable assessment ability, posing a direct threat to the validity and reproducibility of code evaluation. We therefore argue that LLM-as-a-Judge studies should report bias sensitivity alongside accuracy and incorporate explicit controls to support more trustworthy model comparison in software engineering.

analysis.tldr: LLM作为代码评估法官存在严重提示偏差，可能扭曲评估结果和模型排名。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被广泛用作代码评估的自动裁判，但缺乏对其可靠性和偏差的系统研究，现有实践可能因提示敏感性导致评估结果不可重复。
analysis.problem: 系统审计LLM作为代码评估法官时的偏差，包括提示诱导偏差、重复运行不一致性以及语义等价扰动导致的判决分歧。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 法官决策对提示偏差高度敏感，即使代码片段不变；偏差会系统性地将偏好转向提示所倾向的选项，当该选项与正确答案一致时提升准确率，否则大幅降低；在某些设置中，偏差足以改变任务级结论和模型相对排名。
analysis.method: 采用测量优先的方法，在代码生成、代码修复和测试生成三个任务上分析两种逐点判断机制，通过控制提示干预（每次隔离一个呈现线索）和重复运行来探测偏差，并使用一致性和偏差敏感性作为评估指标。
contributions: 系统揭示了LLM作为代码评估法官时存在的多种提示偏差及其对评估结果的影响
提出了在软件工程中使用LLM作为法官时应报告偏差敏感性并加入显式控制的建议
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了实验设置：三个任务（代码生成、代码修复、测试生成）、两种判断机制、难度级别、重复运行和受控提示干预。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有类型的LLM法官偏差（如模型架构差异）
实验仅在特定任务和提示干预下进行，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM作为代码评估法官存在严重提示偏差，可能扭曲评估结果和模型排名。

papers.title: When Informal Text Breaks NLI: Tokenization Failure, Distribution Shift, and Targeted Mitigations
papers.abstract: We study how informal surface forms degrade NLI accuracy in ELECTRA-small (14M) and RoBERTa-large (355M) across four transforms applied to SNLI and MultiNLI: slang substitution, emoji replacement, Gen-Z filler tokens, and their combination. Slang substitution (replacing formal words with informal equivalents, e.g., "going to" -> "gonna", "friend" -> "homie") causes minimal degradation (at most 1.1pp): slang vocabulary falls largely within WordPiece coverage, so the tokenizer handles it without signal loss. Emoji replaces content words with Unicode characters that ELECTRA's WordPiece tokenizer maps to [UNK], destroying the input signal before any learned parameters see it (93.6% of emoji examples contain at least one [UNK], mean 2.91 per example). Noise tokens (no cap, deadass, tbh) are fully in-vocabulary but absent from NLI training data, consistent with the model assigning them inferential weight they do not carry. The two failure modes respond to different interventions: preprocessing recovers emoji accuracy by normalizing text before tokenization; augmentation handles noise by exposing the model to noise-bearing examples during training. A hybrid of both achieves 88.93% on the combined variant for ELECTRA on SNLI (up from 75.88%), with no statistically significant drop on clean text. Against GPT-4o-mini zero-shot, unmitigated ELECTRA is significantly worse on transformed variants (p < 0.0001); hybrid ELECTRA surpasses it across all SNLI variants and reaches statistical parity on MultiNLI.

analysis.tldr: 非正式文本通过分词失败和分布偏移破坏NLI性能，混合预处理与数据增强可恢复准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: NLI模型在正式文本上表现良好，但现实中的非正式文本（如俚语、表情符号、网络用语）会显著降低性能，现有研究缺乏对失败模式的系统分析和针对性缓解方法。
analysis.problem: 非正式表面形式（俚语替换、表情符号替换、噪声标记）如何以及为何降低NLI准确率，并设计有效的缓解策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 俚语替换影响最小（≤1.1pp），因为词汇在WordPiece覆盖内；表情符号导致大量[UNK]标记（93.6%示例含至少一个），破坏输入信号；噪声标记虽在词表中但训练数据中未见，模型赋予其不存在的推理权重。
analysis.method: 预处理（将表情符号标准化为文本）和数据增强（在训练中引入含噪声标记的样本）的混合方法。
contributions: 系统分析了非正式文本破坏NLI的两种失败模式：分词失败（表情符号）和分布偏移（噪声标记）。
提出混合缓解策略（预处理+数据增强），在SNLI上从75.88%提升至88.93%，且干净文本无显著下降。
analysis.experiments: 在ELECTRA-small和RoBERTa-large上对SNLI和MultiNLI进行四种变换实验，并与GPT-4o-mini零样本对比。
limitations: 仅针对特定非正式形式（俚语、表情符号、Gen-Z填充词），其他形式未验证。
缓解方法可能无法泛化到更复杂的非正式文本或不同模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 非正式文本通过分词失败和分布偏移破坏NLI性能，混合预处理与数据增强可恢复准确率。

papers.title: Bridging Coarse and Fine Recognition: A Hybrid Approach for Open-Ended Multi-Granularity Object Recognition in Interactive Educational Games
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enabled open-ended object recognition, yet they struggle with fine-grained tasks. In contrast, CLIP-style models excel at fine-grained recognition but lack broad coverage of general object categories. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{HyMOR}, a \textbf{Hy}brid \textbf{M}ulti-granularity open-ended \textbf{O}bject \textbf{R}ecognition framework that integrates an MLLM with a CLIP model. In HyMOR, the MLLM performs open-ended and coarse-grained object recognition, while the CLIP model specializes in fine-grained identification of domain-specific objects such as animals and plants. This hybrid design enables accurate object understanding across multiple semantic granularities, serving as a robust perceptual foundation for downstream multi-modal content generation and interactive gameplay. To support evaluation in content-rich and educational scenarios, we introduce TBO (TextBook Objects), a dataset containing 20,942 images annotated with 8,816 object categories extracted from textbooks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HyMOR narrows the fine-grained recognition gap with CLIP to 0.2\% while improving general object recognition by 2.5\% over a baseline MLLM, measured by average Sentence-BERT (SBert) similarity. Overall, HyMOR achieves a 23.2\% improvement in average SBert across all evaluated datasets, highlighting its effectiveness in enabling accurate perception for multi-modal game content generation and interactive learning applications.

analysis.tldr: HyMOR 融合 MLLM 与 CLIP 实现开放域多粒度物体识别，在教科书数据集上平均 SBert 提升 23.2%。
analysis.research_motivation: MLLM 在开放域物体识别中缺乏细粒度能力，而 CLIP 模型细粒度强但覆盖范围有限，两者互补但未有效结合。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现开放域粗粒度与细粒度物体识别，以支持交互式教育游戏中的多模态内容生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MLLM 擅长粗粒度但细粒度不足，CLIP 细粒度好但覆盖窄，两者存在能力鸿沟。
analysis.method: 提出 HyMOR 混合框架，MLLM 负责开放域粗粒度识别，CLIP 负责特定领域（如动植物）细粒度识别，通过设计融合机制实现多粒度物体理解。
contributions: 提出 HyMOR 混合框架，结合 MLLM 与 CLIP 实现开放域多粒度物体识别。
构建 TBO 数据集，包含 20,942 张教科书图像及 8,816 个类别，支持教育场景评估。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，HyMOR 将细粒度识别差距缩小至 0.2%，通用物体识别提升 2.5%，平均 SBert 提升 23.2%。
limitations: CLIP 仅针对动植物领域，其他细粒度领域可能需额外适配。
框架依赖 MLLM 与 CLIP 的协同，可能增加推理复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyMOR 融合 MLLM 与 CLIP 实现开放域多粒度物体识别，在教科书数据集上平均 SBert 提升 23.2%。

papers.title: EdgeVTP: Exploration of Latency-efficient Trajectory Prediction for Edge-based Embedded Vision Applications
papers.abstract: Vehicle trajectory prediction is central to highway perception, but deployment on roadside edge devices necessitates bounded, deterministic end-to-end latency. We present EdgeVTP, an embedded-first trajectory predictor that combines interaction-aware graph modeling with a lightweight transformer backbone and a one-shot curve decoder. By predicting future motion as compact curve parameters (anchored at the last observed position) rather than horizon-scaled autoregressive waypoints, EdgeVTP reduces decoding overhead while producing smooth trajectories. To keep runtime predictable in crowded scenes, we explicitly bound interaction complexity via a locality graph with a hard neighbor cap. Across three highway benchmarks and two Jetson-class platforms, EdgeVTP achieves the lowest measured end-to-end latency under a protocol that includes graph construction and post-processing, while attaining state-of-the-art (SotA) prediction accuracy on two of the three datasets and competitive error on other benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/SeungjinStevenKim/EdgeVTP.

analysis.tldr: EdgeVTP 提出一种面向边缘设备的轻量级轨迹预测方法，通过曲线参数化解码和局部图约束实现低延迟与高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 车辆轨迹预测在高速公路感知中至关重要，但部署在路边边缘设备上需要确定性的端到端低延迟，现有方法难以同时满足实时性和精度要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘嵌入式设备上实现低延迟、确定性且高精度的车辆轨迹预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合交互感知图建模、轻量级Transformer主干和一次性曲线解码器，将未来运动预测为紧凑曲线参数，并通过硬邻居上限的局部图约束交互复杂度。
contributions: 提出嵌入式优先的轨迹预测器EdgeVTP，实现低延迟端到端预测。
采用曲线参数化解码替代自回归方式，减少解码开销并生成平滑轨迹。
通过局部图硬邻居上限显式限制交互复杂度，保证拥挤场景下的运行时可预测性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个高速公路基准和两个Jetson平台上的实验表明，EdgeVTP在包含图构建和后处理的协议下实现了最低的端到端延迟，并在两个数据集上达到SOTA预测精度，在另一个数据集上误差具有竞争力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于高速公路场景，未验证城市复杂路口等场景。
硬邻居上限可能限制对密集交互的建模能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EdgeVTP 提出一种面向边缘设备的轻量级轨迹预测方法，通过曲线参数化解码和局部图约束实现低延迟与高精度。

papers.title: Adaptive Computation Depth via Learned Token Routing in Transformers
papers.abstract: Standard transformer architectures apply the same number of layers to every token regardless of contextual difficulty. We present Token-Selective Attention (TSA), a learned per-token gate on residual updates between consecutive transformer blocks. Each gate is a lightweight two-layer multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that produces a continuous halting probability, making the mechanism end-to-end differentiable with 1.7% parameter overhead and no changes to the base architecture. Notably, TSA learns difficulty-proportional routing without any explicit depth pressure: even at $λ=0$ (no depth regularisation), the task-loss gradient alone drives the router to skip 20% of token-layer operations. On character-level language modeling, TSA saved 14-23% of token-layer operations (TLOps) across Tiny-Shakespeare and enwik8 at <0.5% quality loss. At matched efficiency, TSA achieved 0.7% lower validation loss than early exit, and the learned routing transfers directly to inference-time sparse execution for real wall-clock speedup.

analysis.tldr: TSA通过可学习的逐token门控机制，在Transformer中实现自适应计算深度，无需深度正则化即可跳过约20%的token-层操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Transformer对所有token使用相同层数，忽略了不同token的上下文难度差异，导致计算浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何让Transformer根据每个token的难度自适应调整计算深度，以提升效率而不牺牲质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使没有深度正则化（λ=0），任务损失梯度本身就能驱动路由器跳过20%的token-层操作，表明模型自然倾向于学习难度比例路由。
analysis.method: 提出Token-Selective Attention (TSA)，在每个残差更新前添加一个轻量级两层MLP门控，输出连续停用概率，实现端到端可微，仅增加1.7%参数。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、端到端可微的逐token自适应深度机制，无需改变基础架构。
实验表明在字符级语言建模上节省14-23%计算量，质量损失<0.5%，且优于早期退出方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Tiny-Shakespeare和enwik8数据集上进行字符级语言建模实验，评估TLOps节省和验证损失。
limitations: 仅在字符级语言建模上验证，未在更大规模或不同任务上测试。
门控MLP的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TSA通过可学习的逐token门控机制，在Transformer中实现自适应计算深度，无需深度正则化即可跳过约20%的token-层操作。

papers.title: FairNVT: Improving Fairness via Noise Injection in Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: This paper presents FairNVT, a lightweight debiasing framework for pretrained transformer-based encoders that improves both representation and prediction level fairness while preserving task accuracy. Unlike many existing debiasing approaches that address these notions separately, we argue they are inherently connected: suppressing sensitive information at the representation level can facilitate fairer predictions. Our approach learns task-relevant and sensitive embeddings via lightweight adapters, applies calibrated Gaussian noise to the sensitive embedding, and fuses it with the task representation. Together with orthogonality constraints and fairness regularization, these components jointly reduce sensitive-attribute leakage in the learned embeddings and encourage fairer downstream predictions. The framework is compatible with a wide range of pretrained transformer encoders. Across three datasets spanning vision and language, FairNVT reduces sensitive-attribute attacker accuracy, improves demographic-parity and equalized-odds metrics, and maintains high task performance.

analysis.tldr: FairNVT通过在视觉Transformer中注入校准高斯噪声并联合正交约束与公平正则化，在保持任务精度的同时提升表征与预测层面的公平性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有去偏方法通常分别处理表征公平性和预测公平性，但两者内在关联未被充分利用；且许多方法需要重新训练或修改模型架构，计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在预训练Transformer编码器中同时实现表征级和预测级的公平性，且不显著牺牲任务精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过轻量适配器学习任务相关和敏感嵌入，对敏感嵌入施加校准高斯噪声，并与任务表示融合；结合正交约束和公平正则化，减少敏感属性泄露并促进公平预测。
contributions: 提出FairNVT，一种轻量级去偏框架，兼容多种预训练Transformer编码器。
通过噪声注入和联合正则化，同时提升表征和预测公平性，并在视觉和语言数据集上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个视觉和语言数据集上，FairNVT降低了敏感属性攻击者准确率，改善了人口均等和均等化几率指标，同时保持了高任务性能。
limitations: 可能对噪声注入的校准参数敏感，需要调参。
仅验证了视觉和语言任务，未涉及其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FairNVT通过在视觉Transformer中注入校准高斯噪声并联合正交约束与公平正则化，在保持任务精度的同时提升表征与预测层面的公平性。

papers.title: Federation over Text: Insight Sharing for Multi-Agent Reasoning
papers.abstract: LLM-powered agents often reason from scratch when presented with a new problem instance and lack automatic mechanisms to transfer learned skills to other agents. We propose a federated learning-like framework, Federation over Text (FoT), that enables multiple agents solving different tasks to collectively generate a shared library of metacognitive insights by iteratively federating their local reasoning processes. Instead of federation over gradients (e.g., as in distributed training), FoT operates at the semantic level without any gradient optimization or supervision signal. Iteratively, each agent does local thinking and self-improvement on their specific tasks independently, and shares reasoning traces with a central server, which aggregates and distills them into a cross-task (and cross-domain) insight library that existing and future agents can leverage to improve performance on related tasks. Experiments show that FoT improves reasoning effectiveness and efficiency across a wide range of challenging applications, including mathematical problem solving, cross-domain collaboration, and machine learning research insight discovery. Specifically, it improves average accuracies of downstream tasks by 24% while reducing the reasoning tokens by 28% across the first two applications. In the research insight discovery application, FoT is able to generate insights that cover over 90% of the major contributions in the subsequent papers.

analysis.tldr: 提出FoT框架，让多个LLM智能体通过文本级联邦学习共享推理洞察，提升跨任务推理效果和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM智能体面对新问题时通常从零推理，缺乏自动机制将学到的技能迁移给其他智能体，导致重复劳动和效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何让多个解决不同任务的智能体自动共享推理经验，提升跨任务推理性能并减少计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Federation over Text (FoT)框架，智能体独立进行本地推理和自我改进，将推理轨迹上传至中央服务器，服务器聚合并蒸馏为跨任务洞察库，供现有和未来智能体使用。
contributions: 提出一种无需梯度优化或监督信号的文本级联邦学习框架FoT，实现多智能体推理洞察共享。
在数学问题求解、跨域协作和机器学习研究洞察发现三个应用上验证了有效性，平均准确率提升24%，推理token减少28%。
analysis.experiments: 在数学问题求解、跨域协作和机器学习研究洞察发现三个应用上评估，平均准确率提升24%，推理token减少28%；在研究洞察发现中，生成的洞察覆盖后续论文90%以上的主要贡献。
limitations: 可能依赖中央服务器的聚合质量，存在单点故障风险。
跨任务洞察的通用性可能受限于任务多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FoT框架，让多个LLM智能体通过文本级联邦学习共享推理洞察，提升跨任务推理效果和效率。

papers.title: Can We Build Scene Graphs, Not Classify Them? FlowSG: Progressive Image-Conditioned Scene Graph Generation with Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) unifies object localization and visual relationship reasoning by predicting boxes and subject-predicate-object triples. Yet most pipelines treat SGG as a one-shot, deterministic classification problem rather than a genuinely progressive, generative task. We propose FlowSG, which recasts SGG as continuous-time transport on a hybrid discrete-continuous state: starting from a noised graph, the model progressively grows an image-conditioned scene graph through constraint-aware refinements that jointly synthesize nodes (objects) and edges (predicates). Specifically, we first leverage a VQ-VAE to quantize a scene graph (e.g., continuous visual features) into compact, predictable tokens; a graph Transformer then (i) predicts a conditional velocity field to transport continuous geometry (boxes) and (ii) updates discrete posteriors for categorical tokens (object features and predicate labels), coupling semantics and geometry via flow-conditioned message aggregation. Training combines flow-matching losses for geometry with a discrete-flow objective for tokens, yielding few-step inference and plug-and-play compatibility with standard detectors and segmenters. Extensive experiments on VG and PSG under closed- and open-vocabulary protocols show consistent gains in predicate R/mR and graph-level metrics, validating the mixed discrete-continuous generative formulation over one-shot classification baselines, with an average improvement of about 3 points over the state-of-the-art USG-Par.

analysis.tldr: FlowSG 将场景图生成重构为混合离散-连续状态的渐进生成过程，利用流匹配实现优于一次性分类方法的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有场景图生成（SGG）方法大多将其视为一次性确定性分类问题，忽略了关系推理的渐进生成特性，限制了模型对复杂视觉关系的建模能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将 SGG 从一次性分类任务转变为渐进式生成任务，以联合生成节点（对象）和边（谓词）并实现几何与语义的耦合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FlowSG，使用 VQ-VAE 将场景图量化为紧凑令牌，通过图 Transformer 预测连续几何的流场并更新离散令牌的后验，结合流匹配损失和离散流目标进行训练。
contributions: 将 SGG 重新定义为混合离散-连续状态上的连续时间传输问题，实现渐进式生成。
提出结合流匹配的图 Transformer，联合优化几何和语义，支持少步推理并与标准检测器兼容。
analysis.experiments: 在 VG 和 PSG 数据集上进行了封闭词汇和开放词汇实验，在谓词 R/mR 和图级指标上平均提升约 3 个点，优于 USG-Par 等基线。
limitations: 可能依赖 VQ-VAE 的量化质量，对罕见谓词或对象类别的泛化能力有待验证。
渐进生成过程可能增加推理延迟，尽管声称少步推理，但实际效率需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowSG 将场景图生成重构为混合离散-连续状态的渐进生成过程，利用流匹配实现优于一次性分类方法的性能。

papers.title: SAVE: A Generalizable Framework for Multi-Condition Single-Cell Generation with Gene Block Attention
papers.abstract: Modeling single-cell gene expression across diverse biological and technical conditions is crucial for characterizing cellular states and simulating unseen scenarios. Existing methods often treat genes as independent tokens, overlooking their high-level biological relationships and leading to poor performance. We introduce SAVE, a unified generative framework based on conditional Transformers for multi-condition single-cell modeling. SAVE leverages a coarse-grained representation by grouping semantically related genes into blocks, capturing higher-order dependencies among gene modules. A Flow Matching mechanism and condition-masking strategy further enhance flexible simulation and enable generalization to unseen condition combinations. We evaluate SAVE on a range of benchmarks, including conditional generation, batch effect correction, and perturbation prediction. SAVE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in generation fidelity and extrapolative generalization, especially in low-resource or combinatorially held-out settings. Overall, SAVE offers a scalable and generalizable solution for modeling complex single-cell data, with broad utility in virtual cell synthesis and biological interpretation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/fdu-wangfeilab/sc-save

analysis.tldr: SAVE 提出基于基因块注意力的条件 Transformer 框架，用于多条件单细胞生成，在保真度和泛化性上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单细胞生成方法将基因视为独立 token，忽略了基因间的高层生物学关系，导致在多样条件下建模性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何利用基因模块的高阶依赖关系，实现多条件下高保真且可泛化的单细胞生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于条件 Transformer 的生成框架，使用基因块注意力进行粗粒度表示，结合 Flow Matching 机制和条件掩码策略。
contributions: 提出基因块注意力机制，捕获基因模块间的高阶依赖关系。
引入 Flow Matching 和条件掩码，支持灵活模拟和泛化到未见条件组合。
analysis.experiments: 在条件生成、批次效应校正和扰动预测等基准上评估，SAVE 在生成保真度和外推泛化性上持续优于最先进方法，尤其在低资源或组合留出设置下。
limitations: 可能依赖基因模块的预定义分组，分组质量影响性能。
大规模数据上的计算效率有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAVE 提出基于基因块注意力的条件 Transformer 框架，用于多条件单细胞生成，在保真度和泛化性上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Representation Before Training: A Fixed-Budget Benchmark for Generative Medical Event Models
papers.abstract: Every prediction from a generative medical event model is bounded by how clinical events are tokenized, yet input representation is rarely isolated from other system and architectural choices. We evaluate how representation decisions affect downstream prediction after a shared one-epoch pretraining budget. We train 28 matched transformers on MIMIC-IV and evaluate them on 30 clinical outcomes in three experiments: (1) quantization granularity, reference-range anchoring, and code-value fusion; (2) value encoding (hard bins, soft discretization, code-normalized xVal) crossed with temporal encoding (event order, time tokens, admission-relative RoPE); and (3) native MIMIC laboratory/vital codes versus the Common Longitudinal ICU Format (CLIF)-remapped laboratory/vital codes with compression-preserving perturbation arms. In Experiment 1, fused code-value tokenization improves mortality AUROC from 0.891 to 0.915 (BH-adjusted p < 0.001), hospital length-of-stay AUROC from 0.763 to 0.788 (BH-adjusted p < 0.001), and, for the decile fused-vs-unfused comparison, mean regression Spearman rho across the 13 regression outcomes from 0.414 to 0.494. Across the three temporal encodings, event order only and admission-relative RoPE match or exceed inserting time tokens on average while shortening sequences by 11%. CLIF remapping preserves downstream performance in our single-site setting while yielding a smaller, clinically interpretable token set compatible with multi-site use. Finer-than-decile quantization, reference-range anchoring, and soft discretization help in selective outcomes, while code-normalized xVal remains well below the discrete and soft families, consistent with near-median suppression that persists after the affine variant.

analysis.tldr: 在固定预算下系统评估生成式医疗事件模型的输入表示（分词）对下游预测的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式医疗事件模型的预测性能受临床事件分词方式影响，但输入表示很少被独立于系统和架构选择进行隔离评估。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估不同输入表示（分词粒度、值编码、时间编码、代码映射）对生成式医疗事件模型下游预测性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在MIMIC-IV上训练28个匹配的Transformer，进行三项实验：1) 量化粒度、参考范围锚定、代码-值融合；2) 值编码（硬分箱、软离散化、代码归一化xVal）与时间编码（事件顺序、时间令牌、入院相对RoPE）交叉；3) 原生MIMIC实验室/生命体征代码与CLIF重映射代码（含压缩保持扰动臂）。
contributions: 系统评估了多种输入表示对生成式医疗事件模型的影响，并提供了固定预算下的基准。
发现代码-值融合显著提升死亡率AUROC（0.891→0.915）和住院时长AUROC（0.763→0.788）。
事件顺序和入院相对RoPE在平均性能上匹配或超过插入时间令牌，同时序列长度缩短11%。
CLIF重映射在单站点设置中保持下游性能，同时产生更小、临床可解释且兼容多站点的令牌集。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-IV上训练28个匹配的Transformer，评估30个临床结局，包括三项实验。具体结果：代码-值融合提升死亡率AUROC从0.891到0.915（BH校正p<0.001），住院时长AUROC从0.763到0.788（BH校正p<0.001），13个回归结局的平均Spearman rho从0.414到0.494。
limitations: 单站点（MIMIC-IV）实验，多站点泛化性未验证。
仅评估了固定预算（一个epoch预训练），不同预算下结果可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在固定预算下系统评估生成式医疗事件模型的输入表示（分词）对下游预测的影响。

papers.title: StageMem: Lifecycle-Managed Memory for Language Models
papers.abstract: Long-horizon language model systems increasingly rely on persistent memory, yet many current designs still treat memory primarily as a static store: write an item, place it into memory, and retrieve it later if needed. We argue that this framing does not adequately capture the practical memory-control problem in deployed LLM systems. In realistic settings, the difficulty is often not merely forgetting useful information, but retaining too many uncertain items, forgetting important content in the wrong order, and giving users little trust in what will persist over time. We propose StageMem, a lifecycle-managed memory framework that treats memory as a stateful process rather than a passive repository. StageMem organizes memory into three stages -- transient, working, and durable memory -- and models each item with explicit confidence and strength. This separates shallow admission from long-term commitment: information may first be written at low cost and only later be promoted, retained, updated, or evicted as evidence and pressure evolve. Under controlled pressure regimes, this decomposition helps preserve late-important content while keeping memory burden and deeper-tier pollution more controlled. Adapted external tasks provide boundary evidence that the same schema remains compatible with stronger retrieval structure outside pure synthetic control. We present StageMem as a principled decomposition of the memory-control problem for language model systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出生命周期管理记忆框架StageMem，将记忆分为暂存、工作、持久三阶段，通过置信度和强度建模实现动态记忆控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM系统将记忆视为静态存储，无法应对实际部署中记忆项过多、遗忘顺序错误、用户信任不足等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个动态、可控的记忆管理框架，使LLM系统能根据证据和压力自适应地保留、提升、更新或驱逐记忆项。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前记忆系统的主要困难不是忘记有用信息，而是保留太多不确定项、以错误顺序遗忘重要内容，且用户难以信任记忆的持久性。
analysis.method: StageMem将记忆组织为暂存、工作、持久三个阶段，每个记忆项带有显式的置信度和强度，通过压力控制机制实现浅层写入与长期承诺的分离。
contributions: 提出生命周期管理的记忆框架StageMem，将记忆视为状态化过程而非被动仓库。
通过三阶段分解和置信度/强度建模，实现可控的记忆提升、保留、更新和驱逐。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖人工设计的压力控制策略，泛化性待验证。
与现有LLM系统的集成开销和实际效果需进一步实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生命周期管理记忆框架StageMem，将记忆分为暂存、工作、持久三阶段，通过置信度和强度建模实现动态记忆控制。

papers.title: The Reliance Negotiation Framework: A Dynamic Process Model of Student LLM Engagement in Academic Writing
papers.abstract: Student engagement with large language models (LLMs) in academic writing is not a stable trait, an adoption decision, or a competency level; it is a continuously negotiated process that existing frameworks cannot adequately theorize. Typological models provide categories without mechanisms; technology acceptance models explain adoption but not post-adoption quality; AI literacy frameworks treat competency as a static predictor rather than a live input. None accounts for within-student variability across tasks, the developmental paradox whereby experience produces habituation rather than sophistication, or principled non-use as a form of ethical reasoning. This article introduces the Reliance Negotiation Framework (RNF), developed from a sequential explanatory mixed-methods study of 382 undergraduates at a public minority-serving institution in the United States (survey, N = 382; 14 semi-structured interviews; three qualitative survey strands; 1,435 coded instances). The RNF reconceptualizes LLM reliance as an ongoing negotiation among four concurrent inputs (perceived benefits, perceived risks, ethical commitments, and situational demands) with outputs that recursively modify subsequent decisions. A Two-Model Architecture accommodates the 13.0% of participants whose categorical ethical commitments foreclose negotiation entirely. The framework generates four falsifiable predictions with implications for AI literacy pedagogy, academic integrity policy, and equity-centered practice at minority-serving institutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出依赖协商框架（RNF），将学生与LLM的互动重新概念化为持续协商过程，而非静态特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有框架无法充分理论化学生在学术写作中与LLM互动的动态过程，存在分类模型缺乏机制、技术接受模型忽略采纳后质量、AI素养框架将能力视为静态预测因子等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何建模学生在学术写作中对LLM依赖的持续变化过程，包括任务间差异、习惯化悖论和原则性非使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于顺序解释性混合方法研究（382名本科生调查、14次半结构化访谈、三个定性调查分支、1435个编码实例），提出依赖协商框架（RNF），包含四个并发输入（感知收益、感知风险、伦理承诺、情境需求）和双模型架构（处理13.0%因伦理承诺完全排除协商的参与者）。
contributions: 提出RNF框架，将LLM依赖重新概念化为持续协商过程
识别出双模型架构，区分协商型与伦理排除型用户
生成四个可证伪预测，对AI素养教学、学术诚信政策和公平实践有启示
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本仅来自美国一所少数族裔服务机构，可能限制泛化性
框架预测尚未经过实证验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出依赖协商框架（RNF），将学生与LLM的互动重新概念化为持续协商过程，而非静态特征。

papers.title: Emergence Transformer: Dynamical Temporal Attention Matters
papers.abstract: The Transformer, a breakthrough architecture in artificial intelligence, owes its success to the attention mechanism, which utilizes long-range interactions in sequential data, enabling the emergent coherence between large language models (LLMs) and data distributions. However, temporal attention, that is, different forms of long-range interactions in temporal sequences, has rarely been explored in emergence phenomenon of complex systems including oscillatory coherence in quantum, biophysical, or climate systems. Here, by designing dynamical temporal attention (DTA) with time-varying query, key, and value matrices, we propose an Emergence Transformer. This architecture allows each component to interact with its own or its neighbors' past states through dynamical attention kernels, thereby enabling the promotion and/or suppression of the emergent coherence of components. Interestingly, we uncover that neighbor-DTA consistently promotes oscillatory coherence, whereas self-DTA exhibits an optimal attention weight for coherence enhancement, owing to its non-monotonic dependence on network structure. Practically, we demonstrate how DTA reshapes social coherence, suggesting strategies to either enhance agreement or preserve plurality. We further apply DTA to the paradigmatic Hopfield neural network, achieving emergent continual learning without catastrophic forgetting. Together, these results lay a foundation and provide an immediate paradigm for modulating emergence phenomenon in networked dynamics only using DTA.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态时间注意力（DTA）机制，构建Emergence Transformer，用于调控网络动力系统中的涌现现象。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer的成功源于注意力机制，但现有研究很少探索时间序列中涌现现象（如量子、生物物理或气候系统中的振荡相干性）的时间注意力形式。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种动态时间注意力机制，以促进或抑制复杂系统中组件的涌现相干性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 邻居DTA一致促进振荡相干性，而自DTA由于对网络结构的非单调依赖，存在一个最优注意力权重用于增强相干性。
analysis.method: 提出动态时间注意力（DTA），其查询、键、值矩阵随时间变化，允许组件通过动态注意力核与自身或邻居的过去状态交互。
contributions: 提出Emergence Transformer架构，引入动态时间注意力机制。
揭示邻居DTA和自DTA对振荡相干性的不同影响模式。
展示DTA在重塑社会相干性和实现持续学习中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的网络动力学系统。
动态注意力机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态时间注意力（DTA）机制，构建Emergence Transformer，用于调控网络动力系统中的涌现现象。

papers.title: CapSeal: Capability-Sealed Secret Mediation for Secure Agent Execution
papers.abstract: Modern AI agents routinely depend on secrets such as API keys and SSH credentials, yet the dominant deployment model still exposes those secrets directly to the agent process through environment variables, local files, or forwarding sockets. This design fails against prompt injection, tool misuse, and model-controlled exfiltration because the agent can both use and reveal the same bearer credential. We present CapSeal, a capability-sealed secret mediation architecture that replaces direct secret access with constrained invocations through a local trusted broker. CapSeal combines capability issuance, schema-constrained HTTP execution, broker-executed SSH actions, anti-replay session binding, policy evaluation, and tamper-evident audit trails. We describe a Rust prototype integrated with an MCP-facing adapter, formulate conditional security goals for non-disclosure, constrained use, replay resistance, and auditability, and define an evaluation plan spanning prompt injection, tool misuse, and SSH abuse. The resulting system reframes secret handling for agentic systems from handing the model a key to granting the model a narrowly scoped, non-exportable action capability.

analysis.tldr: CapSeal 提出一种能力密封的秘密中介架构，通过本地可信代理将直接秘密访问替换为受限调用，以增强 AI Agent 的安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 AI Agent 部署模型通过环境变量、本地文件或转发套接字将 API 密钥等秘密直接暴露给 Agent 进程，导致无法抵御提示注入、工具滥用和模型控制的秘密泄露。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种架构，使 Agent 在需要秘密执行操作时，既能使用秘密又无法泄露秘密，从而解决直接暴露秘密带来的安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接暴露秘密的模型无法区分“使用”和“泄露”同一凭证，导致安全机制失效。
analysis.method: CapSeal 架构通过本地可信代理（broker）实现能力密封的秘密中介，包括能力发放、模式约束的 HTTP 执行、代理执行的 SSH 操作、防重放会话绑定、策略评估和防篡改审计追踪。
contributions: 提出 CapSeal 架构，将秘密处理从直接暴露密钥转变为授予模型受限、不可导出的操作能力。
设计并实现了一个集成 MCP 适配器的 Rust 原型，并制定了条件安全目标和评估计划。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了评估计划（包括提示注入、工具滥用和 SSH 滥用）。
limitations: 原型基于 Rust，可能与其他语言或框架的集成存在挑战。
评估计划尚未执行，实际安全效果和性能开销未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CapSeal 提出一种能力密封的秘密中介架构，通过本地可信代理将直接秘密访问替换为受限调用，以增强 AI Agent 的安全性。

papers.title: Frozen Vision Transformers for Dense Prediction on Small Datasets: A Case Study in Arrow Localization
papers.abstract: We present a system for automated detection, localization, and scoring of arrow punctures on 40\,cm indoor archery target faces, trained on only 48 annotated photographs (5{,}084 punctures). Our pipeline combines three components: a color-based canonical rectification stage that maps perspective-distorted photographs into a standardized coordinate system where pixel distances correspond to known physical measurements; a frozen self-supervised vision transformer (DINOv3 ViT-L/16) paired with AnyUp guided feature upsampling to recover sub-millimeter spatial precision from $32 \times 32$ patch tokens; and lightweight CenterNet-style detection heads for arrow-center heatmap prediction. Only 3.8\,M of 308\,M total parameters are trainable. Across three cross-validation folds, we achieve a mean F1 score of $0.893 \pm 0.011$ and a mean localization error of $1.41 \pm 0.06$\,mm, comparable to or better than prior fully-supervised approaches that require substantially more training data. An ablation study shows that the CenterNet offset regression head, typically essential for sub-pixel refinement, provides negligible detection improvement while degrading localization in our setting. This suggests that guided feature upsampling already resolves the spatial precision lost through patch tokenization. On downstream archery metrics, the system recovers per-image average arrow scores with a median error of 1.8\% and group centroid positions to within a median of 4.00\,mm. These results demonstrate that frozen foundation models with minimal task-specific adaptation offer a practical paradigm for dense prediction in small-data regimes.

analysis.tldr: 冻结的DINOv3 ViT结合AnyUp上采样和轻量检测头，仅用48张标注照片实现亚毫米级箭孔定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 密集预测任务通常需要大量标注数据，但在许多实际场景中获取大规模标注数据成本高昂，因此探索小样本下的高效方法具有重要价值。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅有少量标注数据（48张照片）的情况下，实现高精度的箭孔检测与定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验发现，通常用于亚像素精炼的CenterNet偏移回归头在本任务中不仅无益，反而降低定位精度，表明引导特征上采样已足够恢复空间精度。
analysis.method: 结合颜色校正的规范变换、冻结的DINOv3 ViT-L/16特征提取、AnyUp引导特征上采样以及轻量CenterNet检测头，仅训练3.8M参数。
contributions: 提出一种仅需少量标注数据即可实现高精度密集预测的流水线，在箭孔定位任务上达到或超越全监督方法。
发现引导特征上采样可替代传统亚像素回归头，简化检测头设计。
analysis.experiments: 在48张标注照片（5084个箭孔）上进行3折交叉验证，平均F1为0.893，定位误差1.41mm，下游指标中位误差1.8%。
limitations: 方法在特定场景（室内射箭靶面）验证，泛化性未知。
依赖颜色校正的规范变换，可能不适用于无颜色标记的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 冻结的DINOv3 ViT结合AnyUp上采样和轻量检测头，仅用48张标注照片实现亚毫米级箭孔定位。

papers.title: Mitigating Prompt-Induced Cognitive Biases in General-Purpose AI for Software Engineering
papers.abstract: Prompt-induced cognitive biases are changes in a general-purpose AI (GPAI) system's decisions caused solely by biased wording in the input (e.g., framing, anchors), not task logic. In software engineering (SE) decision support (where problem statements and requirements are natural language) small phrasing shifts (e.g., popularity hints or outcome reveals) can push GPAI models toward suboptimal decisions. We study this with PROBE-SWE, a dynamic benchmark for SE that pairs biased and unbiased versions of the same SE dilemmas, controls for logic and difficulty, and targets eight SE-relevant biases (anchoring, availability, bandwagon, confirmation, framing, hindsight, hyperbolic discounting, overconfidence). We ask whether prompt engineering mitigates bias sensitivity in practice, focusing on actionable techniques that practitioners can apply off-the-shelf in real environments. Testing common strategies (e.g., chain-of-thought, self-debiasing) on cost-effective GPAI systems, we find no statistically significant reductions in bias sensitivity on a per-bias basis. We then adopt a Prolog-style view of the reasoning process: solving SE dilemmas requires making explicit any background axioms and inference assumptions (i.e., SE best practices) that are usually implicit in the prompt. So, we hypothesize that bias-inducing features short-circuit assumption elicitation, pushing GPAI models toward biased shortcuts. Building on this, we introduce an end-to-end method that elicits best practices and injects axiomatic reasoning cues into the prompt before answering, reducing overall bias sensitivity by 51% on average (p < .001). Finally, we report a thematic analysis that surfaces linguistic patterns associated with heightened bias sensitivity, clarifying when GPAI use is less advisable for SE decision support and where to focus future countermeasures.

analysis.tldr: 提出PROBE-SWE基准和基于公理推理的提示方法，将软件工程中GPAI的认知偏差敏感性降低51%。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件工程决策支持中，自然语言问题陈述的措辞变化（如框架、锚定）会诱导通用AI产生认知偏差，导致次优决策，而现有提示工程方法未能有效缓解。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地检测和缓解提示诱导的认知偏差对通用AI在软件工程决策中的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 常见提示策略（如思维链、自我去偏）在逐偏差基础上未显著降低偏差敏感性；偏差诱导特征会短路假设引出过程，使模型偏向有偏捷径。
analysis.method: 提出PROBE-SWE基准（包含8种SE相关偏差的成对问题）和端到端方法：先引出最佳实践，再注入公理推理线索到提示中。
contributions: 构建PROBE-SWE动态基准，系统评估SE场景下8种认知偏差。
发现常见提示工程策略无法有效降低偏差敏感性。
提出基于公理推理的提示方法，平均降低51%偏差敏感性。
通过主题分析揭示与高偏差敏感性相关的语言模式。
analysis.experiments: 在成本效益型GPAI系统上测试常见策略（CoT、自我去偏等），未发现统计显著改善；所提方法在整体偏差敏感性上降低51%（p<.001）。
limitations: 仅针对软件工程领域，泛化性待验证。
未探讨对大型或更先进GPAI模型的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PROBE-SWE基准和基于公理推理的提示方法，将软件工程中GPAI的认知偏差敏感性降低51%。

papers.title: Machine individuality: Separating genuine idiosyncrasy from response bias in large language models
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into daily life, in roles ranging from high-stakes decision support to companionship, understanding their behavioral dispositions becomes critical. A growing literature uses psychometric inventories and cognitive paradigms to profile LLM dispositions. However, these approaches cannot determine whether behavioral differences reflect stable, stimulus-specific individuality or global response biases and stochastic noise. Here, we apply crossed random-effects models -- widely used in psychometrics to separate systematic effects -- to 74.9 million ratings provided by 10 open-weight LLMs for over 100,000 words across 14 psycholinguistic norms. On average, 16.9% of variance is attributable to stimulus-specific individuality, robustly exceeding a statistical null model. Cross-norm prediction analyses reveal this individuality as a coherent fingerprint, unique to each model. These results identify individual differences among LLMs that cannot be attributed to response biases or stochastic noise. We term these differences machine individuality.

analysis.tldr: 通过交叉随机效应模型分离LLM中的真实个性与响应偏差，发现模型间存在稳定的刺激特异性个体差异。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在决策支持和陪伴等角色中日益重要，理解其行为倾向至关重要，但现有心理测量方法无法区分行为差异是源于稳定的个性还是全局响应偏差或随机噪声。
analysis.problem: 如何从LLM的行为数据中分离出真正的个体差异（机器个性）与响应偏差和随机噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 应用交叉随机效应模型，对10个开源LLM在14个心理语言学规范中超过10万个单词的7490万条评分进行分析，分离刺激特异性个性与全局响应偏差。
contributions: 提出机器个性概念，并证明LLM中存在超越响应偏差和随机噪声的稳定个体差异。
通过交叉随机效应模型量化了个性方差占比（平均16.9%），并验证其作为独特指纹的跨规范预测一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于开源LLM和特定心理语言学规范，可能无法推广到其他模型或任务。
未探讨机器个性对实际应用（如决策支持）的具体影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过交叉随机效应模型分离LLM中的真实个性与响应偏差，发现模型间存在稳定的刺激特异性个体差异。
